Name: Jaheziya
Description:
Jaheziya is a leading provider of emergency services, specialised training, and strategic consultancy based in the United Arab Emirates. Serving a wide range of sectors including government, defence, critical infrastructure, aviation, and energy, Jaheziya supports organisations in building operational resilience and emergency preparedness. With a strong reputation for professionalism, compliance, and performance under pressure, Jaheziya plays a vital role in enhancing national and regional readiness for high-risk environments.

Through internationally accredited training programs aligned with NFPA, ISO, NCEMA, and OPITO standards, Jaheziya equips individuals and teams with the practical skills and knowledge needed to manage complex emergencies. Our training portfolio includes fire and rescue operations, HSE, Crisis management, offshore emergency response, and more - delivered by seasoned professionals with real-world experience. Whether onshore or offshore, Jaheziya ensures personnel are not only certified but truly capable. 

Beyond training, Jaheziya provides expert consultancy services that help organisations identify risk, strengthen response strategies, and achieve full regulatory compliance. Their tailored solutions cover emergency planning, business continuity, risk assessments, and SOP/SOG development - built on a deep understanding of both local frameworks and global best practices. Jaheziya is the trusted partner for any organisation looking to protect people, secure operations, and build a culture of preparedness.

Name: Air Zermatt AG
Description:
Die Walliser Air Zermatt wurde 1968 gegründet, um die Flugrettung in der Region sicherzustellen. Sie ist eine Pionierin der alpinen Luftrettung und hat neue, internationale Standards gesetzt. In den USA – dem Entstehungsland der modernen Luftfahrt – wurde die Air Zermatt dreimal mit der höchsten fliegerischen Auszeichnung, dem «Heroism Award», ausgezeichnet. Der erste Helikopter war eine Agusta-Bell 206A Jet-Ranger. Im Jahre 1969 folgte eine SA 316 Alouette III, die – als Novum in der Schweiz - mit einer Rettungswinde ausgerüstet war. Die Air Zermatt hat als Pionierin 
Zeichen gesetzt: 1971 erfolgte die Rettung von 70 Personen aus einer Luftseilbahnkabine, die 240m über Grund stecken geblieben war. Aus dem gleichen Jahr stammt die Direktrettung in der berüchtigten Eigernordwand mit einer SA 315 B Lama sowie die erste Nachtrettung. 1973 wurden in Zermatt erstmals auf einer Rettungsbasis Ärzte fest angestellt.
Der Rettungsdienst der Air Zermatt fliegt pro Jahr rund 2000 Helikopter-Rettungseinsätze und führt ungefähr 900 Ambulanzeinsätze aus. Im kommerziellen Bereich bietet das Unternehmen unterschiedlichste Dienstleistungen an: u.a. Transporte, Film-, Montage- und Personenflüge. Seit der Gründung wurden total über 50'000 Rettungen durchgeführt und ebenfalls auf 50'000 beläuft sich die Zahl der jährlichen Transportflüge mit Unterlasten.
Die Flotte umfasst 11 Helikopter (2 Bell 429, 2 EC 135 (von Air-Glaciers operiert), 1 H 130 T2 und 6 H 125 B3 Écureuils). Seit 2020 sind die Air Zermatt und Air-Glaciers unter dem gleichen Dach. Die Unterwalliser Air-Glaciers ist weiterhin als selbständiges Unternehmen und mit eigenem Brand tätig und betreibt Basen in Sion, Collombey, Saanen und Lauterbrunnen.
Die Air Zermatt ist ein relevanter Arbeitgeber im Kanton Wallis. Das Unternehmen beschäftigt auf den drei Basen in Gampel, Raron und Zermatt sowie auf dem Flugplatz in Sion gesamthaft rund 95 festangestellte Mitarbeitende und eine grosse Anzahl Freelancer.

Name: EV FireSafe
Description:
EV FireSafe enhances safety for emergency responders attending electric vehicle fires through an online hub that provides EV sector data, global case studies, best practice information & ongoing knowledge sharing.

Volunteer emergency brigades can download a free information pack, & you can report an EV traction battery fire or ask us a question at evfiresafe.com

Name: Cruz Roja Salvadoreña
Description: Somos los representantes del Movimiento Internacional de la Cruz Roja en El Salvador, contribuyendo a prevenir y aliviar el sufrimiento humano; en cumplimiento a nuestro rol auxiliar de los poderes públicos en ámbitos humanitarios; a través de nuestros miembros, apegados a los principios fundamentales del Movimiento

Name: South Western Ambulance Service NHS Foundation Trust
Description:
South Western Ambulance Service NHS Foundation Trust (SWASFT) provides emergency and urgent care for the counties of Cornwall and the Isles of Scilly, Devon, Dorset, Somerset, Wiltshire, Gloucestershire and the former Avon area (Bristol, Bath, North and North East Somerset and South Gloucestershire).

The Trust is a high-quality, effective and efficient NHS organisation and the primary provider of 999 ambulance services across its operational area.

Name: JESIP
Description: A page for organisations, professionals and volunteers working in emergency response, and anyone interested in JESIP and better interoperability at multi-agency incidents, where we will share news, updates and information from the JESIP Team and our partners

Name: Hampshire and Isle of Wight Air Ambulance
Description: Hampshire and Isle of Wight Air Ambulance are a charity and have been responding to emergencies across the south since 2007. Our Critical Care Teams of doctors, specialist paramedics and pilots can be anywhere in Hampshire in 15 minutes and anywhere on the Isle of Wight in 20 minutes.

Name: Marine Spill Response Corporation
Description:
The Marine Spill Response Corporation is the largest dedicated oil spill and emergency response organization in the United States.

The Marine Spill Response Corporation (MSRC) is an independent, not-for-profit, U.S. Coast Guard Classified Oil Spill Removal Organization (OSRO). MSRC was formed in 1990 to offer oil spill response services and mitigate damage to the environment.

Name: URG Urgencias
Description:
Con el respaldo del Grupo OSDE y una trayectoria de más de 50 años en el sector de la salud, en URG Urgencias nos dedicamos, desde 1996, a brindar atención médica inmediata con compromiso, calidez humana y tecnología.
 A lo largo del tiempo, desarrollamos diferentes planes médicos integrales que ofrecen mucho más que un servicio de emergencias y urgencias:
 Atención en consultorios con profesionales de distintas especialidades, sin costo adicional
 Aranceles preferenciales en psicología, fisioterapia, odontología y estudios complementarios
 Cobertura en farmacias y ópticas
  Servicio de emergencias y urgencias  con unidades móviles equipadas
 Nuestro más reciente lanzamiento es URG Conecta, un plan especialmente diseñado para adultos mayores.
 Una propuesta que brinda tranquilidad y protección con botón S.O.S, alerta de caídas y asistencia personalizada, promoviendo su independencia y bienestar.
 En URG, nos impulsa el compromiso con la comunidad. Cuidamos a cada persona como lo haríamos con alguien de nuestra propia familia, brindando respuestas reales en los momentos en que más se necesita acompañamiento, contención y tranquilidad.
 Estar cerca. Responder a tiempo. Hacer la diferencia. Eso es URG Urgencias.

Name: Medi Response
Description: At Medi Response, we specialise in providing comprehensive site-based medical services to businesses operating in remote locations or high-risk industries. Our value proposition includes a range of services that are designed to ensure the safety and wellbeing of your workforce, as well as the efficient operation of your business.

Name: Everdrone AB
Description: Everdrone is at the forefront of a new era in public safety, where emergency drones are a critical and integrated part of everyday life. Our drones provide critical support to emergency response organisations by reaching incident scenes faster than any ground unit to gather vital information and deliver life-saving medical equipment.

Name: Björn Steiger Stiftung
Description: Seit mehr als 50 Jahren bemüht sich die Björn Steiger Stiftung (BSS) um die Verbesserung des Rettungssystem in Deutschland und der Förderung der Laienhilfe. Vieles, was heute im Rettungswesen selbstverständlich erscheint wurde von der BSS initiiert. Einheitliche Notrufnummern, Notrufsäulen, Luftrettung, Baby Notarztwagen, Handy Ortung durch Rettungsleitstellen, und vieles mehr, alles Initiativen der Björn Steiger Stiftung. Ziel der Stiftung liegt heute in der Förderung und Weiterentwicklung der Notfallversorgung in Deutschland. Aktuelle Initiativen widmen sich besonders dem Kampf gegen den Herztod mit der Massenverbreitung von Laien-Defibrillatoren, sowie der Breitenausbildung in Wiederbelebung, der Sensibilisierung von Kindern und Jugendlichen für den Notfall, und dem sicheren Transport von Früh- und Neugeborenen. Vor allem der  Verbesserung des Rettungsdienstes und der Notfallversorgung. Hierzu tagen bundesweite BSS Arbeitsgruppen wie das „Forum Rettungsdienst“, „Reziproke Ersthelfer Alarmierung“, „Definition einer abgestuften Hilfsfrist“, „Bündnis pro Rettungsdienst“ sowie die „Fachgruppe Arbeitsschutz im Rettungsdienst“. Untersucht werden neue Technologien in der Notfallversorgung wie z.B. KI und der Einsatz von Drohnen.

Name: Brandweer Twente
Description: Wij zijn Brandweer Twente: daadkrachtig, deskundig en behulpzaam. Met 29 brandweerkazernes staan we 24/7 paraat. Wiej bint der altied!

Name: INTERSCHUTZ - Hannover
Description:
"Safeguarding tomorrow."

INTERSCHUTZ is the world's leading trade fair for the fire and rescue services, civil protection and safety. Here is where leading international companies, stakeholders and authorities in the field of non-police emergency management meet. It is about new products and solutions specifically designed to handle everyday tasks and special challenges, sharing insights and ideas, experiencing cutting-edge technologies and innovations – all with the common objective of shaping a safer future together. 
INTERSCHUTZ covers the full range of products and services for the fire and rescue services and civil protection industries.
At the same time, INTERSCHUTZ is very much a business show. In fact, it’s the undisputed highlight event for the world’s providers of fire and rescue services, civil protection, and safety and security solutions and shapes their business cycles. That’s why anyone who wants to learn about the latest emergency management innovations and developments heads for Hannover when the gates open on INTERSCHUTZ.
INTERSCHUTZ is strong because it is a team effort between Deutsche Messe, the German associations vfdb, DFV and VDMA, the show’s commercial exhibitors, non-commercial exhibitors such as fire and rescue service organizations and disaster relief organizations, and the show’s many visitors from the professional and volunteer fire services, plant fire services, rescue services and the disaster relief sector.

Name: I-DIEM Global
Description: "I-DIEM Global advances equitable climate resilience by placing historically vulnerable communities at the center of disaster risk reduction and recovery. Through strategic collaboration with nonprofits, governments, and community leaders, we design inclusive adaptation strategies and mobilize skilled volunteers to strengthen local capacity, reduce vulnerability, and protect lives. We believe climate resilience must be built with—and for—everyone." Our global vision is "a world where every community—regardless of geography, wealth, or history—can thrive in the face of climate change. I-DIEM Global envisions a future where equity is the foundation of disaster resilience, where nations work together to safeguard lives, protect the planet, and ensure that the most vulnerable are empowered to lead in building a safe, sustainable, and climate-ready world."

Name: British Divers Marine Life Rescue
Description:
British Divers Marine Life Rescue is a charity dedicated to frontline response for marine mammals around the UK using a network of over 3000 trained volunteer Marine Mammal Medics.

Our hotline receives over 4000 calls per year, mainly for young seals pups but also for live stranded cetaceans, turtles and sharks. We also operate a specialist Large Whale Disentanglement Team and a small number of temporary seal holding units including our flagship Cornwall Seal Hospital.

BDMLR collaborates with many other organisations to provide for the welfare of marine animals in need through conservation-based partnerships and to help raise public awareness of key issues through education. This includes providing training for other organisations overseas, with recent examples including France, Italy, Denmark, Egypt and Kazakhstan.

Name: MMT Nederland
Description: MMT Nederland is de overkoepelende organisatie van de 4 MMT's die prehospitale specialistische mobiele zorg leveren. Voor alle mensen in Nederland, op alle plaatsen, 24/7.

Name: Emergency Response Team monday.com
Description: The monday.com Emergency Response Team (ERT) partners with humanitarian NGOs and governmental agencies to help enhance their impact during emergencies, through donating digital emergency products and technical expertise and services.

Name: E4E Relief
Description:
As a company, your people are your greatest asset. So when a crisis or tragedy occurs, you care.

Compassionately.

That’s what happens when you partner with E4E Relief. We offer a unique charitable program that puts you at the frontline, where your workforce needs you most. Because in times of crisis, it’s not just your reputation on the line, it’s the livelihood of your community.

Through empathy, risk mitigation and industry expertise, E4E Relief delivers the grants your people truly need; fosters a unity of purpose between your company and its stakeholders; lets them support one another by contributing to the program and creating a sense of collective goodwill; and acts as an independent third-party to ensure it’s all done well.

When you respond to crisis in a way that comes from the heart, with a sense of purpose and community, your people will feel the difference.

Name: Grupo EMI Arg.
Description:
Grupo EMI es un grupo de empresas con más de 35 años de experiencia en el rubro de la salud que ofrece asistencia médica prehospitalaria a todo el país. 
Sus características diferenciales han revolucionado el servicio de salud en la provincia, a través de la prestación de servicios como atención domiciliaria, vehículo y techo protegido, cuidados domiciliarios, enfermería y farmacia a domicilio.
Su equipo de trabajo está conformado por más de 900 profesionales de diferentes disciplinas: médicos, paramédicos, pedriátras, enfermeros, nutricionistas, psicólogos, acompañantes terapéuticos, kinesiólogos, entre otros.

NUESTRA HISTORIA

En el año 1986, se funda la empresa EMI S.A. con el propósito de implementar un servicio médico integral que respondiera a todo tipo de urgencias, y con la misión de ofrecer la mejor medicina pre-hospitalaria.

Con el paso del tiempo, los directivos de la empresa vieron la necesidad de incorporar atenciones domiciliarias a su cartilla de servicios y procedieron a crear la empresa Roster S.A., en el año 2000, para llevar a cabo esta nueva prestación.

Los continuos avances de la ciencia en medicina hospitalaria demostraron que los pacientes se ven ampliamente favorecidos en su recuperación cuando se encuentran en el ámbito hogareño. Así se decidió crear, diez años después, la empresa Indom,  avocada a la prestación de cuidados integrales domiciliarios, traslado de pacientes, enfermería y rehabilitación domiciliaria. A su vez, ese mismo año, se añadió el servicio de farmacia a través de la firma Farmasur, sumando descuentos y beneficios para sus pacientes.

Es en el año 2016 cuando se decide unificar a estas cuatro empresas (EMI, Roster, Indom y Farmasur) en lo que hoy conforma Grupo EMI.

Name: The Partnership for Inclusive Disaster Strategies
Description: The Partnership for Inclusive Disaster Strategies (The Partnership) is the only U.S. disability-led organization with a focused mission of equity for people with disabilities and people with access and functional needs throughout all planning, programs, services and procedures before, during, and after disasters and emergencies.

Name: Taskforce Kiwi
Description:
At Taskforce Kiwi we understand that just because you take off a uniform, doesn't mean that you stop serving. 

We also know that the motivation to serve isn't limited to those who have served in the defence force and emergency services. And while the organisation is veteran-led, we welcome volunteers from across the wider community, 

Taskforce Kiwi consists of defence and emergency services veterans, and members of the wider community, with the skills, experience, motivation and grit to help communities before, during and after natural disasters. We work alongside existing emergency management agencies and communities, providing skilled volunteer resources to help fellow Kiwis on their worst day.

Name: Emergency Management Logistics Canada
Description:
We are only prepared as our NETWORK of resources and connections. 

We connect emergency management organizations (EMOs) with businesses and community groups using the EMLPlatform to find targeted products and services to respond with confidence.

Name: rescue.co
Description: Rescue.co is the largest network of East Africa's best first responders. A rescue.co membership gives families, groups, and individuals affordable access to medical response, including air evacuation and roadside assistance. Our team of dispatchers are ready to assist you 24 hours a day, seven days a week. Through the membership, you only need to dial one number to reach every responder in our network. Our dispatch arranges a rescue by the closest and best-suited responders in the area. This means help in minutes instead of hours. In an emergency response, when every minute matters, we're stronger as a network, and we're better together. So, if you're a responder, an ambulance company, a group, a family, or an individual, join us today at rescue.co!

Name: The Salvation Army - Emergency Disaster Services - USA
Description:
The Salvation Army began offering assistance to disaster survivors after a major hurricane hit Galveston, TX in September 1900, destroying the coastal city and killing thousands of people. At the request of The Salvation Army’s National Commander, officers from across the country moved into the Galveston area to help feed and shelter the thousands of survivors, while also providing much needed emotional and spiritual support. 

Since then, The Salvation Army has responded to numerous natural disasters, transportation accidents, civil unrest situations, and terrorist attacks. By providing beverages, snacks, meals, and emotional and spiritual care to first responders and survivors, The Salvation Army strives to bring hope and healing to people who find themselves in the midst of extremely difficult situations.

Name: SAMU 31
Description:
Service d'Aide Médicale Urgente (SAMU) de la Haute-Garonne, premier SAMU de France créé par le Pr Lareng en 1968. 
En cas d’urgence ou si besoin d’un conseil médical merci de composer le 15  (appel gratuit et 24H/24, 7J/7)

Name: USA Up Star
Description:
USA Up Star is the industry leader in delivering timely, seamless temporary life support services and private amenities on a mass scale.

Established by military veterans, our company is dedicated to top quality and timely service.  We believe that the highest standards are our baseline of business.  If something isn't right, we fix it.  If something could be better, we improve it.  Our reputation is the heart of our company's value system. 

USA Up Star is a premier service provider for large-scale operations.  We support domestic and international missions and events, and are experienced in cross-border transportation and special event needs.  We have a rapid deployment fleet of portable shower, laundry, and bathroom trailers available for set-up, maintenance, and removal.

We specialize in essential life support services including turnkey basecamps, project management, and logistics for equipment rental of large tents, HD flooring, private entrance bunkhouse, shower, and restroom trailers, janitorial, facility management, fueling, and other related services.  USA Up Star is a Service-Disabled Veteran Owned Business, CVE certified. 

USA Up Star brings value to all of our clients by providing high quality support and services featuring Berry Amendment compliant, American-made equipment coupled with professional knowledge and support capabilities for every project.  

USA Up Star is rooted in military precision with years of experience in executing project-based facilities services and supplies. Equipped to respond 24/7, USA Up Star is ready to assist with any situation - big or small.

Timely, Resourceful, Turnkey Solutions.

Name: Aid Fund for Syria
Description: The Aid Fund for Syria (AFS) is a multi-donor pooled fund addressing critical humanitarian needs and supporting local organisations to build long-term resilience and sustainability in Syria. Originally founded in 2022 as the Aid Fund for Northern Syria (AFNS), AFS has evolved into a humanitarian fund with the objective of catalysing locally-driven recovery, strengthening civil society leadership, and fostering inclusive resilience and governance on a country-wide scale.

Name: Rapid Centre
Description:
Tired of running after local Mechanics, Puncture wala, or Towing? 
Wait no more! 

Choose from wide Range of Service Providers in your area 

We've made it easier to hire local mechanics and ambulances on the go. Explore hundreds of service options, view estimates in advance, 
book local professionals for all kind of help you need wherever you are. 

Heading out on a Long Drive? Take Rapid Centre with you!
Download our free mobile app today


#Rapid_Centre

Name: The British Association for Immediate Care
Description:
The British Association for Immediate care is a UK charity promoting pre-hospital care. We support local schemes delivering care to critically ill or injured patients across the UK, and provide internationally recognised education and training both across the UK and worldwide.

We organise an annual Immediate Care Conference and have membership subscriptions available to keep our members connected with what we are doing and provide generous member discounts on all our courses. 

Our members come from a number of health care professions, particularly medicine, nursing and paramedicine, as well as including those who work or volunteer within pre-hospital care.

Name: Australasian Women in Emergencies Network
Description: The Australasian Women in Emergencies Network promotes and supports the contributions of women in emergencies and disasters, building stronger and more resilient individuals and communities.

Name: U-Learn Uganda
Description:
We believe the refugee response is most impactful when it maximises the use of quality evidence, and deeply integrates refugee voices and preferences. 

We act as a public good – supporting a wide range of refugee response actors to 
continually improve their programming by making use of high quality learning, 
evidence and insights.

We specialise in Accountability to Affected Populations (AAP), Research, and Learning. We deliver a range of assessments, convener events, trainings, resource curation, and technical assistance to support actors across the response.

Name: MAGNUS International Search and Rescue
Description: MAGNUS International Search & Rescue is a world-renowned emergency management and ground search and rescue service provider with over 30 years of life-saving experience. Rescue services are supported by a global asset network that provides emergency solutions 24/7 worldwide for travelers, business enterprises, insurance companies, and governments.

Name: Team Digitale Verkenning Brandweer Nederland
Description: Team Digitale Verkenning is een brandweer ondersteuningsteam dat (nood)hulpdiensten ondersteunt bij de bestrijding van incidenten door gebruik te maken van hoogwaardige technologie. Het Team Digitale Verkenning zorgt voor een bijdrage aan de totale beeldvorming door gebruik te maken van drones met geavanceerde camera’s. Hierdoor kan bijgedragen worden aan een veilige en efficiënte werkplek voor hulpverleners tijdens de bestrijding van incidenten. Ook kan het Team Digitale Verkenning met behulp van technologische hulpmiddelen een beeld genereren van locaties die niet veilig toegankelijk zijn voor hulpverleners.

Name: FENICS
Description:
Après 4 ans de travail dans le projet RiskGest du programme européen Alcotra, FENICS propose une boite à outils de moyens de communications stratégique pour les services de secours et d'urgence en cas de perte partielle ou totale des réseaux de télécommunication. 

En finalisation de certification dans le cadre Mécanisme de Protection Civile de l’Union Européenne (MPCU).

L'équipe est composé d'experts issus des services d'incendie et de secours des Bouches du Rhône, de la Savoie, de la Haute Savoie et du Rhône.

Name: AFARM
Description: L'Association Française des Assistants de Régulation Médicale (AFARM) est une association professionnelle ayant pour principaux objectifs : l'information, la promotion et la défense de notre profession.

Name: Marine Rescue Services Egypt
Description:
With a great passion for safety and a strong desire to prevent emergency situations.
Marine Rescue Services

Name: Callan JMB
Description: Callan JMB is a leader in emergency preparedness and response, specialty packaging, and product fulfillment for critical industries, including pharmaceuticals, diagnostics, and healthcare logistics. Our mission is to safeguard the integrity and safety of essential products by integrating technology and processes to create solutions while ensuring operational efficiency in medical material movement, including high-velocity product fulfillment and re-distribution.

Name: Hospitainer
Description:
Hospitainer BV provides modular medical solutions, at the 𝗿𝗶𝗴𝗵𝘁 𝘁𝗶𝗺𝗲 at the 𝗿𝗶𝗴𝗵𝘁 𝗽𝗹𝗮𝗰𝗲 to minimise human suffering.

People in many regions have no access to basic healthcare. The shocking fact is that some 80% of the mortality rate - due to trauma, diseases, and birth complications - can be treated by small-scale, non-complex treatments and surgery. Medical interventions which are supported by our rapid deployment hospitals. By keeping the costs low, we believe we can offer the right solution. All our products are designed to be plug & play, for fast deployment, and are available from stock. 

Our solutions are self-sufficient and delivered with medical equipment, medicines, and consumables. As well provided are clear instructions, maintenance and spare parts for vital components. 

Our products are robust and simple to maintain, specially designed for rough and rural areas. We deliver projects in areas all over the world. Our people are trained to operate in emergency situations where a timely response is essential.

Name: Gothams
Description:
Gothams is a next-generation emergency response and government contracting firm delivering large-scale disaster response and recovery projects across the nation. Trusted by state and federal partners when timing and precision matter most, Gothams operates with the military precision and private sector agility to solve complex mission sets under pressure.
Our multidisciplinary team brings decades of leadership across defense, infrastructure, and emergency management—combining operational experience with technical expertise to execute high-impact solutions.

We strive to support communities, empower response agencies, and strengthen our national security.

Name: Guardea Cyberdefense Community
Description: Guardea is the first national assistance and support platform in cyber defense, freely accessible, for businesses with 1 to 10,000 employees. Guardea, as a national one-stop shop, facilitates access to over 850 French experts and the best protection solutions. Guardea, as a co-pilot, helps you enhance your security, from protection to remediation, all across France and 7 days a week.

Name: Urgence 114 (CNR114)
Description:
Le service public gratuit réservé aux personnes sourdes, sourdaveugles, malentendantes et aphasiques, pour toutes les urgences, 24h/24, 7j/7. 
Ce numéro unique, national, gratuit est accessible par visiophonie, tchat, SMS ou fax, 24H/24, 7J/7. Des agents de régulation 114, sourds et entendants, gèrent votre appel et contactent le service d’urgence le plus proche : SAMU (15), Police-Gendarmerie (17), Sapeurs-Pompiers (18).
•  Téléchargez maintenant l’application Urgence 114 sur votre smartphone depuis les stores iOS et Android
• ou appelez le 114 depuis le site internet urgence114.fr
• ou envoyez un SMS au numéro « 114 »

Suivez-nous :
Facebook : https://www.facebook.com/urgence114/
Instagram : https://www.instagram.com/urgence_114/

Name: Beschermde Wieg
Description:
Onze Stichting stelt zich ten doel zwangere vrouwen die – om welke redenen dan ook - geen beroep op reguliere hulpverlening kunnen, durven of willen doen, desgewenst anoniem, hulp te bieden bij hun vragen en onzekerheden rond hun zwangerschap, bevalling of de situatie die ontstaat als zij eenmaal zijn bevallen. Vaak zal het daarbij gaan om vrouwen die hun zwangerschap geheim willen houden uit angst voor repercussies bij het bekend worden daarvan. Dit sluit ook naadloos aan bij het rapport van de Raad voor Strafrechtstoepassing (RSJ) en Jeugdbescherming, waarin de Raad aan de overheid adviseert meer werk te maken van vroegtijdige en laagdrempelige hulp aan ongewenst zwangere vrouwen.

Ons professionele team  zal trachten deze vrouwen bij te staan, niet alleen door te proberen zo goed mogelijk antwoord te geven op hun vragen en advies te geven, maar ook door te proberen hen te helpen tot verantwoorde afwegingen te komen als het om de toekomst van hun aanstaande baby gaat.

De Stichting is 24 uur per dag bereikbaar via 0800-6005, onze chat met ons via www.beschermdewieg.nl en via een 14- tal locaties welke via dit nummer bereikbaar zijn. Ook hebben wij een een mobiele kamer die in het hele land inzetbaar is.

Stichting Beschermde Wieg is volledig afhankelijk van giften om  kwetsbare moeders en baby’s in nood te kunnen blijven helpen en ondersteunen. Elke gift klein of groot helpt ons om hen te helpen.
Help jij ons mee?

Name: GWA MEDICAL
Description:
We are a Peruvian Company dedicated to provide Medical Services and medical assistance, to peruavians and foreign customers, we can handle all your medical needs, such as air ambulance, terrestrial ambulance, home doctor service, medical equipments, sales and ambulance renting and training for industries and general public. 

All our staff are well trained and qualify knowledge. We demand them to keep in a constantly training.
Location: La Perla, Constitutional Province of Callao

Name: The Blue Light Show
Description:
Two-day conference & exhibition tailored to the unique procurement and educational needs of the emergency services community.

Returning to Olympia London in July 2026 after a highly successful inaugural event, this free-to-attend, high level CPD conference and exhibition brings together thousands of professionals from the police, fire & rescue, ambulance, mountain rescue, and coast guard services, along with their procurement teams and support staff.

Name: Soporte Vital Táctico
Description:
Soporte Vital Táctico es una marca registrada y pertenece al Grupo Empresarial RESITECH 2021 SLU.

Nos dedicamos a la distribución de productos para sanidad táctica enfocados en el control de hemorragias, manejo de vías aéreas, respiración y trauma.

Name: Wiener Rotes Kreuz
Description:
Das Wiener Rote Kreuz ist einer der neun Landesverbände des Österreichischen Roten Kreuzes, das wiederum Teil der Internationalen Rotkreuz- und Halbmond-Bewegung ist. Das Wiener Rote Kreuz gliedert sich in den Landesverband Wien als Mutterorganisation mit seinen Bezirksstellen. Name: Appalachia Relief
Description:
Appalachia Relief is a leader in crowdsourced mutual aid and disaster relief. Inspired by the success of our Hurricane Helene response in Appalachia, we provide tools and resources to help communities to replicate our effective, scalable model for disaster response.

In the aftermath of Hurricane Helene, many people in Southern Appalachia struggled to access essential resources. Information was hard to find or not shared effectively. Communities were experiencing spotty cell and internet service, and social media didn't reach everyone. Gaps in communication slowed down relief and recovery efforts.

A small group of volunteers mobilized to find solutions. What needed to be done to get critical information by and for impacted communities out there?

We focused on technology for mutual aid, rapidly developing a lightweight website driven by Google Docs that could be easily accessed and navigated by folks with minimal cell and internet service. This also enabled us to lower the barriers for community members to contribute to our open, crowdsourced document -- if you could use a mouse and type, you could help keep information and resources flowing.

We built a Discord-based system to quickly connect and onboard volunteers into our flexible, decentralized leadership structure. We also partnered with emerging organizations like R4Reach.org and WNC-Supply-Sites.com, who developed a decentralized online database to help WNC communities transport supplies to where they’re needed most.

In the first six weeks, over 100,000 people in the Asheville, NC region accessed our platform for the critical information they needed about food, water, and supplies, shelter, transportation, disaster recovery resources, and more.

As needs evolve, so do our efforts. Appalachia Relief continues to focus on human-centered, accessible, and replicable tech solutions for grassroots disaster relief -- in Southern Appalachia and beyond.

As primeiras Instalações dos Bombeiros foram na travessa da Hortinha e funcionou até 1989. Nessa mesma data os Bombeiros Voluntários mudaram-se para a Rua Longa, para as Instalações do Circulo Operário Vidigueirense. Na data de 15 de Março de 1997 foi inaugurado o 1º quartel dos Bombeiros.

No dia 1 de Março de 1993, a Rádio Vidigueira, já com grande implantação na área da sua frequência, foi adquirida pela Associação Humanitária dos Bombeiros Voluntários de Vidigueira, sua proprietária até á data.

Também como elemento cultural, esta Associação também tem uma Banda Filarmónica desde o dia 30 de Setembro de 1995, a data em que esta foi fundada. O mesmo em que em Setembro de 1994 propôs à Direcção a criação da escola de Musica, esta que iniciou com cerca de 40 alunos, e que 20 destes, se tornaram músicos e que vieram a dar origem á actual Banda Filarmónica.

Name: Wilson County Emergency Services District #3
Description:
Wilson County Emergency Services District No. 3 (ESD #3) is an Emergency Services District (ESD) that is a political subdivision of the State of Texas ESDs are created under Texas Health and Safety Code, Chapter 775 or Chapter 776 as a means to better provide public funding for urban, suburban and rural emergency services organizations.  ESDs are the only practical way to adequately support emergency services in many Texas municipalities as well as suburban and rural areas of the state.  When an ESD is created, County Commissioners appoint 5 individuals that are property owners within the District to be ESD Commissioners.  The terms of the ESD Commissioners are for 2 years and run staggered.   



Wilson County ESD #3 was created in November 2012 by the voters of the community to provide Emergency Medical Services. Initially when the ESD was created it contracted with a local volunteer provider, until January 2015 at which time the ESD became its own service provider. Wilson County ESD #3 when it took over operations started with one full time ambulance licensed with MICU capabilities with 6 full time employees out of one (1) station with an annual call volume of 450 calls. Over the years, with an ever-growing population and an increase in traffic, the call volume for our District has increased significantly. We now operate out of three (3) stations positioned in Stockdale, La Vernia, and the Kicaster area (FM 775 & FM 3432), six (6) ambulances, and have thirty-three (33) full-time employees providing services 24/7.



Wilson County ESD #3 serves the eastern half of Wilson County, Texas. The District provides Emergency Medical Services (EMS) to approximately 400 square miles of eastern Wilson county and includes the City of La Vernia, City of Stockdale and all rural unincorporated areas in between to the County lines of Gonzales, Karnes, Bexar and Guadalupe.  The estimated population for the District is around 30,000.

Bo Renberg (EMT-P, RN, MICN) founded Med Tech to develop life saving products he saw lacking and enhance the standard for emergency management. 

Today we have 50 years experience and R&D behind us, and offers a range of vacuum products for immobilisation that are best in class. 

In the last 30 years, the main market has been the US where the headquarter is located. Now there is a focus on expanding the foot print in Europe.

Name: Carle Place Hook, Ladder, Hose Co. 1
Description: Carle Place Fire Department is a fire and rescue company tasked with the protection of Carle Place, New York, United States.

Name: Transition House
Description: Building bridges to stability for adults facing homelessness in Northumberland County. Join us in our mission to support and uplift our neighbours!

Name: Teays Valley Fire
Description:
Teays Valley Fire Department is a dynamic and vital organization dedicated to ensuring the safety and well-being of the community it serves. As a cornerstone of emergency services, the department is committed to excellence in firefighting, rescue operations, and pre-hospital medical care.

Our team of highly trained and skilled professionals work collaboratively to respond swiftly to a wide range of emergencies. Whether it's a fire, medical crisis, or rescue operation, we pride ourselves on being at the forefront of safeguarding lives and property.

At the heart of our mission is a passion for public service, community engagement, and continuous improvement. We embrace cutting-edge technologies and best practices to deliver the highest standard of care and protection. As a member of the Teays Valley Fire Department, you would be an integral part of a dedicated team, making a meaningful impact on the lives of those in need.

Name: T.A.C.T. Little Rock
Description:
At T.A.C.T. we use proprietary chemicals and the best training to be the most reliable biohazard and hoarding clean up company in the industry.

No matter how big or small the project is, T.A.C.T. Central Arkansas is available 24/7 to help you in your time of need. We specialize in biohazard and hoarding clean-up, however, we are ready to help with many other types of jobs. If you are not sure to call, it’s probably T.A.C.T. Central Arkansas.

Name: SWARTHMORE FIRE & PROTECTIVE ASSOCIATION
Description: SWARTHMORE FIRE & PROTECTIVE ASSOCIATION is a combination Fire Department providing Fire and Emergency Medical Services to the residents and visitors of Swarthmore Borough in Pennsylvania, United States.

Name: Blanco River Regional Recovery Team (BR3T)
Description: Blanco River Regional Recovery Team (BR3T)  is a nonprofit organization  based out of San Marcos, Texas, United States. BR3T is a long term disaster recovery group serving Hays, Caldwell, Guadalupe and Blanco Counties.

Name: EHBO-vereniging Enschede
Description: Onze vereniging, opgericht op 18 oktober 1937, is één van de grootste EHBO-verenigingen in het oosten van het land. Wij verzorgen diverse EHBO-opleidingen en onze leden verzorgen de hulpverlening bij diverse evenementen in Enschede en omstreken.

Name: Hondveilignederland
Description: Honveilignederland is een initiatief van Stichting Alert. Door middel van voorlichting , training en beoordeling van honden (met een gedragsproblematiek) proberen we Nederland veiliger te maken en (bijt)incidenten te voorkomen.

Name: ATSU 92
Description: Association départementale des transports sanitaires Urgents, au sein du Centre de Réception et de Régulation des Appels du SAMU 92 la régulation de l'ATSU se charge de missionner les ambulances privées de gardes, à la demande du médecin régulateur du SAMU, sur tout le département, de faire respecter des délais d'intervention et d'enregistrer par écrit les bilans des ambulanciers. Le régulateur oriente les ambulances vers les services d'urgences appropriés après validation du médecin.

Name: Buy My Cle
Description:
BuyMyClé – Expert en solutions de clés pour véhicules

Spécialisés dans la reproduction, la programmation et la réparation de clés pour véhicules (automobiles, motos et utilitaires).
Nous accompagnons particuliers et professionnels grâce à des solutions rapides, fiables et adaptées aux besoins de chaque marque de véhicule.

Reconnus comme l’un des leaders du secteur, notre expertise couvre l’ensemble des problématiques : clé perdue, cassée, non reconnue, déprogrammée ou coincée dans le barillet.
Grâce à un large stock de références et à des équipements de programmation avancés, nous sommes en mesure de proposer une prise en charge immédiate pour la majorité des modèles, ou sous 24 à 48 h lorsque la clé doit être commandée.

Nos engagements

Intervention rapide : reproduction et programmation sur place, généralement en moins d’une heure.

Compétences techniques renforcées : outils professionnels compatibles avec la majorité des constructeurs.

Transparence tarifaire : prestation complète incluant la clé, la programmation et, si nécessaire, l’ouverture du véhicule.

Accompagnement personnalisé : diagnostic offert et conseil sur la solution la plus adaptée.

Services complémentaires uniquement a la boutique de Roissy-en-Brie

En plus de notre expertise automobile, nous proposons :

La réalisation de plaques d’immatriculation auto et moto

La reproduction de clés de maison

Le clonage de badges d’immeuble

L’impression d’étiquettes de boîtes aux lettres

Notre mission

Offrir un service professionnel, réactif et accessible, en garantissant un haut niveau de qualité dans chacune de nos interventions.

Name: 7 Day Tax Relief
Description: 7-Day Tax Relief has an association of tax attorneys, Tax Preparers, enrolled agents, CPA, bankruptcy attorneys, commercial collection agencies, legal network personnel, and Tax Preparers.

Name: EAST COLUMBUS INDEPENDENT FIRE DEPARTMENT INCORPORATED
Description: East Columbus Independent Fire Department (ECIFD), also known as Columbus Township Fire & Rescue, is a group of men and women dedicated to saving lives and protecting property.  We proudly serve Columbus Township in Bartholomew County, Indiana, with a combination of career staff and volunteers.

Name: SOS EMERGENZA
Description:
Siamo un gruppo di persone e professionisti: alcuni di noi si occupano d’emergenza sanitaria, altri di noi si occupano di social media management.

Uniti abbiamo dato vita a SOS EMERGENZA.

Abbiamo creato questo progetto con lo scopo di condividere e trasmettere, attraverso il web, la cultura del soccorso sanitario e informare la popolazione della presenza del numero unico emergenza 112 con la relativa applicazione per smartphone dedicata.

Inoltre ci occupiamo di Social Media in Emergency Situations, ovvero come impiegare i social media per la comunicazione durante le emergenze.

La popolazione usa con regolarità e in modo massiccio questi strumenti di comunicazione.

Attraverso i nostri canali social, che offrono un’altissima visibilità, contribuiamo ad una rapida diffusione di importanti notizie alla popolazione.

Per rimanere costantemente aggiornato ti consigliamo di seguirci sui canali social @sosemergenza.

Name: East Whiteland Volunteer Fire Company
Description: Founded in 1953, the East Whiteland Township Volunteer Fire Association provides first response emergency services to the residents of East Whiteland and Charlestown Townships in the Philadelphia suburbs of Chester County.

Name: Blossburg Fire & Ambulance
Description:
Committed to community service through leadership, vision and integrity.
100% volunteer.

Name: Manpowair
Description:
We don't ever want a contractor to turn down a project because they don't have enough labor or equipment.  We have a dedicated team laser focused on building
the operational support that contractors need in emergency situations - PEOPLE. POWER. COOLING

Name: Divergent Solutions
Description: Divergent Solutions partners with government and private sector organizations to deliver an expansive range of products and services, meeting the unique demands of industries across the spectrum. From essential commodities to specialized services, we are committed to providing solutions that drive efficiency, innovation, and growth.

Name: RESPONDA
Description: Designed by extreme-sports fans, for extreme-sports fans, RESPONDA enables first-responders and medical personnel to securely access critical patient information so they can provide life-saving bespoke care.

Name: Pleasant Plains First Aid
Description:
Established in 1960, Pleasant Plains First Aid, Squad 33, proudly provides 9-1-1 volunteer BLS pre-hospital emergency medical services to the residents of Pleasant Plains and Toms River, New Jersey.

Our dedicated members are all certified EMTs recognized by the New Jersey Department of Health and OEMS. These volunteers devote countless hours of their personal time to respond to emergencies, participate in ongoing training, and support the squad’s operations. Many of our members also contribute to maintaining the fleet, assisting with fundraising efforts, and ensuring our organization remains fully operational.

We respond to a wide range of emergencies, including motor vehicle accidents, falls, strokes, cardiac events, respiratory emergencies, and more. In addition, we provide standby medical support at some community events and assist neighboring towns during times of need.

Our fleet of ambulances, state-of-the-art equipment, and continuous training ensures we are always prepared to respond effectively. We take great pride in our skilled volunteers, who selflessly give their time and skills to serve the community, as well as in our well-maintained resources.

As a 501(c)(3) non-profit organization, our mission relies on the unwavering dedication of our volunteers and the generous support of the communities we serve.

Name: MeHoRo
Description: De stichting MeHoRo biedt diaconale hulp met uitsluitend vrijwilligers aan projecten in Hongarije en Roemenië. Zij doet dit onder verantwoordelijkheid van drie diaconieën van plaatselijke kerken. De naam van de stichting is ontstaan uit de eerste twee letters van Meerkerk, Hongarije en Roemenië. De stichting zamelt kleding, meubels, fietsen, computers en medische hulpmiddelen in die worden getransporteerd naar de projecten. Daar worden de goederen verkocht en/of uitgedeeld. De opbrengst wordt gebruikt voor diaconale doelen ter plaatse.

Name: Rettung Stadler
Description:
Die Rettung Stadler ist ein innovatives und zukunftsorientiertes Unternehmen im Bereich Rettungsdienst, Notfallmedizin und Sanitätsdienst. Seit vielen Jahren sind wir ein zuverlässiger Partner in der Notfallrettung, dem Krankentransport und in spezialisierten Bereichen wie dem Intensivtransport und Katastrophenschutz. Unser starkes Team aus haupt- und ehrenamtlichen Mitarbeitern agiert von mehreren Standorten aus, hauptsächlich in Niederbayern, und wird von den integrierten Leitstellen alarmiert.

Mit modernster Ausrüstung und spezialisierten Fahrzeugen bieten wir nicht nur schnelle und sichere Patiententransporte, sondern übernehmen auch medizinische Sondertransporte, wie den Transport von Organen, Blutkonserven und Laborproben. Zusätzlich führen wir professionelle Sanitätsdienste bei Großveranstaltungen durch und bieten umfassende Rückholdienste im In- und Ausland an.

Ein weiteres Standbein unseres Unternehmens ist unser Trainingszentrum, in dem wir praxisorientierte Lehrgänge zur Ersten Hilfe, Notfallrettung und Sanitätsdienst anbieten. Hier qualifizieren wir nicht nur Laien, sondern auch medizinisches Fachpersonal.

Unser oberstes Ziel ist es, Menschen in Notsituationen schnell, sicher und kompetent zu helfen. Durch kontinuierliche Schulungen und Weiterbildungen stellen wir sicher, dass unser Personal stets auf dem neuesten Stand der Notfallmedizin ist.

Wir sind da, wenn es darauf ankommt – jederzeit einsatzbereit und mit Herz bei der Sache. Wenn auch Sie Teil unseres Teams werden und sich für eine verantwortungsvolle und sinnstiftende Tätigkeit im Rettungsdienst oder Sanitätsdienst engagieren möchten, freuen wir uns auf Ihre Bewerbung!

Name: Fundacja Nasze Dzieci - Edukacja, Zdrowie, Wiara
Description: To inicjatywa charytatywna, bazująca na trzech filarach: Edukacja – Wiara – Zdrowie. Jej celem jest wspieranie rodzin, jako naturalnego i najważniejszego środowiska wychowawczego dla człowieka.

Name: Rescue Afghan Women Now
Description: We assist Afghan women who served alongside US forces escape capture/execution at the hands of the Taliban.

Name: EP International LLC
Description:
We are international consulting firm providing a full range of Emergency Preparedness services that leverages your organizational experience with our expertise. Providing you what you need, before you need it. 

We have a complete and thorough understanding of your Emergency Preparedness requirements. Our staff has over 100 years of strategic experience in the United States and the Middle East; with a strong emphasis on Nuclear Power Operations.

Name: espère airmed
Description: We are on a mission to deliver the fastest first responders and organ transport globally before July 1st 2024.

Name: Protect
Description:
Welcome to Protect., A video first, safety platform.

The power of video is the greatest tool to keep you safer and protected.

To prevent emergencies from happening, Protect empowers you to connect with the people “you trust most”, in stressful times.

Safety contacts are able to lean in directly to your broadcast and connect with you live with their Video, Audio and Text. 

In the event of an emergency Protect utilizes AI and image analysis, to identify important moments within your live broadcast which are then shared with emergency responders.

Protect connects you with 911 closest to you to save critical time in emergency response.  Your trusted contacts also have the ability to connect with emergency services for you. 

All of this has been built to bring you confidence, peace of mind, and safety.

Protect. Improving your life one video at a time.

Name: Nourishing Neighbours
Description:
WHO WE ARE 
100% volunteer run emergency food relief. Registered Charity with DGR status
Providing dietary and culturally appropriate food relief to the diverse population of Melbourne. 
We aim to “fill the gaps” for our clients, providing them with not only food, but other essentials including toiletries, nappies, baby formula and period products. 

TO REFER 
Clients are via support agency referral only. Please see our website for more details https://www.nourishingneighbours.org.au/how-to-help/referral-form/

TO HELP US
* Cash donations enable us to purchase food, toiletries, nappies and baby formula for our clients. All donations are 100% tax deductible. Every dollar donated purchases food and essential items. 
* Donations of non-perishables and toiletries are welcomed. Items must be unopened and within best before dates.
* Volunteer with us restocking shelves, packing made-to-order food relief parcels, picking up food supplies, help us apply for grants or fundraise! See our latest posts for volunteer opportunities

Name: California Emergency Response Corps
Description: CERC’s missions are to help Californians become better prepared for disasters and to be on call for deployment in response to disasters throughout the state. When not on deployment, CERC members work with regional partners and focus on priorities such as helping local communities respond to, prepare, and recover from disasters; working to combat food inequities in vulnerable communities; assisting educational opportunity and economic mobility for communities experiencing persistent unemployment or underemployment; and other services that increase civic engagement and social cohesion.

Name: Kudus Hilali
Description: Kudus Hilali is a Turkish-Palestinian nonprofit organization founded in 2023, dedicated to providing humanitarian aid to Palestinians and other communities affected by disasters.

Name: RRS Response Logistics
Description: Wherever. Whatever. Whenever. We Got You Covered. Temporary equipment and facilities solutions. Temporary, short term and emergency solutions to support business continuity in any environment. From special events, seasonal needs, construction project support to natural disasters, we got you covered.

Name: Smithtown Fire Department
Description: Smithtown Fire Department is a volunteer fire department located in Smithtown, NY which is located in Suffolk County on Long Island.

Name: Bombeiros Voluntários do Fundão
Description: A Associação Humanitária de Bombeiros Voluntários de Fundão tem como missão a salvaguarda das vidas humanas, proteção de bens e preservação do ambiente, e a prestação de outros serviços previstos nos regulamentos internos e demais legislação aplicável, com empenhamento contínuo na formação e operacionalidade para dar uma eficaz resposta às emergências, mantendo em atividade, para o efeito, um corpo de bombeiros voluntários empenhado em conservar intemporal o lema “VIDA POR VIDA”.

Name: USNRFF | U.S. National Response Forces Foundation
Description:
U.S. National Response Forces Foundation (USNRFF) is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit foundation [ EIN 39-4225863 ] dedicated to strengthening America’s merchant marine and maritime industry while transforming how the nation responds to crises.

As natural and manmade disasters grow in frequency and severity, our national response must expand in scale and ambition. USNRFF will unite the full capabilities of government, nonprofit, and private sector - including U.S. manufacturing - to ensure a truly National Response.   |   USNRFF will link U.S. shipping and disaster relief with public relations & diplomacy, education, training, research, and economic development to transform U.S. domestic and foreign crisis response actions into a powerful “smart power” tool for National Security and global stability.   |   In coordination with other stakeholders, USNRFF is building America's Crisis Response Fleet: a global fleet of large cargo ships - U.S. flag, U.S. crew, and each CRF ship loaded with 10-20,000 tons of U.S. manufactured supplies and equipment for humanitarian assistance, disaster relief, and economic development ... to ensure we are Prepared at Home. Prepared Abroad.

Name: Edelweiss - Civil Protection
Description:
Associazione di Protezione Civile attiva in ambito USAR, Soccorso Alluvionale e Soccorso Tecnico su Corda.
Iscritta regolarmente all'Albo di Protezione Civile dal 1997 attivi su territorio Italiano ed estero, membro fondatore di EVOLSAR e unica squadra italiana composta da volontari riconosciuta dal sistema INSARAG delle Nazioni Unite.
In via di certificazione LIGHT USAR INSARAG.

Name: Anglesea Surf Life Saving Club
Description:
Since 1952 Anglesea Surf Life Saving Club has been an active member of the community, patrolling the beaches, providing skill development, offering front line first aid and emergency services and providing sport and recreation. The Anglesea Surf Life Saving Club is a professionally run, incorporated, voluntary registered not-for-profit community organisation.

Anglesea Surf Life Saving Club employ several staff to ensure the Club operates to its capacity. Staff include a Club Manager, Club Administrators and Duty Officers. They work closely with the many volunteers of the surf club across all areas of the Club. An Executive Board that consists of a President, two vice Presidents, a Club Captain, Company Secretary and eight Directors manage the Anglesea SLSC. The Club Captain forms the link between the general membership and the Board and is charged with ensuring that the Board is aware of, and responsive to, the requirements of the members.

Name: Rescue
Description:
Emergency Response Officers Provider Specialising in Mining.  
Additional Services: 
Emergency Preparation and Response Plans 
Chief Warden / Warden
Building Life Systems (EWIS, FIP, Hydrant, Detectors, Vesda)
Evacuations
Fire Extinguishers Training

Name: HEEMS - Higher Education Emergency Management Services
Description:
HEEMS is an emergency management training and consulting partner for colleges and universities in the commonwealth of Massachusetts.  We are focused on increasing personal and organizational effectiveness through training and exercises in an exciting way.

Specialties: Conflict Management, Continuity of Operations, Crisis and Emergency Management, Goal Setting and Servant-leadership

Name: North Dartmoor Search and Rescue Team
Description:
North Dartmoor Search and Rescue Team is a non-profile organisation based in Okehampton, Devon.

The Team provide Search and Rescue services across North Devon, and Dartmoor and assists the wider Dartmoor Rescue Group, Exmoor Search and Rescue Team and Cornwall Search and Rescue Teams.
We assist the Police in locating lost or missing persons and the Ambulance Service to recover the injured or ill from remote locations.

Name: Axie Group
Description: Servicios de emergencia, brigadas de incendio, RRHH, ingeniería en detección y extinción, cursos técnicos.

Name: MySOS App
Description: One app for all emergencies, for your everyday emergencies

Name: Corredores del Corazón
Description:
La red de Corredores del Corazón son las personas entrenadas para ayudar a una víctima de ataque corazón hasta la llegada de la ambulancia.
La alerta del servicio de emergencia a la APP permite geolocalizar las personas más próximas a la víctima y empezar el rescate en los primeros minutos, que son críticos para la supervivencia y reducir las secuelas.

La formación para acceder a la red de corredores del corazón esta disponible en formato on-line y presencial.

El objetivo de la Asociación Corredores del Corazón es aumentar la supervivencia de las víctimas de ataque de corazón. La asociación desarrolla su actividad en las areas de Investigación, Divulgación, Formación y Rescate. 
Cuenta con una red de mas de 3.000 corredores y 150 empresas.

Name: Belleville Area EMS
Description: Belleville Area EMS provides 911 BLS ambulance service to the village of Belleville, Wisconsin, and the surrounding area.

Name: Community Development and Social Affairs Charity Organization CDSACO
Description: CDSACO is a non-profit Organization, Established in 2002 and Registered with MoEc (Ministry of Economy) of Afghanistan, Actively working in varies Provinces and Districts of Afghanistan especially in eastern region, CDSACO is the implementing partner of USAID, UN, and other International Donor funding Agency working in the sectors of Emergency and Relief Services, WASH, Vocational and Capacity Building Training, Agriculture, Livelihood, Livestock, Food, Nutrition, Health & Hygiene, Education, Shelter, Women Empowerment, GBV, Child Protection, Human Rights, Peace Building and some other sectors.

Name: First Priority Mobile Healthcare
Description:
CARING PROFESSIONAL DEDICATED

When a medical transport need arises, time and access to quality care is essential. First Priority Medical Transport is dedicated to the highest standards of care accomplished by ongoing, high quality training for all our Paramedics, EMT’s and Drivers.

We always have dispatchers ready to take your call, and we are open 24 hours a day, 365 days a year. You can depend on our caring, compassionate staff for all of your medical transport need

Name: Emergency Warning Systems
Description:
EWS is a proudly Australian technology company headquartered in Melbourne who apply ingenuity with purpose to provide intelligent incident alerting. We keep communities informed and safe during natural disasters and local emergencies.

Our technology targets the delivery of alerts and information to the public during natural disasters and other emergency and incident management situations. Our focus is on achieving this in locations where existing communication networks are known to fail.

Our intelligent software uses precise GPS location to contextualise and target information and warnings to people and communities so that accurate and relevant alerts can be delivered to them in real-time.

Our dedicated emergency alerting devices dramatically improve the communication efficacy of ‘multimodal’ Mass Notification Systems currently in use

Mission
Communicating time critical voice alerts when other systems cannot.

Vision
Provide technology that saves lives by empowering communities around the world to make informed decisions about their safety when threatened by natural disasters and emergencies.

Name: British Cave Rescue Council
Description: Formed in 1967 to represent and support its members at National and International level, promote the exchange of information between member rescue organisations and provide a common voice for them. The BCRC is a coordinating and not a governing body, the individual cave rescue organisations remain entirely autonomous and independent.

Name: AmbuTap
Description:
Ambutap is a platform that connects various ambulance service providers in Bangalore, creating a network of fast and reliable emergency response services for those in need. Through our platform, users can quickly and easily request an ambulance and receive a response in under 10 minutes from the nearest available ambulance service provider.

We understand the importance of timely and efficient emergency medical services, and our platform is designed to ensure that patients receive the highest level of care from experienced medical professionals during transport. By connecting various ambulance networks, we can offer a range of services, from basic life support to advanced life support, to meet the specific needs of each patient.

Name: LifeLine EMS
Description: Lifeline EMS in Duncanville, TX, offers a range of medical transport services, including non-emergent and emergent transports with BLS, ALS, and critical care levels. They also provide wheelchair transports through a partnership with Compass Wheelchair Transports. Additionally, Lifeline EMS supports special events by offering onsite medical services, from first aid to dedicated medical transportation units, ensuring comprehensive care at various gatherings.

Name: Lagniappe Support Services Pty Ltd
Description:
Emergency Rescue Team - We offer Emergency Support Officers (ESOs) whose passion for rescue is consumate to their technical ability and they have been selected based on their proven operational capacity. 

Consulting - Accompanying our ESO services we offer consulting in both Risk and Emergency Management and can provide detailed audits and assessments regarding operational readiness for emergencies including your company's ability to respond to likely medical events and workplace injuries. 

Mock Emergency Planning and Execution - As part of our dedication to your business's emergency management capability we can aid in your site's Level 2 Mock emergency

Name: CaringHands.nl
Description:
Every child in CaringHands
Bij CaringHands zijn we een groep van acht gepassioneerde studenten van de Hogeschool van Amsterdam, die zich inzetten voor kwetsbare groepen in Marokko. Met onze achtergrond in de minor Managen van Creativiteit en Innovatie zetten we ons in voor weeskinderen en kwetsbare gezinnen door het creëren van bewustwording en het bieden van directe hulp.

Ons doel is om niet alleen tijdelijke ondersteuning te bieden, maar ook om een blijvende impact te maken door het bevorderen van solidariteit, het versterken van gemeenschappen, en het activeren van anderen om ook in actie te komen. Met onze projecten richten we ons op het verstrekken van essentiële levensbehoeften, zoals voedsel, kleding en onderdak, en zorgen we ervoor dat er duurzame verandering plaatsvindt.

Via onze Instagram (@caringhands.nl) en onze LinkedIn en Facebook pagina's, delen we updates over onze projecten, de impact die we maken en hoe jij kunt bijdragen aan deze verandering. We geloven dat zelfs kleine gebaren een groot verschil kunnen maken, en we nodigen iedereen uit om samen met ons het verschil te maken!

Name: Maddox Emergency Management Consulting, LLC
Description:
Have questions? Need help? Looking for best practices or cutting-edge ideas? At Maddox Emergency Management Consulting, we have years of experience in the Emergency Management Consulting Industry, and we specialize in providing innovative solutions for organizations needing various types of emergency planning, mitigation planning, pre-disaster response planning,  and a host of other emergency management solutions. Reach out to us; we will be more than happy to assist you in any way we can!

At Maddox Emergency Management Consulting, we take a collaborative, innovative, and data-driven approach to emergency management solutions. We know that communities are diverse, so we work closely with our clients to understand their goals and challenges and develop solutions that address their needs. Working with all stakeholders, we will assess your community for potential risks, and based on your goals, we will create a custom emergency plan to ensure your community is ready for any disaster. The key to disaster resilience is pre-disaster actions, and this process begins with emergency planning.

Name: Marine Rescue Queensland - Currumbin
Description:
The launch of MRQ symbolises the Queensland Government's commitment to innovation, efficiency, and enhanced service delivery, ensuring that marine rescue services are equipped to meet future disaster and emergency challenges with expertise.

Operating as a single marine rescue service as part of Queensland’s coordinated disaster and emergency network, ensures that marine rescue services are equipped to meet future disaster and emergency challenges with expertise.

Community:

One single integrated marine rescue service.
Current marine rescue services maintained and continued through implementation and transition.
Volunteers:

Improved support at local and regional levels.
Improved volunteer protections including access to health and safety programs.
Improved access to replacement vessels.
Improved volunteer recognition.
For Queensland:

One single integrated marine rescue service and safety network.
Better resourced service, with volunteers able to respond, educate and contribute to their community.

Name: Green Heart Animal Council for Emergency Rescue and Care
Description: Global Angels Emergency Kitties Dogs Humanitarian Rescue and Relief

Name: Southern Valley Fire & Rescue
Description:
Southern Valley Fire & Rescue is based at 413 Main St, Horace, North Dakota, United States.
There is also a satellite Fire Station in Hickson, ND.

Name: PROSTAFF ASSISTANCE
Description: Prostaff Assistance est un cabinet agréé, spécialisée dans la gestion des démarches et formalités administratives de voyage, la gestion des démarches et des formalités d’immigration, l'autorisation d’emploi, l'assistance en formalités administratives et douanières et l'assistance logistique

Name: Global Centre for Environment and Disaster Management
Description: We are committed to building resilient communities and promoting sustainable ecosystems through integrated approaches to disaster risk reduction, environmental protection, and emergency response. Our multidisciplinary team collaborates with stakeholders across sectors to develop proactive strategies that mitigate risks, enhance preparedness, and foster long-term sustainability. By combining scientific research, community engagement, and policy advocacy, GCEDM strives to safeguard lives and the environment, ensuring a safer and greener future for all.

Name: SSN Lifeguards
Description:
De SSN Lifeguards is een team van strandwachten dat van midden juni tot eind augustus elke zomer verantwoordelijk zijn voor de bewaking van verschillende stranden in de Noordkop regio in Nederland.

De strandwachten, ook wel bekend als lifeguards, zijn getraind in EHBO, reanimatie, zwemmend redden en het gebruik van reddingsapparatuur. De belangrijkste taak is het bewaken van de veiligheid van de strandbezoekers en het voorkomen van verdrinkingsongevallen.

De lifeguards zijn te herkennen aan hun geel-rode uniformen en hebben een duidelijk herkenbaar post. Er wordt met regelmaat langs de kustlijn gepatrouilleerd om snel in te kunnen handelen bij noodgevallen en zo de veiligheid van alle strandgangers te garanderen.

De SSN Lifeguards is een bedrijfstak van Stichting Strandexploitatie Noordkop met grondvesting in Julianadorp.

Name: C4 Strategic Ltd
Description: C4 Strategic Ltd specialises in Event Safety, Leadership & Incident Management, Emergency Planning, and Healthcare Compliance both for Event Organisers and for Private Medical Providers. Based in the Midlands, but working worldwide to meet the event safety guide requirements and providing operational, tactical and strategic leadership to various clients.

Name: Massapequa Fire Department
Description: Massapequa Fire Department

Name: Pointer Systems SRL
Description:
Pointer SYSTEMS, înființată în anul 2008, este o companie dedicată să ofere servicii de Asistență de urgență de cea mai înaltă calitate. Cu o echipă de profesioniști experimentați și pasionați, suntem conduși de dorința noastră de a fi acolo pentru clienții noștri în momentele critice și de a le oferi soluții eficiente și personalizate.
La Pointer SYSTEMS, credem în construirea relațiilor de încredere prin integritate, transparență și angajament față de excelență. Fiecare membru al echipei noastre împărtășește aceste valori și este determinat să ofere cele mai bune servicii posibile în fiecare situație.
Cu un Call Center propriu și o rețea extinsă de parteneri, suntem pregătiți să răspundem prompt la nevoile clienților noștri și să le oferim suportul de care au nevoie în timp real. Ne mândrim cu capacitatea noastră de a acționa rapid și eficient în orice situație și de a oferi clienților liniștea de care au nevoie în momentele dificile.
Suntem dedicați să oferim suportul necesar pentru a face față provocărilor vieții cu încredere și siguranță. Cu fiecare interacțiune, ne străduim să construim relații durabile și să fim partenerii de încredere ai comunității noastre.

Name: Southwest Missouri Incident Support Team
Description:
It is the mission of Southwest Missouri Incident Support Team to provide National Incident Management System implementation by deploying a team of highly trained and experienced personnel whom work with the local jurisdiction to organize and manage an emergency or non-emergency event.

Type 3 IST/IMTs are deployed as a team of trained personnel, representing multiple disciplines who manage major and/or complex incidents requiring a significant number of local, state, or tribal resources. They manage incidents that extend into multiple operational periods and require a written Incident Action Plan (IAP).

These incidents can include weather-related disasters such as a tornado, earthquake, or flood; a joint law enforcement operation; public health emergency; or a planned exercise or event.

The often causes of domestic blocked drains are often the water systems within your home. The more common issues come from blocked sinks, toilets, baths, showers, and pipes. If you have any of the following blocked drain issues please call 0800 138 9165 with the blockage details, and we will be happy to assist you. Although we are based in Chichester, we also serve the whole of West Sussex, Greater London and Hampshire including Brighton, Southampton and Bognor Regis.

Name: ServiceMaster by Griffing
Description:
The Griffing family has proudly owned and operated a ServiceMaster franchise for 63 years. Founded by Paul W. Griffing and Christopher J. Griffing, the business is now led by Paul D. Griffing and Megan Griffing, who continue the family tradition of excellence in service.

Under Megan and Paul’s leadership, ServiceMaster by Griffing has grown to over 25 employees, providing restoration services across 11 counties in Pennsylvania. Their team has also mobilized nationwide, offering disaster relief during catastrophic events in Wisconsin, North Carolina, Virginia, Florida, New York, Massachusetts, and New Jersey.

Their newest office in the Lehigh Valley now serves Lehigh, Northampton, Carbon, Berks, and Monroe counties, strengthening their ability to respond quickly and effectively.

ServiceMaster by Griffing is recognized as a premier provider of emergency services, known for professionalism, quality workmanship, and rapid response. Megan and Paul, together with their three “Cubs” – Abigail, Sophie, and Kinsley – believe in supporting their employees, investing in their communities, and creating opportunities for growth and development.

At the heart of their work is a simple but powerful belief: SERVE.
	•	Serve our employees
	•	Serve our customers
	•	Serve our veterans
	•	Serve our community

Thank you for the opportunity to share our history, our values, and our mission to serve – always.

God Bless,
The Griffing Family

Name: Foreign United People
Description:
Foreign United People offers emergency relief and supports persons displaced by war, persecution, or natural disaster. We are dedicated to providing relief and necessities of life and creating and advocating for innovative and sustainable solutions to displacement. Foreign United People is incorporated and is registered as a non-governmental organization (NGO). We have a Board of Directors, Members, and volunteers and offer various services and aid.

Our Story:
As soon as Russia invaded Ukraine in late-February 2022, a group of humanitarians from around the world met online and discussed providing humanitarian aid in Ukraine together. Shortly after their conversations, these individuals met in Poland with one objective in mind: to deliver direct relief to the most vulnerable victims of the invasion. Members of Foreign United People have diverse professional backgrounds including humanitarian organization, consultancy, urban planning, academia, first response, military, web design, software engineering, entertainment, policy & government affairs, fleet services and much more. The diverse skillsets contribute immensely to the success the team has had and will continue to have as we are driven by one mission, making our team quite unique.

Name: 421 K9 Search & Rescue
Description:
K9's Max, Tango & Fawkes are trained to find lost person's both alive and deceased. We train regularly & travel to and attend various seminars throughout the yearto make sure we are always ready for the call.
Max is a Black Lab trained specifically in the recovery of Human Remains. K9 Tango is a Dutch Shepherd/Australian Shepherd cross that is Live Find trained to search for lost individuals in urban, rural or disaster situations. K9 Fawkes is a Dutch Shepherd Trained to recover Human Remains.
The cost to train, maintain and deploy out to searches is primarily self-funded. We are also fortunate to receive donations from individuals & the community. We do not charge for our services to the agencies requesting our help, nor do we request reimbursement for mileage or other expenses. The cost is typically in the 10's of thousands per year for seminars, gas, lodging, maintenance, equipment and certification for all 3 dogs.
We love what we do, and are proud of the service we are able to provide, and so appreciate the support and help we have received to be able to continue to serve our community.
