Name: Feuerwehr Risch-Rotkreuz
Description:
Feuerwehr Risch – Gemeinsam für Sicherheit in Risch, Rotkreuz, Buonas und Holzhäusern

Die Feuerwehr Risch basiert auf dem bewährten Milizsystem. Das bedeutet: Unsere rund 104 Eingeteilte der Feuerwehr engagieren sich freiwillig und in ihrer Freizeit, um die Sicherheit der Gemeinde Risch mit ihren Ortsteilen Rotkreuz, Buonas und Holzhäusern rund um die Uhr zu gewährleisten.

Ob Brände, Unfälle, Unwetter oder technische Hilfeleistungen – wir stehen im Einsatz, wenn andere Schutz brauchen. Mit Fachwissen, Kameradschaft und Herzblut setzen wir uns ein: für die Bevölkerung, für die Umwelt und für eine starke Region.

Die Anforderungen an die Feuerwehr haben sich in den letzten Jahren stark verändert – insbesondere durch die intensive Bautätigkeit, die Zunahme an Verkehr und neue Gefahrenlagen. Um diesen Ansprüchen auch langfristig gerecht zu werden, setzt die Feuerwehr Risch auf eine moderne Organisationsstruktur mit klaren Fachbereichen, hoher Ausbildungsqualität und kontinuierlicher Weiterentwicklung.

Zur Unterstützung des Milizsystems und zur Sicherstellung des operativen Betriebs verfügt die Feuerwehr Risch neu über zwei professionelle Stellen:
– Ein Fachbereichsleiter Feuerwehr (80%), der strategisch, operativ und organisatorisch Verantwortung übernimmt.
– Ein Materialwart (70%), der die Einsatzbereitschaft von Fahrzeugen, Geräten und Infrastruktur sicherstellt.

Zusammen mit unserem motivierten Milizteam ergeben sie eine schlagkräftige Einheit, die jederzeit einsatzbereit ist – für Risch, für die Gemeinschaft, für ein sicheres Morgen.

Name: Stormcross
Description:
Stormcross SA est une société suisse spécialisée dans les interventions techniques, les services nautiques et le sauvetage sur l’ensemble du lac de Neuchâtel.

L’entreprise allie rigueur, réactivité et performance pour garantir la sécurité, l’assistance et le soutien opérationnel des navigateurs, des particuliers et des institutions.

Ses activités couvrent l’intervention, le dépannage, le remorquage, le sauvetage ainsi que la sécurisation de manifestations nautiques.

Grâce à un système d’adhésion annuelle, les membres bénéficient d’une assistance prioritaire et sans frais supplémentaires en cas d’intervention — un concept unique sur le lac, inspiré du modèle du TCS, mais dédié au monde nautique.

Name: Greater Naples Fire Rescue District
Description:
Greater Naples Fire Rescue District is the largest independent fire district in the State of Florida, providing emergency response and life safety services to the Chokoloskee, Everglades City, Golden Gate, East Naples, Isles of Capri, Port of the Islands, and surrounding communities. The Fire District is governed by a Board of five elected Fire Commissioners, and proudly staffs 250 uniform firefighters and civilian support staff. The Fire District deploys emergency apparatus from 15 fire-rescue stations. In addition, the Fire District manages a variety of support operations from six additional facilities including Administration, Fire & Life Safety, Training and Special Operations, Logistics, and Fleet Maintenance. 

Our fire service professionals provide services to more than 160,000 residents living and working within the District’s 1,512 square miles. 

Our MISSION is to protect life and property by providing emergency response services and education for the residents, businesses and visitors of our community.

Our VISION is to increase response effectiveness, enhance professionalism and operational efficiencies and use taxpayer dollars responsibly, while holding ourselves accountable to earn your trust. This vision guides us daily as we serve our community and visitors.

The Fire District’s core VALUES include Professionalism, Integrity and Compassion. Our membership strives to meet these in every aspect of their service delivery and community outreach.

Eprepped – Survival Starts Here

At Eprepped, we believe that preparation is the key to peace of mind. Our mission is to equip individuals, families, and businesses with the tools and knowledge they need to stay safe in any emergency. From natural disasters to power outages, outdoor survival to everyday preparedness, Eprepped provides high-quality gear, expert resources, and practical solutions to help you stay one step ahead.

We specialize in emergency kits, survival gear, first aid essentials, and preparedness guides, ensuring that you have the right tools when it matters most. Whether you’re planning for an unforeseen crisis, gearing up for an outdoor adventure, or simply looking to protect your loved ones, Eprepped makes preparedness simple, effective, and accessible.

Because when disaster strikes, being ready isn’t an option—it’s a necessity.

Name: Helderberg Crime Watch
Description: Helderberg Community Policing is a registered Section 21 Company (operating without profit or financial gain) that trades as Helderberg Crime Watch (HCW). HCW's function is, through monthly public subscriptions and donations, to serve the community by providing pro-active patrols in participating wards to prevent criminal activities, thus making our streets and neighbourhoods safer. At the same time HCW provides contributors with the peace of mind that in the event of an incident or emergency, they can phone the control room for an Armed Response, 24/7 on 021 851 2100 ,Furthermore the funding is put towards a state of the art control room which is host to a fully integrated communication network which is in contact with SAPS, Law Enforcement, Traffic and all HELDERBERG SAFETY INITIATIVE (HSI) members (FIDELITY-ADT, AM SECURITY and VETUS SCHOLA) to provide patrol vehicles and patrol officers that operate under the Helderberg Crime Watch banner. These HCW patrol vehicles differ from the normal alarm response vehicles in that alarm response vehicles do not normally carry out pro-active patrolling. By forming this alliance with FIDELITY-ADT, AM SECURITY and VETUS SCHOLA HCW benefits from the HSI partners sophisticated patrol management infrastructure. The HCW control room also does camera monitoring for a number of estate complex clients as well as various block, street and neighbourhoods watches.

Description:
ICT Fire & Rescue Overview
Who We Are
ICT Fire & Rescue is a private emergency response training and rescue organization based in Kenya, dedicated to addressing the critical gaps in disaster preparedness and response. With a focus on saving lives, protecting livelihoods, and strengthening communities, ICT Fire & Rescue serves as a cornerstone for building resilience in a region prone to both natural and man-made disasters.

Our Mission
To empower individuals, communities, and institutions with lifesaving skills and resources while fostering a culture of preparedness and proactive disaster management.

Challenges We Address
Kenya’s disaster management landscape is marked by:

Inadequate firefighting equipment.
Limited access to trained personnel.
Poor community awareness and engagement in disaster response.
Traffic congestion and infrastructure challenges during emergencies.
Lack of toll-free emergency response lines.
ICT Fire & Rescue steps in to bridge these gaps by providing modern training programs, cutting-edge equipment, and effective coordination with local governments and communities.

Key Services

Emergency Response Training: Offering comprehensive training with modern equipment and certified instructors.
Disaster Awareness Campaigns: Educating the public about fire safety, disaster prevention, and response techniques.
Emergency Services: Rapid response teams equipped to handle fires, floods, and medical emergencies.
Partnerships: Collaborating with county governments, institutions, and organizations to strengthen localized disaster management systems.
Impact

Saving Lives: Training individuals to act swiftly and effectively in emergencies.
Reducing Property Damage: Quick and skilled response mitigates losses during disasters.
Building Resilience: Promoting a proactive approach to disaster preparedness within communities.
Supporting Food Security: Protecting Kenya’s agricultural heartland by reducing wildfire risks and enhancing disaster response mechanisms

Name: PackMap
Description:
PackMap is a system allowing people to find a nearby Bleed Control Pack, either as user at the scene such as a friend, member of staff or passer by; or at a remote location such as control room.
Ensuring we only provide up-to-date information is paramount - we understand sending a person to get help that doesn't exist can have extremely severe consequences.
To that end, we have developed a full Pack Management system called PackMan. In PackMan you can set up a Team and invite people so it's not just one person's job. A team can add venues, multiple packs, and Teams can even co-manage packs and venues.

What is a Bleed Pack/Bleed Control Kit?
A Bleed Control Kit is a pack, or a wall mounted cabinet, that contains the right apparatus & equipment inside to handle a catastrophic bleed in any situation, such as a knife wound, bleeding from the head, a car accident and so on.
In these situations, timing can be absolutely critical with it taking just 5 minutes to bleed out from a knife wound. Emergency services have a 7 minute target to arrive on scene.
Do you see the problem?
Bleed Control Kits aren't meant to be a replacement for a full ambulance or hospital, but a stop gap for an immediate fix while you wait for the emergency services to arrive. Ideally you will have some training, but a 999 operative can also assist you over the phone to use these kits in an emergency situation, and potentially save a life.
Our aim is to get as many venues signed up with at least 1 Bleed Control Kit so people are never more than a minute or two away from saving a life.

Description:
Kerkveiligheid adviseert en traint kerken op het gebied van veiligheid en hulpverlening. 

De kerk: het behoort een veilige plaats te zijn om samen te komen rondom Gods Woord. In de wereld om ons heen worden we telkens weer opgeschrikt door aanslagen. In openbare gebouwen, op straat, in kerken… Criminaliteit als fietsendiefstal tijdens een kerkdienst gaat kerken ook niet voorbij. Los van wat mensen elkaar aandoen, kunnen kerkgangers – of de voorganger – onwel worden. Of er ontstaat een stroomstoring, kortsluiting, etc.
Situaties die vragen om een doordacht plan en met een goede en realistische training. Kerkveiligheid heeft ruime ervaring in veiligheid en hulpverlening in kerken en daarbuiten. We komen graag met u in contact om te kijken wat we voor uw kerkelijke gemeente kunnen betekenen.

Enkele ervaringen van hulpverleners in een kerk: ‘Het oefenen in het kerkgebouw met realistische scenario's is heel fijn!’ en ‘De trainingen in de kerk helpen me persoonlijk om situaties op te frissen, maar het maakt ook ons team hechter. We weten meer wat we aan elkaar hebben’. 

Tevens verkoopt Kerkveiligheid tal van hulpverleningsmaterialen, zoals verbandkoffers, brandblussers, AED's, tourniquets, etc.

Name: THE DOMESTIC VIOLENCE SHELTER, INC
Description:
The Domestic Violence Shelter, Inc. is a private, nonprofit organization that opened its doors in 1978 as one of the first three domestic violence shelters in Ohio. The Shelter was founded by a group of concerned citizens who were moved to provide much needed assistance to victims of domestic violence who found themselves in danger and no options for safety. The program began in
an office downtown Mansfield with all volunteer staff. 

A few years later, a very generous community member donated a three story house. After several renovations, the house became a 4-bedroom shelter with administrative offices on the third floor.

In 1998, The Shelter with a grant from Richland County Foundation purchased its current facility. In 2007, The Shelter became a dual-focused program, also providing 24/7 advocacy and support to survivors of sexual assault who present in the emergency room at OhioHealth Mansfield and Avita.
In 2022, an annexed building was renovated to increase beds. Our current property has over 12,500 square feet with space to sleep 48 survivors. The Shelter has moved from providing primarily emergency shelter to becoming a full-service organization that provides a full range of services to survivors of domestic violence, dating violence, sexual assault, and stalking.

Name: Arrive Alive Charity
Description:
Arrive Alive is the UK’s only registered charity of its kind, founded by Debbie Roscoe, a mother driven by a lifesaving mission. The charity emerged from Debbie's deeply personal and challenging journey, as her youngest daughter, Ellie, has defied medical odds to survive a decade of health battles, including major life-changing bowel surgery in July 2024. During the darkest days spent in the hospital, Debbie sought a constructive outlet for her energy, leading her to establish Arrive Alive. Arrive Alive is dedicated to funding lifesaving, volunteer-operated 999 vehicles for Community First Responder groups affiliated with the West Midlands Ambulance Service.

Initially, Debbie aimed to fund just one vehicle as a gesture of gratitude for the exceptional care Ellie received. However, the demand proved to be far greater than anticipated, resulting in the launch of two vehicles. This marked the beginning of a journey that unveiled the widespread necessity for such support across various communities. Despite receiving no government funding and confronting the challenges posed by a global pandemic alongside her daughter's ongoing health struggles, Debbie has propelled Arrive Alive towards remarkable achievements. In less than seven years, the charity has successfully funded thirteen lifesaving, volunteer-operated 999 vehicles and essential equipment for communities throughout the Midlands, Warwickshire, and Worcestershire. The need for these resources continues to escalate, prompting ongoing fundraising efforts to provide even more lifesaving support for communities in need.

Arrive Alive relies solely on donations to ensure lives can be saved within communities. Every contribution made to Arrive Alive, regardless of its size, significantly impacts the charity's ability to fund vital lifesaving 999 voluntary support for every community member.

-	Communicate the CERCA activities to all stakeholders in land transport emergency response involving dangerous goods
-	Promote the advantages of membership and communicate to all carrier, manufacturers, industry associations and governments
-	CERCA identifies seven contractor regions throughout Canada: British Columbia, Alberta, Saskatchewan/Manitoba, Ontario, Quebec, the Maritimes, and Newfoundland. 

CERCA represents over 15+ contractor members nation wide. Our committee objectives are to:
-	Maintain standards for and conduct assessments of On-Scene Emergency Service Providers (ESP)

-	Communicate CERCA activities to all stakeholders in emergency response involving dangerous goods and non-dangerous goods
-	Promote the advantages of CERCA membership to carriers, manufacturers, distributors, industry associations and government agencies. 

For requirements on obtaining a CERCA Emergency Response Service Provider (ESP) membership, click here. 

For further information on membership rules, CERCA’s operations or the Code of Conduct, click here.

Name: The Center for Emergency Management Intelligence Research - CEMIR
Description:
The CEMIR was created to promote the concept of Emergency Management Intelligence, in ICS. We conduct research on EMINT, and publish through the following: 
- a hosted and monitored blog (for short pieces), 
- Medium and the Emergency Management Network (https://emnetwork.substack.com/s/the-cemir) - for opinions and public-facing material, 
- Trade Publications, Journals and Websites for substantive articles. 

We are also a Practitioner Tool.

Think of EMINT as a "super" category of Intelligence, above law-enforcement Intelligence and Investigation (I&I). Sources from many divergent entities and agencies needs to be curated (analyzed and distributed appropriately) centrally and within the construct of the Incident Command System for response and recovery missions. And the structure and staffing for this needs to be established and cultivated way before something bad happens. EMINT is full-cycle work, active in Preparedness/Protection/Prevention, Response, Recovery, and Mitigation.

Learn more at our website - https://cemir.org/

La missione comune è quella di operare in modo efficiente e coordinato, soprattutto grazie alla centrale operativa di proprietà, con lo scopo di garantire ai propri clienti assistenza stradale tempestiva ed efficace.

Etica nel servizio e passione per l'innovazione guidano l'impegno quotidiano nel conquistare fiducia e soddisfazione degli utenti e della filiera.

Name: Southeastern Specialty Vehicles
Description: Southeastern Specialty Vehicles is a company based out of 911 Martin Creek Rd, Henderson, North Carolina, United States. We specialize in custom emergency vehicles to fit your needs. We offer ambulances, fire apparatus, medical trailers, UTVs, and more!

Name: Grupo FASST S.C.A.
Description:
En Grupo FASST, con más de 8 años de experiencia, nos dedicamos a la formación y servicios de socorrismo en playas, piscinas, comunidades y hoteles. 
Miembros de la Asociación Andaluza de Salvamento y Socorrismo, ofrecemos recursos inmediatos y profesionales capacitados para garantizar la seguridad acuática.

Name: Rettung Oberengadin
Description:
24 Stunden für Sie im Einsatz – in 14 Gemeinden

Seit dem Jahr 2005 führt die Rettung Oberengadin (REO) bodengebundene Rettungseinsätze im Oberengadin durch. Zu ihrem Einsatzgebiet gehören 14 Gemeinden. 

Die REO besitzt zwei Stützpunkte. Einer davon befindet sich im Spital Oberengadin, dies ist gleichzeitig auch der Geschäftssitz. Der zweite Stützpunkt ist in St. Moritz bei der Klinik Gut. Bei einem Notruf alarmiert die Sanitätsnotrufzentrale jeweils den nächstbefindlichen verfügbaren Rettungswagen. 

Übrigens: In der Tourismusdestination Engadin St. Moritz variiert die Bevölkerungszahl je nach Saison zwischen 30'000 und 100'000 Personen. Die Rettung Oberengadin ist für diese Spitzenzeiten bestens vorbereitet.

Name: Victory EMS and Medical Transportation
Description:
Victory EMS offers Critical Care, Advance Life Support, Basic Life Support, and Non-Medical ambulance services. 

Victory specializes in both local and long-distance transports. We will help determine which mode of transport is the best and most affordable for your family member. And with all our services available, we can provide all available options from flight to ground to assure your family member arrives quickly and safely.

Victory can also provide staff and ambulances for such special events including sport competitions, rodeos, concerts, parades, and other large events.

Description: VESO, yollarda meydana gelebilecek arıza, kaza veya beklenmedik durumlar karşısında gerekli uzmanları ve sürücüleri bir araya getirerek, sürücülere hem maddi tasarruf hem de stres yönetimi sağlar.

Name: Syria ALGad Relief Foundation
Description:
Our main goal is to encourage skilled and self-reliant refugees’ and displaced communities in Egypt by enabling them and the disadvantage communities to meet their basic needs and support their access to decent living conditions through adequate services and projects. 

Specific goals 

	Providing Emergency Relief as a response to humanitarian crisis facing refugees and, or disadvantage communities with a more focus in certain categories such as orphans, persons with special needs, single-parent, and female-headed households.

	Designing a set of projects that can; 1) promote access to educational, health and social services, and 2) improving access to specialized services to satisfy the development of individuals.

	Focusing on promoting livelihood projects that will increase income opportunities to encourage 1) macro and small business activities; and 2) women, youth, and persons with disabilities’ participation in the host community.

	Effectively activate a referral system that facilitate between our beneficiaries and the set of available services offered by our foundation as well as by other local and international organizations responding to their specific needs in the most appropriate intervention.

Name: Bataillon des Sapeurs-Pompiers Broye
Description:
L'ensemble des sapeurs-pompiers de la Broye fribourgeoise est réuni en une seule entité qui est dirigée par l'ADIS-Broye (Association des Communes pour l'organisation et la gestion de la défense incendie et les secours du district de la Broye)

La bataillon des Sapeurs-Pompiers de la Broye (BSPB) a vu le jour le 1er janvier 2023 avec l'entrée en vigueur de la Loi sur la défense incendie et les secours (LDIS).

Name: 24/7 Rapid Response
Description:
247 Rapid Response is a professional and reliable emergency property solution company that specializes in providing fast and efficient services to customers in need. Our company is dedicated to helping homeowners and business owners with a wide range of property-related emergencies, including plumbing, heating and security issues.
At 247 Rapid Response, we understand that property emergencies can happen at any time, which is why we offer 24/7 availability. Our team of highly trained and experienced technicians are ready to respond to your call at any time of the day or night, so you can rest assured that help is just a phone call away.
One of our main services is plumbing emergency. We offer a wide range of plumbing services, including leak repairs, burst pipe repairs, blocked drain clearance, and boiler repairs. Our technicians are equipped with the latest tools and technology to quickly diagnose and repair any plumbing emergency.

Name: IECM Dubai
Description:
Now on its 16th edition, IECM is set to be held on 29 April - 01 May 2025 at the Dubai World Trade Centre.

The International Emergency and Catastrophe Management (IECM), under the patronage of H.H. Sheikh Mohammed Bin Rashid Al Maktoum, Vice-President and Prime Minister of the United Arab Emirates and Ruler of Dubai, provides a platform for the emergency, disaster management and search & rescue community to showcase their equipment, technology and services during emergencies to a relevant audience. The event will host a diverse range of product, solutions and innovations during an emergency situation. 

IECM brings together key decision-makers from the government, emergency response professionals, aid agencies, search and rescue teams, NGOs, media and the private sector. The event will also have “Info Talks” wherein a series of workshops and programmes will be discussed with visitors to improve their skills in the sector.

Name: Maine Emergency Management Agency (MEMA)
Description:
The Maine Emergency Management Agency (MEMA) is a bureau of the Department of Defense, Veterans and Emergency Management.

At the State level MEMA coordinates the mitigation (risk reduction) preparedness, response and recovery from emergencies and disasters such as floods, hurricanes, earthquakes or hazardous materials spills.

Name: SIPEM SoS Federazione Società italiana di Psicologia dell'Emergenza Social Support
Description: La Società Italiana di Psicologia dell’Emergenza Social Support Federazione (abbreviato in SIPEM SoS Federazione) è un associazione di volontari che opera in situazione di micro e maxi emergenze sul territorio italiano dedicandosi alla prevenzione e alla cura delle vittime di forti traumi e a rischio di patologie psicologiche.

Name: Victoria Hygiene
Description:
We have been known to offer the highest quality of leak detection, mould removal & flood restoration services in Melbourne.

We are recognized by various organizations for our excellent performance and decent pricing. We offer comprehensive leak detection and flood restoration services. Due to the urgency in case of a water leak, mould growth or a flooding event; our team of highly experienced IICRC Certified Technicians responds immediately to your call and tries to be there at the site within 45 minutes.

With the use of world-class hygiene equipment & products, our team will provide you the precise reports and the finest results.

Name: Florida State Animal Response Coalition, Inc (FLSARC)
Description: Florida State Animal Response Coalition, Inc (FLSARC) is now a division of SPCA Florida, a 501 (c) 3 organization, as of September 2021.  Florida SARC's mission includes assisting the Florida Division of Emergency Management and the ESF-17 network with the rescue, care, and reunification of companion animals during natural and manmade disasters. In addition, we support local shelters with emergencies, deploy responders in partnership with such organizations as the ASPCA and Humane Society, and conduct training in Florida and other partnering states. We are the only division in the U.S. credentialed to teach the FEMA approved Level 1 Awareness and Level 2 Operations sheltering courses.

Name: Blacksmiths
Description:
Blacksmiths provides highly immersive and tailored training solutions to high risk industries, law enforcement and military teams.  Founded on hard won experience in military Special Operations Forces and Prehospital Special Operations.

Specialising in training solutions for:
- Emergency Response Teams
- Teams working in remote environments
- Aquatic and surf first response
- Law enforcement
- Military teams

Blacksmiths can provide bespoke training onsite, and have a 3rd party RTO partnership with Allens if accredited first aid competencies are required.

Nationally accredited training and assessment delivered on behalf of Allens Training Pty Ltd RTO 90909

info@blacksmiths.net.au

Name: Stichting Queer Mind
Description:
ONZE MISSIE
Dak en thuisloosheid is percentueel hoog onder LHBTI’ers, ook krijgen zij in hogere mate te maken met geweld. 
Dit willen wij bespreekbaar maken en bestrijden! 
Dat gaan wij doen door vreedzaam actievoeren, het aangaan van dialogen en het bieden van ondersteuning aan LHBTI’ers die op straat (dreigen te) belanden. 

Wij zetten ons in op zelfredzaamheid en op volwaardige deelname voor iedereen binnen de Nederlandse samenleving.

Name: S.O.S Contingencias
Description: SOS CONTINGENCIAS SAS, es una organización constituida en el año 2007, dirigida a atender sectores productivos, industriales, comerciales y de transporte del país.

Name: EMPOWERED RECOVERY SOLUTIONS
Description: AT EMPOWERED RECOVERY SOLUTIONS WE SPECIALIZE IN DISASTER RECOVERY CASE MANAGEMENT FOR FEMA AND CDBG-DR PROGRAMS. WE ARE DEDICATED TO PROVIDING COMPASSIONATE, PERSONALIZED RECOVERY PLANS THAT SUPPORT INDIVIDUALS AND COMMUNITIES IN REBUILDING THEIR LIVES WITH EMPATHY WHILE FOCUSING ON PRACTICAL SOLUTIONS.

Name: Rennecke-Medic
Description:
Rennecke-Medic steht an der Schnittstelle von medizinischer Versorgung und Notfallprävention. Als modernes Unternehmen bieten wir ein breites Spektrum an Dienstleistungen und Produkten, die speziell auf die Bedürfnisse von medizinischen Einrichtungen, Betrieben und Privatpersonen zugeschnitten sind. Unser Portfolio umfasst nicht nur den Verkauf von über 25.000 Medizinprodukten, sondern auch maßgeschneiderte Erste-Hilfe-Kurse und spezialisierte Notfalltrainings.

Wir sind besonders stolz auf unser fortschrittliches Bestellsystem, das medizinischen Einrichtungen ermöglicht, ihren Sprechstundenbedarf effizient und unkompliziert direkt über unsere Plattform zu verwalten. Dieses System bietet individuelle Preise und erleichtert die Erstellung von Bestelllisten, wodurch eine optimale Versorgung gewährleistet wird.

Neben der Bereitstellung medizinischer Produkte sind wir auch eine zertifizierte Erste-Hilfe-Schule nach DGUV-Richtlinien. Unser Bildungsangebot reicht von Basis-Erste-Hilfe-Kursen für Führerscheinanwärter über betriebsspezifische Notfalltrainings bis hin zu spezialisierten Kursen für medizinische Fachkräfte. Dabei legen wir großen Wert darauf, unsere Kurse praxisnah und teilnehmerorientiert zu gestalten, um so die notfallmedizinischen Kompetenzen unserer Teilnehmer optimal zu fördern.

Für Betriebe bieten wir nicht nur Trainings zur Ersthelferausbildung, sondern auch alles Nötige für den betrieblichen Arbeitsschutz, von Erste-Hilfe-Kästen bis zu Augenspülungen. Bildungseinrichtungen unterstützen wir mit speziellen Erste-Hilfe-Angeboten für Kinder, die spielerisch wichtige Fähigkeiten vermitteln und das Bewusstsein für Sicherheit und Hilfe in Notfällen stärken.

Mit Rennecke-Medic entscheiden Sie sich für einen Partner, der Sicherheit und medizinische Versorgung auf innovative Weise fördert und weiterentwickelt. Entdecken Sie, wie wir Sie unterstützen können auf www.rennecke-medic.de.

Name: Clackamas 911
Description: We provide 911 call-taking and emergency dispatch services for 6 law enforcement agencies and 9 fire districts within Clackamas County, Oregon. We answer approximately 1,000 calls per day.

Name: New York State Weather Risk Communication Center
Description:
The State Weather Risk Communication Center (SWRCC) is a first-of-its-kind partnership between the University at Albany and New York State Division of Homeland Security and Emergency Services that leverages UAlbany’s expertise in atmospheric sciences to help state and local emergency managers prepare for and respond to severe weather.

Funded by New York State, SWRCC meteorologists will provide rapid, tailored, real-time weather information to state agencies, emergency managers, and other critical stakeholders before, during and after severe weather events. Social scientists will develop improved communication strategies while computer scientists build and maintain cutting edge weather products.

The SWRCC is located at ETEC, utilizing the research and expertise already occurring inside the building, along with its best-in-class weather-related tools, including the xCITE laboratory, a data and visual analytics center, and the New York State Mesonet, a statewide weather network operated by UAlbany. Since its launch, the Mesonet has been widely used by public and private partners to improve weather-based decision-making. 

The center will help increase public safety, optimize weather spending and help New Yorkers better understand the impacts of climate change on our weather, our safety and our economy.

Name: FEDECMU
Description:
Fédération des Collèges de Médecine d'Urgence 

L'association a pour objet de favoriser la promotion, la reconnaissance des Collèges de Médecine d'Urgence. Elle fait le lien entre ces mêmes Collèges  et notre société savante (SFMU).

Name: AGJ-Fachverband für Prävention und Rehabilitation in der Erzdiözese Freiburg e.V.
Description:
Der AGJ-Fachverband für Prävention und Rehabilitation in der Erzdiözese Freiburg e.V. ist ein Verband der Caritas mit den Arbeitsfeldern Suchthilfe, Wohnungsnotfallhilfe, Beschäftigungsförderung, Kinder- und Jugendschutz sowie Angebote der Fort- und Weiterbildung. 

In unseren Einrichtungen beraten, therapieren und unterstützen wir Menschen in schwierigen Lebenslagen. Wir arbeiten ganzheitlich von der Prävention über Beratung und Behandlung bis zur Nachsorge.

Zum AGJ Verband gehören zwölf Suchtberatungsstellen, drei Fachkliniken, eine Tagesklinik und ein Integrationszentrum zur Suchtrehabilitation, stationäre und ambulante Einrichtungen der Wohnungsnotfallhilfe an sechzehn Standorten sowie sechs Angebote zur Beschäftigungsförderung.

Im Bereich Kinder- und Jugendschutz unterstützen wir Fachkräfte mit Fortbildungsangeboten zu vielen aktuellen Themen wie (Cyber-)Mobbing, Gewaltprävention.

Name: Exact Construction and Restoration, LLC
Description: Exact Construction and Restoration exists to serve the community. We are on a mission to restore homes, properties, and confidence in our customers throughout the great state of Arizona. Never wavering when it comes to delivering a quality product with unappareled communication, integrity, and transparency.

Description: PuroClean Restoration Halifax is a locally-owned, woman-led, sustainability-focused emergency property restoration company redefining what service looks like in our industry. With strong documentation, aligned KPIs, and proactive communication, we support property owners and our industry partners—delivering efficiency without ever compromising care.

Name: Effects of Oil on Wildlife Conference
Description: The Effects of Oil on Wildlife (EOW) conference is the only global meeting venue focusing on the planning, response, rehabilitation, and research aspects of oil spills and their impacts to wildlife species. Since the inaugural meeting in 1982, interest in oiled wildlife response has increased exponentially, as have the resources dedicated to preparedness, research and damage mitigation. This conference is the primary venue for experts in a variety of specialties from around the world to exchange ideas and information to increase our ability to protect and restore wildlife at risk.

Name: URBE Emergencias
Description: URBE Emergencias es una asociación aragonesa sin ánimo de lucro fundada en 2021 y centrada en la búsqueda y rescate de personas desaparecidas, así como llevar a cabo actividades preventivas en eventos privados o públicos, apoyo en emergencias ordinarias o extraordinarias y promover actividades benéficas para los más desfavorecidos.

Name: Savepoint Response
Description:
Savepoint is a rising emergency response innovation company with a mission to achieve zero preventable traumatic fatalities by 2032. 

We will achieve this by increasing the number of responders and reducing the response times of responders in half.

Savepoint will increase the quantity of qualified responders by offering access to training and supplies while applying current technologies to reduce response times in impoverished, dense metropolitan and rural neighborhoods.

We are revolutionizing pre-hospital care.

Since our founding in 2001, we’ve made it our mission to serve our local community in a way that shows care, consistency, and exceptional communication.

Name: Dynamic International
Description:
Dynamic  International was formed to fill an identified gap in the market providing a fully integrated Emergency Management and Emergency Response company led by experienced and globally recognized professionals for all industries, organizations, and governments.

The gap was identified by our founders who have many years of industry experience and unique backgrounds within the realm of Emergency Management and Emergency Response and the overall flow and availability of services.

DER's focus and vision is to fill these gaps by delivering a fully in-house resourced professional service with staff that have a vast history of hands-on and technical expertise who can identify and mitigate risks present during high hazard operations and state of the art equipment to manage major events.

DER's highly experienced specialists are qualified and experienced in emergency preparedness, management, response, and recovery activities. We are positioned in strategic locations throughout the world and pride ourselves on offering innovative solutions and systems for any major emergency or high impact hazards that will occur.

It is from this unique experience we can pass on to our customers’ lessons learned from other industry incidents that we have assisted in resolving and ensure these lessons learnt do not reoccur.

Name: ShepherdView

Name: ŞÎLÊR – Crisis Response
Description:
ŞÎLÊR – Crisis Response (SCR) is a dedicated non-governmental organization based in North and East Syria, committed to providing vital health services and building community resilience in crisis-affected areas. Our mission is to deliver high-quality, accessible healthcare and support initiatives that foster sustainable development and empowerment. Guided by principles of transparency, collaboration, and innovation, SCR partners with international donors and local communities to create lasting impact. Join us in our journey to bring hope and health to those who need it most.
With a passionate team of dedicated professionals, we work tirelessly to address the urgent needs of those affected by crises. Our focus extends beyond immediate response to encompass long-term solutions that foster resilience and facilitate recovery. By combining our expertise with local knowledge and resources, we strive to create lasting change and promote self-sufficiency.

Our multifaceted approach aims to meet the diverse needs of individuals and communities in crisis. We believe in collaboration, actively partnering with local organizations, authorities, and international stakeholders to maximize our impact and reach.

Join us in our mission to build a brighter future for North and East Syria. Together, we can overcome challenges, restore hope, and empower communities to thrive once again.

Name: LifeAid Pty Ltd
Description:
We operate as an embedded safety layer within incident management teams, supporting firefighters, field crews, and high-risk operations in dynamic environments.

Our teams combine frontline clinical expertise (paramedics and nurses) with deep fireground awareness, extraction readiness, and continuous situational risk assessment.

LifeAid supports:

bushfire and emergency incident deployments

remote and industrial worksites

training and clinical governance systems

operational medical planning and response

Fireline medicine is not stationary. It is mobile, integrated, and built for the field.

Name: BonaResponds
Description:
Open to all.   Most of our volunteers are St. Bonaventure University students. 

BonaResponds aims to help make things better. We may not make it perfect but we can make it better! Whether the help is "just" being there immediately after a disaster to listen to survivors or if it means hauling trees, gutting houses, and picking up debris. Or maybe helping means painting, landscaping, or even roofing. The goal is to make the world a little better.

Name: Friends of the Poor and Catherine McAuley Center
Description: Friends of the Poor and Catherine McAuley Center assists vulnerable individuals and families with housing, basic needs, and pathways to stability. We aim to alleviate the impacts of poverty while fostering dignity and self-sufficiency through direct service, community building, and advocacy.

Name: UNIDOS - Rede Nacional de Redução de Danos
Description: Somos uma Organização que trabalha na Redução de danos às Pessoas que usam drogas.

Name: SOS MEDIC
Description:
SOS MÉDIC est un service de bouton d'appel à l'aide et d'urgence médical qui vous permet d’avoir de l’assistance rapidement en cas de situations d’urgences ou de détresse.

Appuyez tout simplement sur votre service de bouton d'appel à l'aide et d'urgence médical que vous portez sur un bracelet ou un pendentif et un signal d’urgence sera rapidement envoyé au centre de télésurveillance SOS MÉDIC.

Selon la situation, un membre de votre entourage et/ou les services d’urgence seront avisés rapidement afin de vous porter secours.

Avec SOS MÉDIC vous êtes en sécurité!

Name: EMS Administrators’ Association of California (EMSAAC)
Description: EMS Administrators’ Association of California (EMSAAC) was formed in 1992 to act in an advisory capacity to the California EMS Authority and the State Commission on EMS. EMSAAC comprises the directors of all 34 LEMSAs in the state and represents all 58 counties. Our mission is to establish goals, priorities, standards, and quality assurance for Emergency Medical Services Systems.

Name: Green Emergency Management Services (GEMS)
Description: Green Emergency Management Services (GEMS) is a dynamic consultancy and media platform that bridges the gap between emergency management, technology, and public-private collaboration. Led by Matt Green, an experienced emergency manager, educator, and podcast host, GEMS offers a suite of services designed to empower organizations before, during, and after disasters.

Name: Kids' Flight
Description:
Kids Flight, a Non-Profit Company (NPC), was launched by Henley Air and ROCKET on the 22nd April 2023, with the unveiling of their newly branded Kids Flight Bell230 air ambulance. The helicopter is envisioned as a 'flying symbol of hope' for the many disadvantaged and underprivileged children in our country who are unable to afford such critical time-sensitive medical care.

Corporate Social Investment (CSI) is sought by partnering with corporate South Africa in order to provide hope for those who would otherwise be hopeless. We call on Corporate SA to help us make a difference in the most precious gift of all – Life.

Name: Clay County, WV CERT
Description:
Clay County CERT's mission is doing the greatest good for the greatest number: before, during, and after a disaster.
Our mission is accomplished by providing a whole community effort to plan, prepare, respond, recover, and mitigate disasters while easing the associated impacts on area residents and first responders. Clay County CERT will utilize and serve a diverse and inclusive group of partners, volunteers, and leaders while ensuring service across all sectors of our community.
Approaching disasters in a way that calls for the support of volunteers, Clay County CERT strives to leave a lasting impact on the past, present, and future of disaster coordination in the communities we serve.

Clay County CERT's core values of reliability, efficiency, commitment, honesty, transparency, and respect serve as the solid foundation of what our organization, volunteers, and leadership stand for and believe make a resource our community members can rely on in times of despair. The people of our community who make up Clay County CERT will use, apply, and uphold these values in all interactions with survivors, peers, and partners.

Clay County CERT is an organization sponsored by Clay Volunteer Fire Department, comprising four divisions with subsequent offices, centers, bureaus, and teams. Each division has a coordinator with an organized reporting chain that is headed by the directors of Clay County CERT who report to the State Coordinator who is employed by, VolunteerWV, the state commission on volunteerism.

Name: West Cornwall Search & Rescue Team
Description:
West Cornwall Search and Rescue Team (WCSAR) operates a voluntary search and rescue capability across the far southwest of mainland Britain. The team's unpaid volunteers are available 24/7, 365 days a year to support the emergency services to search for lost, missing and injured people. 

Funded entirely by donations, the team maintains a core membership of 40 highly-trained volunteers from all walks of life, a rescue base in the centre of the region, a fully-equipped incident control vehicle and an off-road ambulance. 

WCSAR is a member of Mountain Rescue England and Wales, the umbrella organisation that coordinates the provision of inland search and rescue as part of the UKSAR framework. Within MREW, the team works alongside it's partner teams within the PenMaCRA (Peninsula Mountain and Cave Rescue Association) region.

Name: Departamentul pentru Situații de Urgență
Description: Departamentul pentru Situații de Urgență este instituția care coordonează serviciile de urgență în România
Location: Piața Revoluției, nr. 1 A, Sector 1, București

Name: Bridgelink
Description: Bridgelink verbindt ambitieuze nieuwkomers met vooruitstrevende werkgevers om een inclusieve arbeidsmarkt te creëren. We zijn toegewijd aan diversiteit, gelijke kansen, en het bouwen van een duurzame toekomst waar ieders talent wordt gewaardeerd

Name: Oceanside Restoration Inc
Description: Our mission is to deliver quick and superior disaster restoration services in times of emergency. We protect, preserve and restore order. That’s the Oceanside way! We offer property owners peace of mind that the job will be done quickly and professionally. We provide insurers with the assurance of quality and consistent service so they can confidently recommend us. We help our employees become the best in the industry. We use local contractors and service providers to support local businesses and well as our own. Oceanside brings your house back to home.

Name: Victory Medical Flights
Description:
Victory Medical Flights is an air medical transport and ambulance company that provides critical care, advanced life support, and basic life support for patients. We partner with companies around the United States to get preferred pricing for trips that are out of our service area. 

Our team also offers both commercial and private companion flights for clients who are wheelchair or stretcher-bound but do not have extensive medical needs.

Victory Medical Flights does all the coordination of the transport and a staff member will accompany your family member. We coordinate the ground transport for both sending and receiving locations, airline tickets, and any transport for other family members riding with the patient. Our staff are trained in first aid/CPR and will be able to help assist your family member in and out of the plane and vehicles.

Name: DRK Kreisverband Emmendingen e.V.
Description: Integrierte Leitstelle, Notfall- und Rettungsdienst, Bereitschaften, Bevölkerungsschutz, Soziale Dienste, Dienste für Senioren, Inklusionsangebote, Migrationsdienste, Erste Hilfe, Kinder Jugend und Familie

Name: Identité Médicale : carte TEK
Description:
Carte TEK : Votre santé, entre vos mains, partout et à tout moment.

La Carte TEK, c’est bien plus qu’une simple carte : c’est une véritable carte d’identité médicale et d’urgence qui vous accompagne où que vous alliez et parle pour vous quand vous ne pouvez pas le faire.
 Qu’est-ce que la Carte TEK ?
Une plateforme innovante qui permet à chacun d’avoir un accès facile et sécurisé à ses informations médicales essentielles :
•	Antécédents médicaux
•	Allergies
•	Traitements en cours
•	Contacts d’urgence
•	Informations critiques en cas d’accident
•	Contact d’urgence
•	Groupe sanguin 

 Comment ça fonctionne ?
Les informations sont saisies directement par le porteur de la carte via notre interface qui est intuitive et sécurisée. Vous êtes le seul maître de vos données, et elles sont disponibles en un clic, au scan, à tout moment.

 Pourquoi tout le monde devrait avoir une Carte TEK ?

1 Un outil vital en situation d’urgence : Elle permet aux professionnels de santé d’intervenir rapidement avec des données fiables, même si vous ne pouvez pas communiquer.
2 Une meilleure coordination des soins : Votre dossier vous suit partout, éliminant les répétitions et les pertes d’informations.
3 Pour tout le monde, à tout moment :
•	Pour les enfants : En cas de sortie scolaire, les enseignants peuvent accéder aux allergies ou traitements nécessaires.
•	Pour les personnes âgées : Les aidants et soignants ont à disposition des informations fiables et actualisées.
•	Pour les voyageurs : Une tranquillité d'esprit où que vous soyez dans le monde.

4 Autonomie et sécurité :
Vous êtes responsable de vos données. C’est un outil fait pour vous, par vous, avec la garantie de la confidentialité.

 Avec la Carte TEK, chacun devient acteur de sa santé. Une solution simple, pratique et essentielle pour une société plus prévoyante et mieux préparée.
 Et vous, êtes-vous prêt à adopter une santé connectée et accessible ?
 Et vous, êtes-vous prêt à être secouru efficacement ?

Name: T.A.C.T. PWC
Description:
T.A.C.T PWC was founded by Reggie and Anikka Jackson. They have lived in the Prince William County area for over 20 years. Before starting T.A.C.T, Reggie and Anikka gained extensive experience in the medical field, higher education, and the insurance industry. T.A.C.T is all about serving the community and being there when needed the most.

At T.A.C.T we use proprietary chemicals and the top quality training to be the most reliable biohazard and hoarding clean up company in the industry.

No matter how big or small the project is, T.A.C.T is available 24/7 to help you in your time of need. We specialize in biohazard and hoarding clean up, however we are ready to help with many other jobs. If you are not sure who to call, it’s probably T.A.C.T.

Name: Cambridgeshire Police Federation
Description:
Welcome to Cambridgeshire Police Federation

As your Federation representatives it is our jobs to supply support to officers that are in need of our help. 

We take on a multitude of different roles including administration, support and more.

You can also follow us Facebook 

https://facebook.com/CambridgeshirePoliceFederation

Name: U.S. Volunteers - US Army Volunteer Reserve - 51st BCT
Description:
The US Volunteers are a volunteer uniformed service that is authorized, through the DOD'S Approved Partner Provider, to assist in Military Funeral Honors.

Additionally, through MOUs, we augment Federal, State, and local Emergency Management Agencies in ICS / NIMS Operations.

Name: Medevac Frontline
Description: Medevac Frontline is a charity that saves lives from very challenging and hostile environments overseas. We do this by contracting and deploying highly trained NHS Paramedic volunteers from the 21 Air Ambulance Services (the NHS’s specialist Helicopter Emergency Medical Service or HEMS), the NHS Ambulance Trusts' ten Hazardous Area Response Team (HART) units and the nine Winch Paramedic units from around the UK.

Name: Stichting Relief Effort Ukraine
Description: Relief Effort Ukraine is opgericht met als doel het verlichten van het leed van de Oekraïense bevolking. Dit doen wij door middel van het leveren van hulpgoederen op plaatsen waar ze het meest nodig zijn. Via onze contacten in Oekraïne vernemen wij welke goederen op welke specifieke locatie het hardst nodig zijn. Om dit te bewerkstelligen zullen we geld inzamelen, de benodigde goederen aankopen en deze persoonlijk naar de gewenste locatie brengen.

Name: MAGEN - Urban Emergency Management  | Global Search & Rescue
Description: Our expertise empowers individuals and organizations with the critical skills and knowledge needed to respond effectively in times of urban destruction and emergency, ensuring the safety and well-being of communities worldwide. Explore the world with confidence with our top-tier search and rescue services, reaffirming our commitment to protecting lives everywhere

Name: Brandweerzone Vlaams-Brabant WEST
Description:
750 collega’s, 9 brandweerposten, 31 steden en gemeenten 

Zo’n 355 beroepskrachten en 269 vrijwilligers staan dagelijks in voor de bescherming van onze zone. Vanuit de posten in Asse, Dilbeek, Halle, Lennik, Londerzeel, Opwijk, Tollembeek, Vilvoorde en Zaventem wordt er jaarlijks voor zo’n 40.000 oproepen voor onder andere brand en dringende geneeskundige hulp uitgerukt. En daarvoor is natuurlijk ook de hulp achter de schermen nodig. Hiervoor kunnen we rekenen op zo’n 70 administratieve en technische collega’s, die voornamelijk werken vanuit het Zonehuis in Liedekerke - het administratief en logistiek centrum - en de Provinciale Dispatching in Asse.

Name: İlk Umut Derneği
Description: İlk Umut Derneği “İnsanların size nasıl davranmasını istiyorsanız, siz de onlara öyle davranın.” önermesini kendisine ilke edinerek çalışmalarına 2015 yılında başladı. Türkiye’de faaliyet gösteren bir Sivil Toplum Kuruluşu olan İlk Umut Derneği, tüm dünya insanları için eşit ve özgürlükçü, hak ve hürriyetleri koruyucu bir düşünce yapısı ile kalıcı bir dayanışma ve yardımlaşma bağı kurma yolunda tutku ile yürüyor.

Name: Christoph 17
Description:
Wir fliegen Luftrettung für’s Allgäu: im Oberallgäu, Ostallgäu, West- und Unterallgäu. Dieser 50 km-Radius erweitert sich bei Bedarf regelmäßig von Oberschwaben bis Murnau.

Unser Einsatzspektrum reicht von der Primärrettung bei chirurgischen oder internistischen Notfällen, über Verkehrsunfälle, Notfallverlegungen, Sucheinsätze bis zur Wasser- und natürlich Bergrettung.
Für letztere arbeiten wir seit Mai 2021 mit einer Rettungswinde. Diese löst das bis dato eingesetzte Bergetau ab. Die Winde ermöglicht uns ein deutlich höheres Maß an Flexibilität speziell im alpinen Gelände.

Name: Bombeiros de Camarate
Description: A Associação Humanitária de Bombeiros de Camarate é constituída por um combinado de funcionários e voluntários, desde a classe de Infantes, de idade inferior a 18 anos, ao seu Quadro Ativo, constituído por mulheres e homens de todas as idades, que prestam o seu auxílio quotidiano á população residente em território nacional, especialmente, à Freguesia da sua Sede, Camarate.

Name: Bowland Pennine Mountain Rescue Team
Description: We are a charity-funded volunteer rescue team, part of the Mid Pennine Search and Rescue Organisation, and operating to standards set by Mountain Rescue England & Wales. providing search and rescue services in support of Lancashire Constabulary and North West Ambulance Service.

Name: RNLI Portsmouth Lifeboat Station
Description: Portsmouth Lifeboat Station has been providing search and rescue for the eastern Solent since 1965. The crews have won four medals for gallantry and currently operate two inshore lifeboats.

Name: Stichting Hulp Irak
Description:
We zijn een werkgroep die zich inzet voor onze medemens in Irak. Of het nu gaat om Christenen, Moslims of Yezidi's, ze hebben allemaal onze hulp nodig. 
De oorlog is voorbij, maar de nood is ongekend hoog en de situatie is voor velen uitzichtloos. Ze kunnen en durven niet naar huis. Er leven nog ruim 600.000 vluchtelingen in 35 vluchtelingenkampen in Koerdistan.

Ons werk gaat de komende periode veranderen. We werken samen met het deputaatschap Bijzonder Noden en de hulptransporten vallen onder noodhulp. Richtlijn voor noodhulp is 5 jaar, en dan richten op wederopbouw. Voor ons is die tijd nu ook aangebroken om ons na 10 jaar noodhulp te richten op wederopbouw. 

We zijn op dit moment met een traject bezig om samen met Bijzondere Noden te onderzoeken welke projecten we financieel kunnen steunen om toch de mensen te bereiken die we graag willen bereiken. Financiële steun is meer dan ooit belangrijk om ons werk te kunnen blijven doen.

Name: Global Alliance for Disaster Resource Acceleration (GADRA)
Description: GADRA is a rapidly growing and leading-edge approach built on a solid foundation of agencies committed to equity in disasters for disability-led organizations. It is an innovative collaboration to increase the resources available to disability-led organizations before, during, and after disasters.

Name: ALL TERRAIN FIRE SUPPORT INC.
Description: ALL TERRAIN WATER CORP. is a Service Disabled Veteran Owned Small Business (SDVOSB) and Disabled Veteran Business Enterprise (DVBE) that offers firefighting services and products to the Federal Government and Commercial entities. Specializing in private sector firefighting solutions to include firefighting foam and AFFF replacement strategies throughout the industry.

Name: Follow Up Technical Access
Description:
Siamo un team specializzato nel soccorso e recupero in ambienti confinati, in quota e nei cantieri.
Operiamo in contesti ad alto rischio offrendo assistenza tecnica, supporto alla sicurezza nei cantieri e interventi di emergenza.

Siamo un Rescue Team altamente qualificato, addestrato per intervenire rapidamente e in modo sicuro in contesti complessi per proteggere le persone anche nelle situazioni più critiche: tunnel, silos, serbatoi, impianti industriali e aree di difficile accesso.


I NOSTRI SERVIZI:
• ASSISTENZA IN CANTIERE: supporto alla sicurezza operativa in ogni fase del lavoro.

• RESCUE TEAM: squadra di soccorso e recupero industriale pronta ad intervenire in situazioni di emergenza.

• LAVORI IN QUOTA: interventi in altezza con tecniche su fune e massima sicurezza.

• LAVORI IN AMBIENTI CONFINATI: operiamo in spazi ristretti con procedure e attrezzature specializzate, in modo sicuro ed efficiente.

Name: Restoration Services Hawaii
Description: We are a team of enthusiastic restoration specialists committed to restoring, securing, and recovering your home or business after disaster strikes. RestHI is licensed to perform demolition, modifications, repairs, renovation, and complete rebuilds in the State of Hawaii. Our services include Water Damage, Fire Damage, Mold Remediation, Reconstruction Services, Cleaning Services, and Matterport Digital Capturing.

Name: Spanish School Rescue and Detection with Dogs
Description: As a school we develop specific training courses. In addition we are always, ready to take action in search and rescue interventions. We are involved in European Research and Innovation projects and provide consulting services for other organizations

Name: Stichting Herstel
Description:
Een kleine financiële bijdrage maakt soms een groot verschil!
Mensen in crisissituaties krijgen op vele manieren hulp. Maar soms is er ook gewoon wat financiële steun nodig. En dan biedt de Stichting Herstel uitkomst. Met een gift of met hulp in natura. Bijvoorbeeld om de borg voor een flat te betalen. Of om een pak te kopen om in te solliciteren. Of om een cursus te kunnen volgen die de kansen op de arbeidsmarkt vergroot. Op deze manier helpen wij mensen sneller terug te keren in de maatschappij.

Wie helpen wij?
Stichting Herstel is er voor inwoners van de Stedendriehoek Apeldoorn, Deventer, Zutphen van 16 jaar en ouder die in een crisissituatie zijn beland. Zij krijgen al hulp van diverse instanties en zijn goed op weg om hun leven weer op te pakken. Het enige wat nog ontbreekt is wat praktische hulp die hen net dat laatste zetje kan geven. Die hulp bieden wij.

Name: The Frew Group
Description:
The Frew Group emergency management consulting firm focuses on: Human-Centered Disaster Planning. Cultural Competency. Communications

You carry responsibility for the health and safety of the lives of your whole community. We help you fulfill your public safety mission and commitment to culturally competent emergency management so no one is left behind.

The Frew Group is a federal and state Certified Women-Owned Business.

Name: SAR Sweden
Description: SAR Sweden är en ideell organisation vars främsta uppgift är att bistå Polismyndigheten vid efterforskning av försvunna personer. Vi har särskild utbildning för att kunna delta vid denna typ av räddningsinsatser, där det ofta handlar om att rädda liv.

Name: Atek Korunma Kurtarma Teknik Emniyet A.Ş.
Description: 2014 Yılında kurulan ATEK Korunma Kurtarma Teknik Emniyet ve Arama San.Tic. A.Ş. Arama – Kurtarma, KBRN, Teknik Emniyet ve Yangınla Mücadele konularında uzman ve deneyimli kadrosu ile, özel sektör ve kamu kurumlarının ihtiyacı olan ekipman tedariki, eğitim ve danışmanlık hizmetlerini yürütmektedir.

Name: Emergent Global Solutions
Description:
At Emergent Global Solutions, we specialize in Full Spectrum Crisis and Emergency Management, providing comprehensive solutions to ensure safety and resilience in challenging situations. Our key services include:

    Crisis Communications: Develop effective communication strategies to navigate through crises with clarity and confidence.
    Security and Cybersecurity: Implement robust security measures to protect against physical and digital threats.
    Government-Private Sector Navigation: Facilitate collaboration between government agencies and private entities to address complex challenges.
    Risk and Vulnerability Assessment: Identify potential risks and vulnerabilities to enhance preparedness and response strategies.
    Disaster Planning and Recovery: Design and execute plans for disaster preparedness, response, and recovery to safeguard communities.
    Community Rebuilding: Support long-term recovery efforts to rebuild and strengthen communities after a disaster.

Our mission is to empower organizations and communities with the knowledge and resources necessary to effectively manage crises and emerge stronger. Let's work together to build a safer, more resilient future.

Name: Madison County EMS
Description:
Madison County EMS is dedicated to serving our community with excellence, compassion, and professionalism. As the premier emergency medical service provider in Madison County, we are committed to delivering high-quality pre-hospital care to individuals in their time of need.

With a team of highly skilled and compassionate paramedics and emergency medical technicians, we strive to exceed expectations in every aspect of patient care. Our commitment to ongoing training and education ensures that our staff remains at the forefront of medical advancements, enabling us to provide the best possible care to our patients.

Name: CUMP 45 - Centre Val de Loire
Description:
Cellule d'Urgence Médico-Psychologique 45 
Région Centre - Val de Loire

CHU d'Orléans

Name: EMERG Group
Description:
Emerg offers a  range of consulting and training services to the emergency management sector, focused towards enhancing an organisations capability and capacity to help communities before, during and after significant emergency events.

We offer a complete range of contextualised nationally accredited training courses delivered on behalf of our partner, Fireground Pty Ltd (RTO4124), mentoring programs and facilitated exercises across all operational fire management and incident management roles.

Emerg consultancy services offer strategic emergency management planning, including bushfire attack level assessments, property risk assessments, and emergency management and evacuation planning.

 Our services

Professional consultancy for fire  and land management organisations across Australia.

Incident and Emergency Management consultation, advice and mentoring.

Nationally accredited Public Safety training and assessment in operational firefighting and emergency management delivered on behalf of Fireground (RTO 41245), including AFAC licenced AIIMS training.

Fixed and rotary wing aviation services and consultation with a fleet of aerial platforms for aerial ignition and suppression, pest control, weed spraying, disaster relief, exploration and construction.

Bushfire risk assessments & bushfire fuel management

advice and planning.

Name: DRK Rettungs- und Einsatzdienste Düsseldorf gGmbH
Description:
Als der Marktführer für Intensivtransporte sind wir seit über 30 Jahren überregional und teilweise bundesweit im Einsatz. Mit unseren sieben ITWs transportieren wir kritisch kranke Patient:innen unter Beibehaltung aller notwendigen intensivmedizinischen Maßnahmen. Auch Transporte von Patient:innen, die spezielles medizinisches Equipment wie z.B. eine Herz-Lungen-Maschine oder Impella benötigen, sind hierbei keine Seltenheit.
Im Rettungsdienst der Stadt Düsseldorf sind wir als starker Partner im Einsatz und besetzen auf unterschiedlichen Wachen sechs Rettungswagen, ein NEF, sowie fünf KTWs. 
Auch unsere 21 NotSan-Auszubildenden, die wir zusammen mit unserem DRK-Bildungszentrum ausbilden, profitieren durch dieses breitgefächerte Aufgabenspektrum.

Unsere eigene Einsatzleitzentrale kümmert sich um die Koordination und Disposition aller Aufträge rund um den medizinischen Transportdienst und die Intensivverlegungen. Die Disponent:innen bearbeiten rund um die Uhr insgesamt mehr als 50.000 Einsätze im Jahr und greifen dabei natürlich auf modernste Kommunikations- und Datentechnik zurück.
Unsere Mitarbeitenden des medizinischen Transportdienstes übernehmen mit ihren dafür speziell ausgestatteten Fahrzeugen eine Vielzahl verschiedenster Einsätze vom Hausnotruf über Medikamenten- bis zum Organtransport und stehen dafür 24/7 bereit.

Name: R U OUT
Description:
Designed by experienced Fire Fighters, R U OUT is an incident management platform providing real-time communication, tracking, and reporting to increase response time, reduce risk, and increase efficiency.

R U OUT. Saves time. Saves lives.

Name: WA Flood and Fire
Description:
We are a damage restoration and cleaning service in Perth with branches in Canningvale, Albany and Bunbury - Western Australia. We are ever expanding and we have a large network of likeminded associates in remote areas so we are always accessible for any emergency.  We are open 24/7 and will be at your premises within 2 hours of receiving your call come hail or storm.
Get in touch: https://lnkd.in/grZZbirW

Name: Multicultural Emergency Management Partnership
Description:
The Multicultural Emergency Management Partnership (MEMP) is a unique community of trusted connectors and leaders from multicultural communities, emergency management agencies and other supporting organisations.
MEMP works together to enable communities to be safer and more resilient during emergencies, such as floods, fires and extreme weather, by connecting and supporting each other. 
MEMP focuses on building strong, strength-based community engagement and ensuring cultural safety within the emergency management sector in Victoria.

Name: Saskatchewan First Nation Emergency Management
Description:
We provide a variety of services, programs and workshops aimed at improving the awareness and mitigation of emergency scenarios. These programs are available to all communities in Saskatchewan, and we are proud to say that we have been able to reach hundreds of families through these programs.
Our office works with Federal, Provincial, ISC and independent agencies so that our training and programs comply with the highest standards. To pass on these practices, we document emergency plans for our communities and support First Nations bands in developing their own plans through a customizable emergency response plan that the community is able to build and maintain.
Our team provides training in combatting fires in rural and forested areas to our First Nation communities and neighbouring organizations. Whether a fire emergency breaks out in a community, at home, or in the forest, we want to make sure that those communities can respond, put out the fire, mitigate the spread and ensure impacted individuals receive medical attention. We are also able to support in providing relocation support in the event that someone’s home is lost in a fire through our Red Cross training.
Once a fire has been put out, we conduct an investigation into the cause of the outbreak. This is done to determine whether there was intentional malicious activity or if an incident occurred that could have been avoided with proper fire safety precautions. By performing these reviews, we’re able to continuously improve a community’s awareness of fire risks and reduce future threats.
We are the official Prince Albert Grand Council Search, Rescue and Recovery SARSAV Team in Saskatchewan. This means that SFNEM is able to assist families in finding their lost loved ones throughout First Nation communities with the resources and capacity needed to ensure that a thorough and expedient search can be conducted.

Name: Medical Jets International, LLC
Description:
Works with Air and Ground Emergency Medical Services
providing local standbys, backing up 911 services and
deploying Nationwide wide to assist those in need!

Name: ZNÁME ŘEŠENÍ s.r.o.
Description:
Profil majitele společnosti ZNÁME ŘEŠENÍ s.r.o. :

René Skýpala je nezávislý konzultant a Interim Manažer specializující se na oblast krizového řízení, procesního řízení, nákupu a logistiky, projektového managementu, restrukturalizačního poradenství a správy majetku. V minulosti pracoval jako ředitel logistiky a nákupu, procesní auditor, projektový manažer a manažer obchodu. V současnosti je majitelem vlastní společnosti ZNÁME ŘEŠENÍ s.r.o., která nabízí služby v oblasti krizového interim managementu, auditování procesů, správy pozůstalosti, likvidace, insolvence a restrukturalizace obchodních společností a družstev a odborných jazykových překladů.

Mezi jeho referenční zákazníky se řadí firmy působící v oblastech automobilového průmyslu, zejména se zaměřením na zpracování a povrchové úpravy plastů, dále pivovarnictví a gastronomie, facility, železničního a zbrojního průmyslu a výroby a distribuce zdravotnických pomůcek.

Name: New Holland Ambulance
Description: New Holland Ambulance is Intermediate Advanced Life Support, Emergency Medical Services organization. Operating out of two stations, providing medical services to 6 municipalities. We are a primarily volunteer organization with over 100 volunteer members. to keep high quality providers coming into the organization, we offer a yearly Emergency Medical Technician(EMT) class as well as an Advanced EMT class taught by our members. In addition to providing EMS services, and certification education. Our members provide CPR/First aid training to the public, FIre Department, & Police Department members.

Name: United Emergency Services
Description:
At United Emergency Services, we pride ourselves on offering a wide range of services, including:
 
Fire and EMS Services: 
Our team of highly trained professionals are equipped to handle any fire, or medical situations that may arise. We have the training and experience to ensure the safety and well-being of your employees and facilities.
 
Rescue Operations:
We provide specialized rescue operations utilizing the latest and most advanced technical rescue techniques and industry standards to ensure a safe and favorable outcome for our clients. This includes High & Low angle Rope Rescue, Confined space rescue, and Hazmat response. We pride ourselves in ensuring that we are prepared for any challenge that may arise.
 
Planning & Consulting: 
Our team offers expert consulting to help you develop robust emergency response plans, conducting risk assessments and training sessions tailored to your unique operational needs. We develop a proactive instead of a reactive approach to disaster and emergency preparedness ensuring you and your company are ready for what ever may happen and can recover daily operations with as little impact as possible.

Name: Refugee Resilience Support
Description: Ongeacht waar mensen op de vlucht vandaan komen en waar ze naartoe gaan in Europa, iedereen verdient een waardige behandeling. Refugee Resilience Support wil een bijdrage leveren aan het verbeteren van het lot van vluchtelingen in Europa.

Name: Daecond
Description:
Siamo una società giovane, nata dall’esperienza pluridecennale in ambito condominiale di alcuni imprenditori che hanno messo in campo tutto il loro know how per creare una realtà che possa portare un vero beneficio alle persone.

Per questo ci impegniamo nel progetto di rendere i condomini cardio protetti. Infatti, riteniamo che sia giusto fornire al maggior numero possibile di condomini, defibrillatori in grado di salvare vite umane.

Di fatto con DAECOND è possibile dare una seconda chance alle migliaia di persone che ogni anno perdono la vita a causa di un arresto cardiaco.

Name: 1cc Foundation
Description: The 1CC Foundation was incorporated in 2018 as the Corporate Social Responsibility arm of Cape Medics EMS, with our primary focus being to reach sick and injured children within the golden hour. Since our incorporation, the desperate plight of the children within our borders has driven the need to expand our services to include both rotor and fixed-wing air ambulance services.

Name: Bainbridge Prepares
Description:
Bainbridge Prepares fosters collaboration among individuals, organizations, and local government, actively working towards enhancing the resilience of our island community through mutual aid. 

Together, we strive to establish Bainbridge Island as the most resilient town in Washington state.

Name: Code Green Response
Description:
Code Green Response is redefining what’s possible in disaster response, workforce housing, and event logistics.

We design, manufacture, and deploy rugged, solar-powered base camps engineered to perform in the toughest environments.

Our workforce housing, command centers, and support facilities deliver the comfort, resilience, and reliability needed to keep crews mission-ready — whether responding to a hurricane, supporting major infrastructure projects, or powering global events like the World Cup.

All of our units are proudly made in America. Stop on by to see the difference!

Name: EMSy | Prehospital Emergency Care
Description: Every second counts in medical emergencies. EMSy is an AI assistant designed to help doctors, nurses, and paramedics make quick and safe decisions in critical situations.

Name: DRK-Kreisverband Gelnhausen-Schlüchtern e.V.
Description:
Unsere Arbeit ruht auf zwei Säulen: Unsere hauptamtlichen Mitarbeiter sind in den Bereichen Rettungsdienst, ambulante Pflege, Hausnotruf, Aus- und Fortbildung, Sozialarbeit und Verwaltung tätig. Darüber hinaus betreiben wir eine eigene Rettungsdienstschule. Freiwillige im Sozialen Jahr unterstützen die Arbeit im Rettungsdienst, in der Aus- und Fortbildung, im ambulanten Pflegedienst, im Hausnotruf und in der Verwaltung.

Die zweite starke Säule des Kreisverbands bildet das Ehrenamt. Rund 800 Frauen und Männer sind in unseren Ortsvereinen, Bereitschaften und Gruppen ehrenamtlich aktiv, von der Wohlfahrts- und Sozialarbeit über Sanitätsdienste bis hin zum Katastrophenschutz.

Name: Legart
Description:
Legart is an AI-powered platform designed to revolutionize how businesses and individuals create legal contracts.

Our technology analyzes your specific needs and automatically generates tailored legal documents that meet industry standards. We aim to make professional legal support accessible and efficient, eliminating the bottleneck of manual drafting.

Name: Culture on Fire
Description:
We are proud to share the launch of *Culture on Fire* — a new international initiative led by a small group of us across different nations, who are committed to transforming culture in the fire and emergency services.

This is more than a conversation — it's a movement!

We are women, men, LGBTQIA+, Indigenous, neurodiverse, culturally and linguistically diverse, allies and advocates — united by lived experience and the deep belief that fire services can be inclusive, equitable, and safe for all.

*Culture on Fire* aims to connect people, examine systems, and build practical tools to support meaningful change. We're here to light the match that leads to lasting transformation — one conversation, one action, one ally at a time.

We're starting small, but our vision is bold. We invite others who feel the heat and see the cracks to join us. Culture change doesn’t happen in silence.

Every voice matters.

Name: Track Life
Description: Track Life is the system which provides emergency departaments with perecise location of customer within 15 seconds from starting point of call. Track Life is 250 times perecise and 3 times faster than traditional emergency system.

Name: The Alarm Room
Description:
The Alarm Room is a digital platform dedicated to supporting and empowering Fire and EMS dispatchers.  
Whether you're behind the mic or leading a team, our mission is to provide the tools, insights, and training that help you thrive—on the job and beyond.

We publish professional-grade blog content, highlight leadership strategies, explore cutting-edge technology, and offer mental wellness resources specifically tailored to the challenges of fire and EMS dispatch.

Our core values—professionalism, collaboration, and resilience—are the heartbeat of our content and community.

We believe dispatchers are leaders.
And The Alarm Room is where leadership begins.

 Visit us at thealarmroom.com
 Join our newsletter for updates, tools, and dispatch-focused insights.

Name: Isle Of Man Constabulary
Description:
The Isle Of Man Constabulary serves an island community of around 85,000 people and is consistently recognised as the safest Island in the British Isles. We operate with an establishment of approximately 231 Police Officers and around 119 Support Staff, delivering the full spectrum of policing functions across the entire Island.

As a single force covering the whole Island, we offer variety and responsibility in every role. From emergency response and neighbourhood policing to serious crime investigations, safeguarding, armed response and roads policing, our team punches well above its weight. Officers are encouraged to develop specialist skills and can progress into areas such as economic and financial crime, criminal investigations, drugs and organised crime, roads policing, community policing, the dog unit, firearms, search and forensics. This breadth of opportunity means our Officers wear "many hats" and gain experience across a wider range of duties than is typical in larger UK forces.

The Isle of Man Constabulary combines the professionalism of a progressive UK police service with the unique benefits of island life, providing our officers and staff with a career that is challenging, rewarding and truly distinctive.

Name: SAFA ASSISTANCE
Description:
Founded in 1993 , SAFA Assistance is an independent provider of medical and roadside assistance solutions, committed to placing customer satisfaction at the very heart of its mission.
With a strong focus on excellence, we deliver reliable and responsive services designed to meet the diverse needs of our clients, whether in critical medical situations or roadside emergencies.

Our activities are guided by four fundamental values that define our identity and drive our performance:

	•	Responsiveness – providing swift and effective solutions when they are needed most.
	•	Efficiency – optimizing resources to deliver high-quality assistance with precision.
