Name: CHADWICK EMERGENCY MANAGEMENT, LLC
Description: Chadwick Emergency Management, LLC is an All-Hazards, disaster management, preparedness, and risk & threat assessment consulting company.  The President/Owner, Mark Chadwick, has over 36 years of experience in the field and is a goal-oriented Certified Emergency Manager (CEM) & Certified Texas Emergency Manager (TEM) with a demonstrated track record of leading mitigation, preparedness, response, and recovery for disasters in an All-Hazards approach. Chadwick Emergency Management, LLC is here to assist before, during, and after disaster incidents and planned events. The company stands ready to aid during all phases whether it be prevention, preparedness, response, recovery, or mitigation. Services offered include all-hazards incident management, development of Incident Action Plans (IAPs) and tactical planning, conducting After Action Reviews (AARs) and Improvement Plans (IPs) for events and incidents, development of Emergency Operation Plans (operational and strategic), conducting training and exercises, and conducting threat/hazard/risk assessment.

Name: FirstAI.d
Description:
FirstAI.d delivers instant, AI-powered health intelligence so anyone can act when care can’t wait.

Built for speed. Designed for responsibility.

Name: Stichting Burgerhulpverlening
Description:
We komen handen tekort in de gezondheidszorg. En dat probleem zal alleen maar groter worden. Professionele zorgverleners en mantelzorgers kunnen de hoeveelheid zorgvraag steeds moeilijker verwerken. Daarom zal de samenleving zelf meer voor elkaar moeten gaan zorgen. Dat wil Stichting Burgerhulpverlening faciliteren. 

Steeds vaker worden professionele hulpdiensten ingeschakeld voor eenvoudige acute zorgtaken. Dat is een Bovenmatige inzet van kostbare zorg. Deze eenvoudige zorgtaken die nu alleen door professionele zorgverleners en mantelzorgers worden uitgevoerd, zouden overgenomen kunnen worden door vrijwilligers. Zorgtaken die eenvoudig en overzichtelijk genoeg zijn om uitgevoerd te kunnen worden door iemand zonder medische kennis. Een voorbeeld daarvan is het optillen van ouderen die thuis gevallen zijn en geen letsel hebben, maar niet meer de spierkracht hebben om overeind te komen. In Nederland wordt minstens 16.000 keer per jaar de ambulance ingezet om iemand overeind te hebben en weer te vertrekken. Hulp bij opstaan zou ook door een omwonende vrijwilliger uitgevoerd kunnen worden. Op die manier wordt de oudere eerder overeind geholpen en kan de ambulance elders worden ingezet. 

Andere voorbeelden van eenvoudige zorgtaken (zorgincidenten) waar vrijwilligers zouden kunnen helpen: 

•	Automatische medicatie dispensers die vastlopen en gereset moeten worden 
•	Zorgrobots die offline gaan en gereset moeten worden 
•	Wisselen van de opvangzak van een urinekatheter
•	Ophalen noodmedicatie bij (nacht)apotheek
•	…. en nog veel meer!

Name: DC Consults
Description:
Our mission is your safety and security. Dc Consults intends to make our clients aware, efficient, and safer. Our team of subject manner experts takes end-user requirements and formulates plans, policies, and technology solutions for emergency management and security agencies. By combining knowledge, experience, and technology, our solutions are tailored to clients' wants and needs.
DC Consult's vision is to design emergency management and security solutions that can tackle the threats to our Nation's Critical Infrastructure needs. By working with the emergency management, private sector, and security agencies and addressing their needs for Protection, Prevention, and Response. In Recovery and Mitigation actions, we strive to deliver reliable solutions using lean process and agile engineering techniques to deliver solutions in the shortest time possible.
DC Consults values are we believe in getting it done right based on the client's needs, planning, and building the solution from the end-users perspective. We understand the context of preparedness, knowing we prepare so that we can respond to, mitigate against, and recover systems and services back to normal. We say this because we have lived it and have learned from best practices; the reason we believe in continuous improvement.

Description: Family Promise of Spokane's mission is to equip families and communities to end the cycle of homelessness in Spokane County. We do this by preventing family homelessness, providing 24/7 trauma-informed shelter and wrap-around support services, and preparing families to achieve self-sufficiency.

Name: P2000 Alarmeringsystemen BV - PreCom
Description:
Founder 2-weg paging in Nederland.

PreCom is een expert in alarmerings- en communicatiesystemen, speciaal ontwikkeld voor hulpdiensten en bedrijven. Met ons systeem zorgen we voor snelle en efficiënte communicatie tijdens calamiteiten, crises en storingen.

Onze oplossingen bieden realtime inzicht in inzetbaarheid en opkomst bij alarmeringen. Functionaliteiten zoals terugkoppeling van beschikbaarheid, agenda-integratie op de pager en uitgebreide rapportages maken PreCom dé keuze voor organisaties die vertrouwen op betrouwbare communicatie.

Onze systemen worden al ingezet door onder andere veiligheidsregio's en de Koninklijke Nederlandse Redding Maatschappij. Samen zorgen we voor een optimale respons in kritieke situaties.

Name: SEVEN-EM
Description:
Our Mission: To replace chaos with clarity in emergency management, empowering cities to save lives.

What We Do:
SEVEN is a pioneering technology company building the world's first true Operating System (OS) for Urban Resilience.

Our AI-powered, SaaS platform provides a unified, real-time operational picture for cities during crises.
We connect public infrastructure, first responders, and citizens into a single, coordinated, and intelligent network.

Why It Matters:
In an era of growing uncertainty, our technology empowers municipal leaders to make smarter, faster, data-driven decisions under extreme pressure.
We don't just display information; we provide predictive insights and actionable recommendations that accelerate response times, optimize resource allocation, and ultimately, save lives.

Our unique three-layered architecture (Prepare, Coordinate, Guide) provides an end-to-end solution that no other company offers.

Who We Are:
We are a team of passionate technologists and domain experts, backed by real-world validation in a large-scale municipal pilot program.
We are driven by the belief that technology can and should be used to build safer, more resilient communities.

Join Our Journey:
 For Municipal Leaders: Discover how we can build a more resilient future for your community.
 For Investors: We are a rapidly growing GovTech company tackling a massive and underserved global market.
 For Top Talent: We are hiring mission-driven individuals who want to solve one of the world's most critical challenges.
Visit our website to learn more.

Name: BEEP DOCTORS (BASICS CUMBRIA)
Description:
Funded solely by the public and generous donations, the BEEP DOCTORS -  a small local charity - has been bringing skilled emergency 'ON-CALL VOLUNTEER' doctors to the scene of accidents and medical emergencies for almost 30 years across Cumbria.  With 12 highly skilled doctors and a fleet of 3 responder vehicles our service spans the length and breadth of the entire Cumbria region, from Whitehaven in the West to the Scottish Borders and down to Kendal in the South.   

Whether it’s roadside assistance for a traffic accident, urgent in-home care during life-threatening situations, assisting mountain rescue or farming incidents, our dedicated volunteer team of doctors—on call 24/7, 365 days a year—offers specialised pre-hospital critical care interventions beyond the scope of paramedics, that has saved numerous lives over the years.  

Collaborating with the ambulance service, our volunteer doctors aim to achieve the best possible outcomes for patients, offering advanced medical support right at the accident or medical emergency scene.

AWARDED THE KING'S AWARD FOR VOLUNTARY SERVICE 2023 #KAVS2023

CONTINUOUS OPERATION OF OUR CHARITY IS SOLELY RELIANT ON PUBLIC DONTATIONS AND REQUIRES APPROXIMATELY £250k PER YEAR.

Name: IMS Rettungsdienst
Description:
Der IMS Rettungsdienst stellt an verschiedenen Standorten in Bayern und NRW den öffentlichen Rettungsdienst.
Zudem – und als nur einer von zwei bayerischen Anbietern insgesamt – betreiben wir ein öffentlich-rechtliches Notarzteinsatzfahrzeug / NEF. (Darauf sind wir besonders stolz!)

Unser Anspruch lautet „Best Practice“: Die gekonnte Verbindung praxiserprobter Abläufe und innovativer Prozesse. Dazu gut ausgebildete Mitarbeiter, denen die Freude am Job immer anzusehen ist, State-of-Art Technik und moderne Fahrzeuge an allen Standorten.

Als flexibler und leistungsstarker Anbieter stellen wir für private und kommunale Veranstaltungen, für große und kleine Events zuverlässige Sanitätsdienste. Unser Alleinstellungsmerkmal: Wir haben oder wir finden immer die passenden Sanitäter:innen für Sie. Auch kurzfristig.

Der alltägliche Krankentransport ist eine weitere, kleine, aber immens wichtige Teilaufgabe in der Patientenbetreuung, die wir sehr ernst und unsere Fahrer:innen sehr genau nehmen. Über kurze und lange Strecken, individuell und privat vereinbart oder im Auftrag öffentlicher Leistungsträger, insbesondere gesetzlicher und privater Krankenkassen.

Als bewährter Partner großer Assistance-Unternehmen oder im privaten und individuellen Auftrag führen wir weltweit Auslandsrückholungen durch. Von der einfachen Verlegung immobiler Patienten bis zum anspruchsvollen Intensivtransport.

Und was können wir für Sie tun?
Wir freuen uns auf Ihre Kontaktaufnahme.

With over 36 years of expertise in Life Safety, we bring trusted experience to every product we create. At Lifeline, we’re not just manufacturing equipment—we’re fostering a culture of preparedness, accessibility, and protection. Because when lives are at stake, Lifeline is the way out.

Name: Merseyside and Cheshire Blood Bikes
Description:
We are a group of volunteers, formed in 2012, who try to make a difference by helping our Local NHS. Lots of us are Motorcyclists, but we also have volunteers who don’t ride bikes.

We provide this service to the NHS for FREE to help reduce NHS transport expenses, Thereby allowing these funds to be used to improve patients treatment etc.

It is all down to our small army of loyal volunteers and everyone who supports us for helping us achieve our goal.

Our “VOLUNTEERS“ include Riders, Dispatchers and Fundraisers. The Riders are full motorcycle licence holders with at least 24 months riding experience, with a clean licence and no accidents, a number of our riders are also ‘Advanced’ riders with IAM or ROSPA qualifications, and they undergo regular reviews of their skills.

Our fantastic Volunteers don’t just give up their time to serve the community and potentially save lives. FOR FREE. they also pay for their own fuel, and put many many miles on their beloved motorcycles – ALL FOR FREE! They do this in the knowledge that they will probably never meet the beneficiary and that the same person will probably never know of the Blood Biker service nor that it played any part in their recovery.

Name: DARE
Description: The DARE project aims to enhance Europe’s capability to respond to large-scale cross-country disasters by improving interoperability and information sharing. It addresses gaps in operational standardisation, command structure interoperability, digital tool integration, and citizen engagement. The project will develop harmonised guidelines for emergency response procedures, integrate diverse data sources into an open-source Dashboard for real-time situational awareness, and promote citizen engagement, including mobilising volunteers. Partners across Europe will collaborate through workshops, field exercises, and AI-driven multilingual communication tools to test and refine the system, creating a scalable and adaptable emergency response framework.

Name: ACT Rural Fire Service
Description:
ACT Rural Fire Service (ACTRFS) is responsible for protecting life, property and the environment from all bush and grass fires in rural ACT areas. This is achieved in many ways, including:

    Hazard reduction and supporting land management.
    Working with people living in the rural area to make sure they have everything they need to protect themselves and their property.
    Responding to all fires in the ACT’s rural areas.
    Engagement and education activities for community members to ensure they have the information they need to stay safe before, during and after emergencies.

We currently have over 450 active volunteer Members who are based in eight Brigades located across the ACT:

    Southern Districts
    Tidbinbilla
    Rivers
    Molonglo
    Hall
    Gungahlin
    Jerrabomberra
    Guises Creek


In addition to the volunteer workforces, we are supported by a Headquarters team and the Parks and Conservation Service Fire Management Unit.

These services include emergency medical and security evacuation, crisis response, political evacuation, escalation services, and kidnap and extortion response.

International LifeLine, Ltd.  employs advanced technology, innovative solutions, and years of experience to provide efficient and reliable emergency response services to customers worldwide.

Name: Northshore State Emergency Service (SES) Unit
Description:
The SES is a division of the Department of Fire and Emergency Services (DFES) made up of volunteers from every walk of life who give up their time to help others during emergency situations or when disaster strikes.  
 
Supported by an extensive network of over 32,000 volunteers and 1076 career firefighters DFES works together with the community and government to prevent, prepare for, respond to and recover from a diverse range of emergencies.
 
The Northshore SES unit covers the Perth CBD as well as the following council municipalities: Nedlands, Claremont, Cottesloe, Peppermint Grove, Mosman Park, Subiaco, Cambridge and Vincent. We train our volunteers to be able to deal with whatever emergency situation may confront them, as well as many other support & miscellaneous roles. 
 
There is no such thing as a 'typical' callout. However, the more common types of incidents for our unit include searching for missing persons, storm damage, fallen trees, collapsed ceilings, flooding and buildings damaged by vehicle impacts. Statewide, the SES takes the lead role in countering the effects of, and managing, the reactions to floods, cyclones, storms, earthquakes and tsunami threats.    
 
Consider this: Western Australia is approximately 2.5M square kilometres in size. With approximately 2000 SES volunteers in WA, that works out to 1,250 square kilometres per volunteer....!

Established in 2013, Care Unit is gradually building its strength in the Health and safety industry and has since developed a reputation as and progressive First Aid service provider.
Our operation is underpinned by a willingness to understand your requirements and tailor an appropriate program.

This relevance is fundamental to our training programs and the commitment to applied knowledge. We understand the importance of competency-based learning used in conjunction with theory and practice. Name: Notfallsanitäter-App
Description:
Notfallsanitäter App: Lernen auf dem neuesten Stand

Seit über einem Jahrzehnt ist die "Notfallsanitäter App" eine feste Größe in der Ausbildung und Weiterbildung von Rettungsdienstpersonal. Nach einem vollständigen Update im Jahr 2023 bietet sie jetzt eine noch intuitivere und benutzerfreundlichere Plattform für Ihr Lernen. Die neue Programmierung wird den Anforderungen der Zukunft gerecht.

Mit mehr als 2100 kostenlosen Lernkarten und einer breiten Palette von Multiple-Choice-Fragen, die als In-App-Käufe verfügbar sind, ist die "Notfallsanitäter App" Ihr treuer Begleiter auf dem Weg zum Abschlussexamen und darüber hinaus.

Mit über 100 Unterkategorien deckt die App ein breites Spektrum von Themen ab, darunter Anatomie & Physiologie, Arbeitstechniken, Diagnostik, Medikamente und verschiedenste medizinische Notfälle. Ob Sie sich auf die mündliche Prüfung mit unseren speziellen Lernkarten oder auf das schriftliche Examen mit unseren Multiple-Choice-Fragen vorbereiten – die "Notfallsanitäter App" hat das passende Lernmaterial für Sie.

Ein besonderes Highlight ist die Möglichkeit, Ihre Lerneinheiten individuell zusammenzustellen und zu speichern. So können Sie Ihr Lernen exakt an Ihre Bedürfnisse anpassen und effizient Ihr Wissen vertiefen. Jede Multiple-Choice-Frage kommt zudem mit einer detaillierten Erklärung, die Ihnen nicht nur die richtige Antwort aufzeigt, sondern auch den Hintergrund dazu erklärt.

Unser Live-Update-System hält Ihr Wissen immer auf dem neuesten Stand, indem es regelmäßig aktualisiert und ergänzt wird, ohne dass Sie ein App-Update herunterladen müssen.

Mit über 100.000 Downloads und einer hohen Nutzerzufriedenheit ist die "Notfallsanitäter App" nicht nur ein bewährtes Lerninstrument, sondern auch ein vertrauenswürdiger Partner in Ihrer Aus- und Weiterbildung. Laden Sie die "Notfallsanitäter App" jetzt herunter und erleben Sie, wie das kontinuierliche Lernen zum Kinderspiel wird!

Name: Zone Zero Fire Shield
Description:
In wildfire defense terms, Zone Zero is your home and 5 feet beyond. Zone 0 is a critical component of structure defense and is essential to defensible space. Zone 0 is also the most costly and challenging zone to modify. It can include building permits, upgrading a roof, installing fire-safe windows, replacing ground, eve, and roof vents, cladding the structure in fire-resistant materials, changing gutters and downspouts, replacing doors, or even a complete rebuild with fire resilient construction. Even with all these modifications, the structure can still burn down in the worst case scenario.

Around 90 percent of homes consumed by wildfires happen as a result of embers flowing far beyond the actual fire perimeter. This phenomenon is well documented in the Paradise fire, Pacific Palisades, Lahaina, and many more. Ember incursion through non fire-safe vents, windows broken due to excessive heat, accumulation at the ground-wall interface, open eves, roof valleys, and ignition of roof debris, all lead to home combustion. Some vinyl gutters can further exasperate this by becoming molten rivers of fiery plastic. The majority of the remaining homes burn as a result of direct contact with fire moving through the neighborhood, or radiant heat exposure from burning adjacent structures. The Zone Zero Fire Shield solution prevents all these sources of ignition.  

The first instance of a home protection fire blanket dates back to 1945. In current times, the US Fire Service uses a foil wrap solution to quickly deploy high levels of heat reflection and fire resistance to rural structures in the path of wildfires.  These tests and applications are well documented.

We use fire resistant blankets certified as environmentally safe and fire effective by the International Organization for Standardization (ISO), European Norms (ENs), and National Fire Protection Association (NFPA). Our blankets have their roots in helping fire departments end high-temperature lipo chemical fires

Name: St. Lawrence County Office of Emergency Services
Description:
The St. Lawrence County Office of Emergency Services, and its four Bureaus, is dedicated to providing for all residents and visitors within St. Lawrence County.

Bureau of Communications: Operates the 911 Public Safety Answering Point (PSAP) and County Communications Center, plan for and build-out communication infrastructure, and to provide communication-related assistance to local public-safety agencies.

Bureau of Fire: Provide training opportunities to local responders, support local fire departments, and responding to major incidents involving multiple fire departments within the County.

Bureau of EMS: Provide leadership, support, education, and cooperation necessary to enable both transporting and first response agencies serving within jurisdictional boundaries to provide the best pre-hospital emergency medical care possible. The Bureau of EMS is also responsible for assisting in major incidents involving multiple patients and/or fatalities, and providing a smooth flow of information from local hospitals and New York State EMS to local EMS.

Bureau of Emergency Management: Maintain a high level of preparedness to protect the citizens residing or visiting St. Lawrence County, to mitigate loss of life and vital assets prior to, during, and immediate aftermath of a disaster, and to facilitate the speedy recovery in the mid and long term intervals following a disaster. The Bureau of Emergency Management also identifies County vulnerabilities, effectively mitigates disasters, conducts public education, responds to all-hazard emergency situations, protects St. Lawrence County's first responders, ensures the continuity of government and business, and to facilitate an effective recovery.

Name: Murky Waters Search & Recovery
Description: Murky Waters Search & Recovery is made up of dedicated Volunteers who give of their time to help locate missing persons who are not found by normal means. If a person was last seen in a vehicle that is also still missing our expertise may can result in finding the missing person. Our services are free of charge to families, law enforcement and emergency management. We locate targets underwater that appear to be vehicles and dive on them to confirm if it is our target. We retrieve license plates and notify local law enforcement then treat it as if it were a crime scene and let them decide the next steps in recovery. If requested our divers are experts at vehicle removal and will assist law enforcement and tow services with removal. We service all of Mississippi, Alabama, Tennessee, Arkansas and Louisiana. If requested and funding allows we will travel throughout the United States and pl;an on future trips to meet and work with the pioneers in this field. All credit is given to Jared Leisik who started this movement and is a tremendous resource. Murky Waters Search & Rescue gets funded or will be funded through the use of Youtube as a channel and content creation. We will film our deployments and trips as much as possible and from this tell the story of those missing to help bring awareness and understanding. A positive is that the funding received from filming can bring in revenue that will be used to fund trips, buy needed equipment and purchase fuel and food while deployed. We will also accept donations through paypal and we do have an extensive wish list on Amazon. As we are just starting out our needs are great as it takes a lot of equipment and supplies to do this job. Our goal is to have (2) teams and (2) trailers each with (2) boats for deployments. We look forward to serving those in need of these services and hope we can be successful in bring answers to those lost.

Name: Scan ID 365
Description:
Scan ID 365 is a life-saving identification system built for emergencies — because when seconds count, information matters.

We provide a secure, scannable Safety ID that gives first responders access to your critical emergency information — even if you can’t speak for yourself.

Whether you're riding a motorcycle, hiking a trail, working outside, or simply going about your day, accidents can happen. Our mission is to make sure that first responders instantly know who you are, who to call, and what might save your life — like allergies, medications, or medical conditions.

How it works:
- Sign up and create your private safety profile.
- Apply your unique QR code sticker to helmets, vehicles, or gear.
- In an emergency, responders scan the code and securely view your emergency info.

Who it’s for:
* Motorcycle and off-road riders
* Elderly loved ones
* Children and teens
* Cyclists, hikers, skiers
* Outdoor workers (linemen, landscapers, utility crews)
* Public trail users
* Anyone who wants to be prepared

Why it matters:
* Emergency info when you can’t speak
* Personalized medical alerts
* Contact loved ones faster
* Works without a mobile app

Scan ID 365 was created after a tragic event that highlighted a simple truth: if your emergency contacts and medical info aren’t available when it matters most, critical time can be lost.

Join us in making safety simple, fast, and universal.

Our primary area of operation is southern California, but the team has responded to calls for help in areas extending from Baja, California, through the Sierra Nevada, and up to northern California, and as far east as Nevada, Colorado, and New York.

The Sierra Madre Search and Rescue Team is affiliated with the Los Angeles County Sheriff’s Department with members serving as civilian volunteer specialists. The team is fully accredited in Technical Rock Rescue, Snow and Ice Rescue, and Wilderness Search Management. We are members of the California Region of the Mountain Rescue Association (MRA) and are a California Office of Emergency Services (OES) Type 1 wilderness SAR resource. 

Our services are provided at no cost and are available at any time of the day or night by contacting our 24-hour dispatcher at the Sierra Madre Police Department at (626)355-1414 or by calling 911.

Name: Swiss USAR
Description: Wir sind ein engagierter Such- & Rettungsverein, der im April 2023 gegründet wurde, um Leben zu retten. Unsere Spezialisierung liegt auf der Rettung von Menschenleben bei Erdbeben, da wir verstehen, dass Erdbeben eine der gefährlichsten Naturkatastrophen sind, die jederzeit auftreten können. Unsere erfahrenen Rettungskräfte sind gut ausgebildet und ständig bereit, in Notfällen schnell und effektiv zu handeln. Unser Ziel ist es, den Menschen in der Katastrophenregion ein Gefühl der Sicherheit zu geben, indem wir im Falle eines Erdbebens schnell und professionell handeln. Wir glauben, dass schnelle und koordinierte Reaktionen den Unterschied zwischen Leben und Tod ausmachen können. Unsere Arbeit geht jedoch über die Rettung von Menschen hinaus. Wir engagieren uns auch dafür, den betroffenen Gemeinden bei der Wiederherstellung ihrer Infrastruktur und ihrer Lebensgrundlagen zu helfen. Wir glauben, dass dies ein wichtiger Schritt ist, um den Menschen nach einem Erdbeben Hoffnung und Stabilität zu geben.

Name: Active Shooter Training
Description:
Our company is dedicated to providing active shooter training for schools, businesses, and organizations of all sizes. We believe that everyone should be prepared to respond effectively in the event of an active shooter situation, and our training programs are designed to help individuals and teams do just that.

Our training emphasizes the importance of being prepared, both mentally and physically, for an active shooter situation. We provide a comprehensive curriculum that covers everything from situational awareness and threat assessment to emergency response and trauma care. Our instructors are highly experienced and knowledgeable, and they work closely with each client to develop customized training programs that meet their specific needs.

At our company, we believe that saving lives is the top priority in any active shooter situation. That's why our training focuses on practical skills and strategies that can be used to protect oneself and others in a crisis. We teach individuals and teams how to identify and neutralize threats, how to communicate effectively with law enforcement and emergency responders, and how to administer basic first aid and trauma care.

We understand that active shooter situations are unpredictable and often chaotic, which is why we stress the importance of getting trained. Our training programs are designed to help individuals and teams develop the skills and confidence they need to respond effectively in a crisis, and to ultimately save lives.

In today's world, it's essential for schools, businesses, and organizations to be prepared for the possibility of an active shooter situation. Our company is here to help, providing the highest quality training and support to ensure that you and your team are ready for anything when every second counts.

Name: Keirans Legacy
Description:
Keirans Legacy improve the chances of survival for accident and medical trauma victims by installing and maintaining appropriate equipment (primarily defibrillators), training individuals in first aid and lobbying the government to legislate to support emergency response defibrillators and create a national training policy for their use. To improve the well-being and mental health of others by providing recreational activities.

Keirans Legacy was founded in 2016 by Sandra and Gordon McKandie of Moray, as a result of their son Keiran being involved in an accident with a car that was fatal on the 20th March 2016, aged 16. 

Since its formation in 2016, Keirans Legacy has saved 9 lives, installed 170+ defibrillators in local communities and emergency response vehicles across Scotland, and provided defibrillator & CPR training within local communities and defibrillator & CPR training in secondary schools throughout Moray in collaboration with the local council.

We are an all-volunteer agency, providing our services free of charge 24 hours a day, 7 days a week, and 365 days a year. We do not bill for our services. We are supported completely by the townspeople tax deductible donations.

We are within 10 minutes to one of 3 local hospitals, Overlook Medical Center, JFK University Medical Center, and RWJ University Hospital Rahway. We are within 15 minutes from 2 trauma centers, University (UMDNJ Newark) and Morristown Medical Center.

While we are independent of the town government, we work in conjunction with both the Westfield Police Department (WPD) and Westfield Fire Department (WFD). We also work closely with Paramedics from various hospitals should the need arise.

Horizon’s expertise stems from years of performing direct temporary housing missions for FEMA, State Agency’s, or other contractors. The bulk of our experience revolves around TTHU Haul and Install, TTHU Maintenance and Deactivation, Construction of Group Sites, Group Site Expansion, Staging Area Operations, Site Inspections and Feasibility Assessments (SIR's), and all aspects of CDBG-DR Programs. Our project managers and field supervisors have completed many operations regarding “LogHouse” functions as defined by FEMA, and Horizon guarantees success if selected as a prime, sub, or partner on any disaster relief effort.  

Horizon's Building Construction team offers a wide array of construction solutions ranging from Residential Developments to Commercial Design-Build Projects. Our experienced team includes experts in Metal Building Installation, Custom Home Construction, and large-scale structure rehabilitation services following catastrophic events. Name: Feeding From Far
Description:
Feeding From Far is an initiative that has been feeding the poor and unemployed who are struggling to feed themselves during the lockdown. We managed to distribute over 30 lakh meals to the needy since the first lockdown hit through cooked meals and ration kits.

Since the first lockdown, we have been taking care of several families in the largest & oldest waste dumping ground and slum in Mumbai - Govandi along with several other areas of Maharashtra like Machhimar Nagar in South Mumbai, Dharavi, Nallasopara, Mulund, and Chiplun in Ratnagiri. In these regions reside, migrants, daily wage workers, rickshaw drivers, rag pickers etc. - who were unemployed and struggling to afford basic food.

 

We've expanded our efforts whenever there was a necessity and the need was at its peak.

In July 2021, when Chiplun got devastated due to massive floods, our community leaders came forward and pledged to help all of those who were bit badly and lost their livelihoods.

Currently we work in Dharawi & Macchimaar Nagar and have fed more than 34 lac meals, and counting.

Name: Berkshire Search And Rescue Dogs | BSARD
Description:
Berkshire Search and Rescue Dogs is a volunteer lowland rescue charity on call 24 hours a day, 365 days a year to assist Search & Rescue Teams, the Thames Valley Police and other Emergency Services. Our primary role is to assist in locating lost or missing vulnerable people within Berkshire and its surrounding areas. We were formed in 2002 and became a registered charity in the UK in March 2004. We are entirely reliant on sponsorship and donations to exist and carry out our work.

The Team is made up of volunteers who together with their dogs, undergo constant training and must meet rigorous standards in order to obtain operational status. Most of our dog handlers and support staff fit this in around full time jobs.

As of December 2023, we have 22 human and 25 K9 volunteers as full time members of the team, 14 of our dogs are operational search dogs. Whilst the majority of our dogs are working breeds, all types of dog breeds are considered on their merits and must pass an initial evaluation before being accepted into the team for training.

Being a specialist dog team we are often called out to provide support to neighbouring counties as well as working closely with other local teams in Berkshire, Surrey, Kent, Sussex and Oxford.

We are also official partners with Thames Valley Police with whom we work closely.

Name: Kenneth and Jacob's House
Description:
OUR APPROACH FOR SUPPORTING HOMELESS YOUTH
The two paths included in our approach include, Family Reconciliation, Transitional Housing and Supportive Services, both include extensive outreach. After outreach, the paths differ significantly.

Family Reconciliation; This involves a mediator and a therapist who holds meetings with parents/family of the youth to reason and come into agreement into acceptance of the youth's situation. It is only when this fails that the youth is enrolled through our programs.

Transitional Housing; Every night, we house a maximum of 12 homeless LGBTQ youths nationally for a maximum stay of 3months. Youths have access to three meals a day; a dedicated case manager; daily support services; specialized services, such as medical assistance, mental health counseling and substance use disorder treatment; and housing programs.

Our Support Services comprises of; Client Assistance Fund, which provides monetary support to youth for essential expenses such as clothing for job interviews, fees for obtaining identification documents, household items, and rental assistance. Transportation Assistance, which provides taxi passes to guests when they need to attend job interviews, medical appointments, legal aid meetings, or employment training. Support Groups, which help youth build the skills necessary to gain stability and strengthen self-sufficiency including art group, financial literacy, empowerment and relapse prevention. Daily Support, which helps youths improve the quality of their daily lives through a personal address, showers, clothing, haircuts and hygiene products.

Name: Hatzalah of Baltimore
Description:
As an independent, non-profit volunteer organization, The Alvin S. Mintzes Hatzalah of Baltimore is dedicated to providing quick, professional and expert emergency care to the Northwest Baltimore community. Established in 2007, our response team has since grown to a team of 58 volunteers, including 38 emergency medical responders (EMTs and Paramedics), 20 dispatchers, along with 5 state-of-the-art transport units, including 2 new ambulances added in August, 2019 enabling us to arrive on-scene in less than 3 minutes at a time when seconds can mean the difference between life and death.

There is no doubt that Hatzalah plays an essential role in our community, responding to over 400 calls in our first year of operation. Today Hatzalah responds to over 1500 hundred calls per year and the need is growing.

Hatzalah coverage area includes from Slade Avenue to Northern Parkway and Reisterstown Road to Pimlico Road. All our responders are licensed or certified by the Maryland Institute for Emergency Medical Services Systems (MIEMSS).

Over the last decade, we have responded to more than 10,000 calls for medical assistance, including cardiac, obstetric, diabetic, traumatic, or neurological emergencies, saving thousands of lives with our prompt response and expert care. We are here for the community, 24 hours a day, 7 days a week, 365 days a year. We are always available to answer your call.

Hatzalah of Baltimore responded to more than 400 calls in its first year of operation. Since then, our reach and our efficiency have expanded exponentially: In 2018, we responded to 1,500 calls and we anticipate continued growth along with the community’s expanding needs.

The team is highly mobile and has a cache of readily accessible rescue resources to help assist our community in time of need. Our capability includes Incident Management, General Rescue, USAR CAT-1R, Flood and Storm Response and Technical Swift-water Rescue.
We train Monday evenings on a fortnightly basis. Periodically training is also conducted during the weekends in all types of conditions so it's a commitment not to be taken lightly.

Name: GAMMA Relief through Urban Design
Description:
A few weeks ago, a powerful earthquake left hundreds dead in Morocco. Earlier this year, the Turkey-Syria earthquakes killed tens of thousands. Providing aid to the impacted communities is a moral imperative which is sometimes complicated by politics. While Morocco and Turkey have ties with most of the world, Syria does not.

The disaster is most acute in Aleppo, one of the oldest and most damaged cities in the world. The international community failed to address a humanitarian crisis in a place where governance has collapsed. Aid efforts were hampered by poor infrastructure and economic sanctions. Today, the need for help is still as urgent as ever.

Although usual emergency solutions provide immediate relief, they are ultimately not viable to solve such crises. In fact, they are harmful in the long-term, as they lead to protracted refugee situations — as currently witnessed in Aleppo — where refugees remain in camps much longer than intended.

From a pragmatic reading of the facts, we offer an alternative to the traditional way humanitarian agencies deal with crises. We are a team of architects, designers, engineers and scientists striving to build resilient communities, to think of emergency shelters as homes and of refugee camps as future cities.

Your support is crucial for our mission. Your help will enable imminent housing while reducing the dependency to degraded shelters, eliminating the risk of permanent slums, preserving the dignity of people and restoring their civic pride by offering a sustainable long-term alternative to tents.

With over four decades of experience in Emergency Medical Services (EMS) in Sonoma County, we are now ready to bring our top-notch service to EOA-1. Our partnership with SCFD allows us to offer innovative, sustainable, and effective EMS services to the region. Join us as we set a new standard for EMS in EOA-1. This page is owned and operated by Medic Ambulance.

Name: First In Software
Description:
Founded in 2010, First In Software is a 100% firefighter owned and operated company that provides an all-in one solution for response management software to Fire, EMS and Police agencies.  

Our solutions are part of an easy-to-use interface that is available on any device and include:

- incident notification, location, routing, and mapping
- real-time fleet vehicle locations
- occupancy data and visual pre-plan capabilities
- water supply information
- data sharing for mutual and auto-aid scenarios
- RMS system integration 

These solutions combine to provide our customers with a common operating picture at emergency scenes for all of their crews and aiding agencies.  This assists initial responders with size-up and hazard identification and incident commanders with managing assignments and tactical decision making.

We provide you with unlimited user access, no-cost implementation and affordable solution to your biggest needs...how to get there faster and be safer once you are there.

Name: Beacon Restoration & Cleaning
Description:
24 Hour Emergency Services Company working in the neighborhoods and communities we live in.

The Company You Trust to Be There When It Matters Most.

When an emergency strikes, there’s no time to waste. Water, fire, and smoke damage take minutes, if not seconds, to occur and sometimes days to clean up. Don’t wait until it’s too late—contact Beacon Restoration and Cleaning now for our residential and commercial disaster restoration services. Our teams will arrive swiftly.

Name: Lakes Region Search & Rescue (LRSAR)
Description:
Lakes Region Search & Rescue (LRSAR) was formed in 2019 to respond to a need for assistance on wilderness search and rescue missions in the Southern White Mountains and Lakes Region of New Hampshire. The team assists Fish and Game in their role as SAR coordinators in the state and promotes safe outdoor recreation through community outreach. Our team is activated through call outs from Fish and Game.

LRSAR started as a 3-season team quickly growing to around 70 volunteer members. That first year we were called on 25 missions and had just over 100 responses. We added a dedicated winter team in 2021 whose members are capable of responding at any time in any weather on any terrain below tree line and outside of avalanche terrain.

Name: Union of Help to Kherson
Description: The Union of Help to Kherson is a Ukrainian NGO dedicated to providing immediate, life-saving support to the people of Kherson, who continue to endure the impact of Russian aggression. With over 2.5 years of experience and partnerships with established and well known organizations across Europe and the USA, we channel international support into grassroots initiatives that make a real-time difference. Our network of dedicated local volunteers has reached over 20,000 people since 2022, ensuring that essential aid reaches those who need it most, while also building a foundation for the region’s future recovery.

Unsere knapp 100 Aktiven versehen ihren ehrenamtlichen Dienst im Wasserrettungsdienst an der Ruhr, im Katastrophenschutz, in den Bädern der Wasserwelten Bochum, in der Erste-Hilfe-Ausbildung, in der Verwaltung und in den Jugendgruppen.

Name: ALERTSim - AI for Live Emergency Response Teams and SimEx
Description:
ALERTSim is an AI platform for driving emergency response training and live crisis management. Designed for high-stakes industries and government agencies, ALERTSim enables teams to prepare, respond, and evolve through immersive simulation environments and real-time decision-making tools.

Built around globally recognized frameworks such as FEMA ICS, OPITO MEMIR, and COMAH, the platform offers:

AI Scenario Creator for dynamic and contextual crisis simulations

Cognitive performance evaluation using AI trained and ACT-R models

Virtual Emergency Operations Centres (EOCs) for distributed coordination

Inject management and role-based communication tools

Audit-ready compliance reporting and team readiness scores

Whether you're training emergency teams, validating response protocols, or managing live incidents, ALERTSim is your strategic partner in building readiness that lasts.

 Powered by The Bell Group | Bell Immersive |  Used across energy, government, disaster management, and critical infrastructure.

Nuestro personal esta totalmente capacitado y cuentan con amplia experiencia, que se encuentra siempre dispuesto a ofrecer soluciones inmediatas a sus emergencias y auxilio vial.

Somos una empresa con una amplia experiencia de 10 años especializada en la prestación de servicios de grúas al servicio de la comunidad. Nuestro objetivo es servir de manera eficiente y eficaz a nuestros clientes, estamos comprometidos a brindar un servicio de calidad para la satisfacción de nuestros clientes. 

Nuestros clientes honran nuestro trabajo y dedicación que brindamos en el tiempo que ellos más nos necesitan. Estamos comprometidos en brindar una atención en el tiempo oportuno, es por ello que contamos con grúas distribuidas en diferentes puntos del Perú para la pronta asistencia que requiera la comunidad.

Nuestras unidades siempre se van renovando en el desarrollo del año, nos preocupamos de mejorar nuestras unidades para brindarles un servicio de calidad a nuestros clientes. Por tanto realizamos un servicio óptimo y al alcance de todos con los mejores equipos calificados.

Name: European Governance Alliance in HEMS
Description:
The European Governance Alliance in HEMS is a network of senior HEMS clinicians committed to fostering stronger collaboration and the exchange of best practices in governance within European helicopter emergency medical services. Our goal is to promote structures and processes that enhance quality and, above all, patient safety.

At the heart of our work is learning from one another. We bring together professionals from different countries and HEMS organisations to share experiences and develop joint solutions to current and future challenges.

An initial step will be the establishment of cross-border case discussions, for which interested participants can register via our website. Participation will initially be limited to HEMS professionals.

The Alliance sees itself as a platform for discussion, innovation and knowledge sharing – with the aim of sustainably strengthening and advancing helicopter emergency medical services across Europe.

Name: Gulf 7 Pediatric Disaster Network
Description:
The Gulf 7 Pediatric Disaster Network (G7), is a federally funded Center of Excellence dedicated to improving pediatric disaster preparedness and response throughout the U.S. Gulf Coast (Texas, Louisiana, Mississippi, Alabama, Georgia, Florida and Puerto Rico). The G7 network includes Texas Children's Hospital as the main site, along with Children's Hospital of New Orleans, Children's of Mississippi, Children's of Alabama, Emory, University of Miami, and University of Puerto Rico.

Despite children comprising around 25-30% of injured patients in disasters and 50% of people impacted by disasters overall, pediatric disaster planning is often overlooked by healthcare systems. Children in G7’s region are particularly vulnerable, as the U.S. Gulf Coast states/territories have historically been hit by some of the nation’s worst disasters, such as hurricanes, massive floods, state-wide power grid failures, and pandemics. 

G7 is responding to the dire need for pediatric readiness in our region and beyond by assembling a team of experts across the continuum of pediatric care with extensive hands-on experience preparing and responding to disasters. G7 aims to harness and develop best practices in pediatric disaster preparedness and response, and to share these practices at the local, state, and regional levels through a wide variety of ongoing initiatives. Projects related to Educational Disaster Courses, Disaster Drills/Simulations, Pediatric Preparedness Planning, building capacity for Deployable Medical Assistance Teams with pediatric patients, and Disaster Telehealth are just a few of the many ongoing initiatives being conducted by the G7 Network.

Description:

This conference is funded by the generous support of our community organizations and corporations across BC. Name: Caminhar com amor é a solução
Description:
O QUE É CAMINHAR COM AMOR?
A Associação Caminhar com Amor é a Solução (CAS) nasceu da vontade de fazer a diferença na vida das crianças, acreditamos que para se ter uma sociedade mais justa e igualitária é preciso começar da base. Atuamos na área da Educação Infantil oferecendo em nossas creches uma educação humanista onde promovemos a cultura de paz. Para isso, além das atividades convencionais, para bebês e crianças de 0 a 4 anos, inserimos práticas integrativas como Yoga, Shantala, Meditação, Educação socioemocional e atividades Psicomotoras que são acompanhadas por uma psicomotricista certificada.

Name: FEMERAID International Brasil
Description:
A FEMERAID International Rio Grande do Sul – Brasil, doravante chamada FEMERAID Brasil, é a estrutura administrativa e executiva para estender e ampliar o trabalho humanitário no continente sul americano. Inaugurada em 23 de dezembro de 2020, como uma Organização Civil sem fins lucrativos, a partir da iniciativa de um grupo de voluntários com o intuito de somar seus esforços em prol das pessoas em situações de vulnerabilidade, visando atuar de forma transparente, ética junto a uma entidade idônea e engajada.  Atualmente, a FEMERAID Brasil é administrada pela Direção constituída em Assembleia Geral realizada no dia 30 de novembro de 2020, oferecendo serviços nas áreas da Saúde, Educação, Socorro & Desastres.

No ano de 2020 o Grão Mestre e Chefe de Estado da Federação (KMFAP), Sua Alteza Eminentíssima o Príncipe José Cosmelli, também Presidente Executivo da FEMERAID International, depois de consultada a respectiva Administração da FEMERAID e o Governo do Estado da Federação (KMFAP), decidiu conceder oficialmente autorização, ao Senhor Thiago dos Santos e à Senhora Gladis Jung, para a criação, fundação e registo, na República Federativa do Brasil, de um ramo da FEMERAID International denominada FEMERAID Brasil.
Location: Porto Alegre, Rio Grande do Sul

Our Mission: To save lives, safeguard human rights, and foster sustainable development in Myanmar with a focus on health and education.

Our Vision: A Myanmar where every person, regardless of background, circumstance or citizenship, lives in dignity, with equal opportunities, free from violence and human rights abuses.

Name: Airmobility Emergency System
Description:
"Revolutionizing Emergency Response: Developing an eVTOL with Cooperative and Non-Cooperative Surveillance”
In a world where every second counts, this groundbreaking research project is on the cusp of transforming emergency response as we know it. Imagine a future where lives can be saved and critical medical assistance can be delivered swiftly, even in the most challenging environments. This vision is becoming a reality through the development of an Emergency Electric Vertical Take-Off and Landing (eVTOL) aircraft, equipped with both cooperative and non-cooperative surveillance capabilities.
At the heart of this research project lies a commitment to saving lives and providing rapid, efficient, and reliable emergency services. The eVTOL, an Electrical Vertical Take-Off and Landing aircraft, is poised to revolutionize the way we approach emergency situations. With the ability to take off vertically and navigate diverse terrains, it offers unprecedented access to areas that were previously challenging to reach.

Description:
OSPREAN was launched as an affordable low-cost solution for the prevention of climate emergencies in municipalities. Our Our main target market is municipalities with large natural areas and with medium to high risk of climate emergencies. 

The main value of the solution is prevention at the municipal level, to centralise all necessary data in one place, and in the event that a climate emergency arise, all the municipalities that have done their homework by keeping their GIS layers up to date will enjoy the fruits of prevention. 

We use a cloud tool with closed access for each municipality, and when emergencies are declared, then the data is opened to all desired enforcement agents to fight the emergency

Nous œuvrons sans distinction d'origine, de religion ou de couleur de peau, car pour nous, l'humain passe avant tout. Notre mission est d’apporter soutien, espoir et dignité à ceux qui en ont le plus besoin.

Name: Avis Meda
Description:
Avis Meda ODV: AVIS blood donors and ANPAS ambulance service - Official page

We provide "112" emergency medical service with ambulance, ambulance transfers and events first aid service. 
We provide also EMTs education and first aid - paediatric first aid / FBAO - BLSD / AED courses both for professionals and for the community.

Please check with Organization officials any information here provided.

Name: More Than Welcome
Description: Launched in May 2023, More Than Welcome was a dream of Alliance Samuragwa (Executive Director) for years.  As an asylum seeker from Burundi, Alliance came to the United States in 2014 with no resources or understanding of how to create a life for himself in a foreign land.  All he knew was that he was thankful to be safe.  As he navigated the very difficult process of becoming a citizen and integrating into community, he began to have a vision for helping many others coming to the United States in similar situations through the love of the church.  Alliance has helped thousands of individuals over the last several years but there is much more work to be done.  More Than Welcome was launched to come alongside refugees and asylum seekers as they work to integrate into our communities by helping meet short-term needs while sharing the love of Christ for long-term hope.

Name: City of Hull Street Angels
Description:
City of Hull Street Angels are a volunteer-led charity dedicated to enhancing safety in Hull's city centre during weekend nights and Bank Holidays.

Trained volunteers patrol from 9pm to 3am, offering vital support to vulnerable individuals, including first aid, practical assistance, and emotional support. They work closely with emergency services, door staff, and the City Council to prevent incidents and ensure safe journeys home.

By providing early intervention, City of Hull Street Angels reduce pressure on emergency services and help create a secure environment for everyone enjoying Hull's nightlife. They are a recognisable and trusted presence, committed to making a positive impact in the community.

Name: Saskatchewan CISM Network
Description:
The Saskatchewan Critical Incident Stress Management (CISM) Network is the lead agency CISM and peer support services for public safety personnel and healthcare workers in the province. 

We are a charitable organization that began by providing ICISF standards for CISM/ Peer support and training for rural volunteer fire departments. Over the past three years, our network membership has grown to include members from Police, Fire, EMS, Corrections, Search & Rescue, Mental Health and Healthcare. We believe that by bringing together all public safety branches and healthcare, we can provide mentorship and the highest standard of CISM training available to those who give so much of themselves to their professions. 

The ICISF Model of Critical Incident Stress Management has more than 30 years of standardized practice. Validated by research, it is the most widely used peer support skill set worldwide, with more than one million peers trained around the globe.  

The Sask. CISM Network supports the development of peer-driven/ mental health supported CISM Teams within organizations in our province. Our authorized ICISF Instructors provide both fundamental and advanced level courses for CISM teams throughout Saskatchewan. We now offer resilience programs through the ICISF as well. 

We invite collaborative partnerships with local, provincial and nationally recognized organizations that share our vision and values for supporting the mental health and wellbeing of public safety personnel and healthcare workers in Saskatchewan. Partnerships include the International Critical Incident Stress Foundation, ICISF – Canada, Humboldt Strong Charitable Foundation, Saskatchewan Association of Fire Chiefs, Sask. Health Authority, EMS, Saskatchewan Public Safety Agency, PSP Net, etc.

Name: Arkesis
Description:
Àrkesis è un'azienda leader nel settore dei servizi socio-sanitari che opera con dedizione e professionalità per garantire il benessere della comunità.

Offriamo un'ampia gamma di servizi di trasporto e soccorso, sia con ambulanze che con altri mezzi speciali, oltreché professionisti sanitari in ambito intra ed extra ospedaliero, avvalendoci di personale altamente qualificato e costantemente aggiornato.

La nostra mission è quella di essere un punto di riferimento per i servizi di emergenza e assistenza sanitaria, fornendo risposte eccellenti a tutte le esigenze dei nostri utenti.

Crediamo fermamente nella qualità e nell'innovazione: per questo motivo abbiamo adottato un sistema di gestione per la qualità conforme ai requisiti della norma UNI EN ISO 9001:2015. Questo sistema ci permette di pianificare strategicamente, definire obiettivi chiari, gestire i processi in modo efficiente e misurare le nostre prestazioni.

Le risorse umane sono il nostro fiore all'occhiello: selezioniamo con cura il nostro personale e offriamo loro formazione continua per garantire la massima competenza e professionalità.

Siamo dotati di moderne ambulanze e attrezzature all'avanguardia che ci permettono di offrire un servizio sicuro e affidabile in ogni situazione.

Name: VAK Consulting, L.L.C.
Description:
About the Company
VAK Consulting, LLC provides specialized consulting services in emergency management training, exercise design, and program development for public agencies, airports, and private organizations. The firm focuses on creating engaging, scenario-driven experiences that improve operational coordination, strengthen preparedness, and make learning memorable.

Core Services

Custom Exercise Design: Development of tabletop, functional, and full-scale exercises aligned with HSEEP and EMAP standards — from natural disasters and cyber incidents to insider threats and complex continuity challenges.

Gamified Learning: Integration of game mechanics, role-play, and puzzle-based injects to drive engagement and decision-making under realistic conditions.

Program Evaluation: Creation of data-driven evaluation tools and improvement plan frameworks for readiness tracking, AAR development, and KPI reporting.

EOC & ICS Training Support: Facilitation of exercises and workshops designed to build team cohesion, improve situational awareness, and reinforce ICS/EOC operations.

Approach
Every project is designed around the client’s unique environment — blending creativity, analytics, and practical field experience to transform traditional exercises into dynamic learning events.

Sample Projects

Designed multi-phase role-playing tabletop game to teach EOC operations and resource management.

Developed airport and municipal functional exercises integrating simulated communications, inject pacing, and stakeholder coordination.

Built custom after-action evaluation dashboards linking objectives to measurable performance indicators.

Let’s Work Together
VAK Consulting helps agencies turn plans into practice — one exercise, one story, and one lesson at a time.

Name: Stichting Kinderhulp Dominicaanse Republiek
Description:
Sinds 1979 zamelt een groep vrijwilligers geld in om kinderen in de Dominicaanse Republiek een toekomst te geven; eerst als onderdeel van Wereldkinderen en vanaf 2011 als zelfstandige Stichting Kinderhulp Dominicaanse Republiek.
Sponsoren en donateurs uit Nederland steunen kinderen in de Dominicaanse Republiek om naar school te gaan. Ongeacht hun gezondheid, de financiele positie van hun ouders en de religie van de gezinnen.
Elk kind naar school!. Bijzondere aandacht besteden we aan de groep kinderen met een beperking. In dit land komt doofheid relatief veel voor. In het gewone onderwijs zijn dove kinderen kansloos.
De Nederlandse stichting werkt nauw samen met de Dominicaanse stichting Niños del Mundo Nigua. Deze bestaat uit ouders (meestal de moeders), docenten, oud-sponsorkinderen en een fulltime secretaresse Fanny Geronimo Rodriquez. Zij zorgen ter plaatse voor het uitvoeren van alle werkzaamheden en zij maken de keuze welke kinderen in aanmerking komen voor ons programma. Met jouw financiële bijdrage faciliteren we het onderwijs op verschillende manieren. We betalen het schoolgeld, de uniformen en de boeken van de leerlingen die in ons programma zijn opgenomen. Daarnaast organiseren en vergoeden we het transport van de dove kinderen naar de vaak veraf gelegen dovenscholen. En we helpen bij de aanschaf van leermiddelen of het aanstellen van een extra leerkracht. Verder hebben we een Universiteitsfonds voor leerlingen die naar de Universiteit gaan, maar voor wie de kosten te hoog zijn. Ten slotte stimuleren we de moeders om vakcursussen te volgen, zodat zij zelf een inkomen krijgen.

Daarnaast ondersteunen we de thuisbasis van de kinderen uit ons programma. Bv. door het vergoeden van medicijnen bij ziekte, het verschaffen van maandelijkse voedselpakketten voor grootouder gezinnen en hun kleinkinderen of bieden we hulp aan families zonder documenten bij de registratie tot officieel Dominicaans staatsburger.

Name: Noosa Heads Surf Life Saving Club
Description:
The Noosa Heads Surf Life Saving Club is located on the beachfront at Noosa Main beach on Queensland’s Sunshine Coast. This iconic Club has served the local community continuously since 1928 and is well known and respected in National and International Life Saving circles.

The first steps in the history of the Noosa Heads SLSC occurred on April 1, 1928 when Alexandra Headlands Club visited Tewantin and “the Heads” to give a display for local men. And so began the “Cooroy Royal Life and Surf Club”. A public meeting was held on 9th April 1928 at Cooroy and on April 30 the name was changed to Noosa Heads Royal Life and Surf Club. In December 1928, thirteen members gained their Royal Life Saving Society Still Water and Surf Bronze, thus qualifying to patrol the beach.

In 1929 a club House was placed on the beach and in May 1931 the name was changed to Noosa Life Saving and Surf Club. Since then the club has continued to patrol the beach with the proud record of no lives lost on Noosa Beach while lifesavers were on patrol.

In the 2008/2009 season the club underwent a major refurbishment. We are now very proud to have a clubhouse rated as one of the finest on the Sunshine Coast with “the best seat on the beach”. Our Supporters’ club is run very successfully by a committee and the Club Manager and provides a great source of finances for “active” needs to ensure we can continue to provide the best in public safety, community involvement and leadership, youth development, beach management and surf sports.

Willkommen bei Krisenklar, deinem Partner für durchdachte, praktische und alltagstaugliche Krisenvorsorge. Unsere Mission ist es, dir und deiner Familie Sicherheit und Gelassenheit in herausfordernden Situationen zu bieten – sei es bei Stromausfällen, Naturkatastrophen oder anderen Notlagen.

Was wir tun

Ob Lebensmittelvorräte, Notfallausrüstung oder praktische Anleitungen – wir bieten Lösungen, die nicht nur sinnvoll, sondern auch unkompliziert sind.

Dein Nutzen mit Krisenklar
Sicherheit und Gelassenheit: Du weißt, dass du für den Ernstfall bestens vorbereitet bist.
Zeitersparnis: Du musst nicht selbst mühsam recherchieren oder Vorräte zusammenstellen – wir übernehmen das für dich.
Qualität und Verlässlichkeit: Alle unsere Produkte sind geprüft, gut durchdacht und speziell für die Lagerung unter Alltagsbedingungen geeignet.
Nachhaltige Vorsorge: Unsere Lösungen passen sich deinem Lebensstil an und sind alltagstauglich – viele unserer Produkte kannst du auch in deinem normalen Haushalt verwenden.

Für wen wir da sind
Krisenklar richtet sich an alle, die proaktiv handeln wollen: Familien, Alleinstehende, ob jung oder alt. Wir unterstützen dich, auch ohne Fachwissen eine sinnvolle Vorsorge umzusetzen, die zu deinem Leben passt.

Unser Versprechen
Wir setzen auf Transparenz, Qualität und einfache Umsetzbarkeit. Unser Ziel ist es, Vorsorge so zu gestalten, dass sie dir ein sicheres Gefühl gibt, ohne kompliziert oder kostspielig zu sein.

Name: Stichting Mariniers Ziekenboeg (SMZB)
Description:
De Stichting Mariniers Ziekenboeg (SMZB) is 29 december 2015 per notariële akte opgericht. Via de sociale media, bleek dat er een steeds grotere groep (oud) mariniers ziek was, zonder dat anderen dit wisten. Ook raakten sommigen onopgemerkt in een sociaal isolement. Dit bleek onder andere uit berichten van (oud) collega-mariniers, zieken zelf, veteranen, hun gezinsleden en of vrienden en naaste familie, die hun zorgen uitten. Wij vonden het belangrijk om dat wel te weten van elkaar, zodat wij er voor elkaar kunnen zijn. 'Voor maten, door maten'

(Oud) marinemannen en vrouwen (o.a. veteranen), die werkzaam zijn geweest bij de Koninklijke Marine en hebben samengewerkt met de mariniers, kunnen eveneens opgenomen worden in de ziekenboeg.

De SMZB werkt volledig met zo’n 170 vrijwilligers en wordt financieel gevoed door particuliere donaties. Momenteel hebben wij de zorg voor ruim twee honderd en vijftig zieke en of vereenzaamde mannen vrouwen en kinderen, in Nederland én daarbuiten.

De vrijwilligers van de SMZB onderhouden contact tussen oud en actief dienende mariniers, hun gezinsleden en vrienden door het sturen van postkaarten, fruitmanden, bloemstukken en dergelijke. Ook leggen zij bezoeken af.

De SMZB is aangesloten bij de “Associatie van aan het Korps Mariniers verbonden Stichtingen en Verenigingen”. Dat betekent dat we veel contact hebben met andere Mariniersverenigingen, zoals bijvoorbeeld Keep Them Landing, het Saamhorigheidsdiner en de Mariniers Business Club.

U kunt op onze website via knop “contact” aangeven dat er iemand ziek is, of in een verzorgingstehuis, revalidatiecentrum of ziekenhuis is opgenomen, of gewoon wat extra aandacht nodig heeft.

Het Mariniers Uitvaartteam een onderdeel van de Stichting Mariniers Ziekenboeg welke (oud) Mariniers begeleid op hun laatste reis naar 'Wolk 1665' met beperkte militaire eer.

Name: Veterans Assistance Commission of Cook County
Description:
The Veterans Assistance Commission of Cook County (VACCC) is a county-funded government agency dedicated to serving Veterans and their families throughout Cook County. The VACCC provides emergency and interim financial assistance to eligible Veterans, offering critical support for essential needs such as food, housing, utilities, and burial or cremation expenses.

In addition to financial relief, the VACCC employs a team of accredited Veteran Service Officers (VSOs) who assist Veterans in navigating the complex U.S. Department of Veterans Affairs (VA) benefits and claims process. The Commission also maintains a trained Outreach Team which functions as a referral hub - connecting Veterans with a wide network of additional services and support systems beyond what the VACCC directly provides.

Though it operates independently from both the federal VA and the County’s administrative structure, the VACCC receives funding from Cook County to fulfill its mission: to advocate for and assist local Veterans and their families with dignity, urgency, and care.

Name: Sonoma County Fire District
Description:
Sonoma County Fire District is Sonoma County’s newest consolidated fire district. Our agency serves the Town of Windsor, Larkfield, Wikiup, Mark West, Mountain, Middle Rincon, Bennett Valley, Bellevue, Graton Casino, Fulton, Forestville, Guerneville, Rio Nido, Bodega Bay and the surrounding unincorporated areas. The men and women of the Sonoma County Fire District serve our communities with pride, integrity, and an unwavering commitment to excellence, as they have done for so many years.

We are a modern “all risk”; fire district, meaning we will respond to the needs of the community, regardless of the nature of the incident and begin the process of solving the problem to lead to a positive outcome.

Name: Allen and Co. Caribbean

We specialize in equipment sales, repair & maintenance, and fire & emergency safety training, supporting both government and private-sector organizations in aviation, disaster management, EMS/EMT, fire services, military, and security.

Our extensive product lineup includes emergency vehicles, search & rescue equipment, hazmat apparel, PPE, and tactical gear, sourced from world-class suppliers to ensure top-tier safety, reliability, and performance.

At Allen + Co., we are committed to equipping and empowering frontline professionals with the tools, technology, and training they need to respond to emergencies with confidence.

 Quality You Can Trust. Expertise You Can Rely On.

#EmergencySolutions #DisasterResponse #FireSafety #EMS #TacticalGear #AllenCoCaribbean

Name: Funerales Hernández
Description:
Fundada durante la Revolución Mexicana en el año de 1912 por el señor Don Francisco Hernández Cano, dio inicio en la capital de Chihuahua la primer funeraria que establece la excelencia en la prestación de servicios funerarios, la cual el día de hoy, a más de un siglo es FUNERALES HERNÁNDEZ a nivel nacional.
En la década de los 50´s, los señores Don Óscar y Doña Virginia Damiana fueron parte de la segunda generación al frente de la empresa, la cual ya se expandía en diferentes estados del país. Ambos destacaron por su gran visión y por ser pioneros en la prestación de servicios integrales funerarios (velación, cremación, panteón, nichos para cenizas y venta a previsión).
En la actualidad, FUNERALES HERNÁNDEZ tiene presencia en 13 estados de la República con más de 50 sucursales. La sólida organización es encabezada por la tercera y cuarta generación de la familia Hernández, acompañando década con década a las familias mexicanas en los momentos más difíciles con respeto, calidad en su servicio y celebrando la vida.

Name: T.A.C.T.
Description:
T.A.C.T. was founded by former police veteran Matt Lovasz. Matt was also a former master franchise owner and master instructor in the biohazard industry. Matt has been featured on the A&E show Hoarders on multiple episodes.

After building a very successful business in the biohazard and hoarding clean up industry, Matt decided to start T.A.C.T using everything he had learned in his police and biohazard careers and improve on them to create the ideal crime scene clean up franchise.
 
At T.A.C.T we use proprietary chemicals and the best training to be the most reliable biohazard and hoarding clean up company in the industry.

Our team of skilled technicians combines expertise with a personal touch, ensuring every upfit is meticulously crafted to meet the unique needs of our valued clients. At Security Upfitters, we prioritize reliability, performance, and customer satisfaction, making us the trusted partner for law enforcement agencies seeking top-tier vehicle customization services.

Name: Soil Keeper S.A.

Name: Quick Save Kit
Description:
Welcome to QuickSaveKit, your trusted partner in emergency and disaster preparedness. We specialize in providing high-quality medical emergency disaster kits tailored to meet the needs of individuals, families, and businesses.

Our mission is to ensure safety and preparedness for unforeseen events by offering reliable and comprehensive emergency kits. With each kit, we aim to empower you to face emergencies with confidence and peace of mind.

Our Vision

Join Our Journey
Follow us for updates, tips, and insights on how to stay prepared for emergencies. Together, let’s make safety a priority!

Name: hope4antioch
Description:
Op 6 februari 2023 werd Antiochië, ook wel Antakya genoemd, getroffen door verwoestende aardbevingen. Duizenden mensen verloren hun leven, velen worden nog vermist, en vrijwel de hele stad, inclusief huizen, scholen en ziekenhuizen, is verwoest. De schade aan infrastructuur, zoals waterleidingen en rioleringssystemen, maakt het leven extra zwaar.

Hoewel er gewerkt wordt aan wederopbouw, blijven veel mensen leven in tijdelijke onderkomens met beperkte toegang tot schoon water, hygiëne en onderwijs. Vooral kinderen en ouderen zijn kwetsbaar en hebben dringend hulp nodig.

Stichting Hope4Antioch zet zich in voor de wederopbouw van Antiochië, met projecten gericht op essentiële zorg, schoon drinkwater, veilige opvang en onderwijs.

Name: SOS Medevac International

It operates in medical evacuation, medical services for remote sites in Polynesia and international cruise ships, medical coverage for sports and cultural events. It also offers temporary medical reinforcements.

As a privileged partner of international insurers and assistance providers, SOS MEDEVAC INTL offers health consulting services, rigorous monitoring of tourists' medical files, and coordinates medical evacuations both inter-island in French Polynesia and internationally.

Name: Brothers Of Solidarity - Business BOS
Description:
WIJ REIKEN DE HAND AAN ZIJ DIE HET NODIG HEBBEN.

Elke week opnieuw staan de vrijwilligers van Brothers Of Solidarity klaar om minderbedeelden te steunen. We voorzien hen van verse maaltijden, kledij, benodigdheden en levensmiddelen.

Deze pagina is de pagina van Business BOS. Wil je als bedrijf je steentje bijdragen als Business BOS? Ondersteun ons met een maandelijkse bijdrage en help mensen in nood.

Wij opteren altijd voor een eerlijke en open manier van communiceren. Jij weet als Business BOS perfect waarin jij investeert tijdens onze samenwerking. Wij komen regelmatig bij elkaar om te netwerken en stellen ons netwerk ook open om in contact te komen. Een Brother of Sister is dus nooit ver weg.

Name: Mijn Narcist
Description: Ons bedrijf richt zich op die ondersteuning van narcistisch misbruik, welke helaas nog te vaak ontbreekt. We geven slachtoffers de kans om hun eigen boek uit te geven, met onze eigen uitgeverij. We geven hulpverleners, coaches en specialisten in narcistisch misbruik de mogelijkheid om hun eigen cursus te geven aan de Costa Brava. We werken samen met al deze specialisten en bemiddelen zelf actief bij Safe Houses ver weg uit Nederland. Samen met ervaringsdeskundigen helpen we slachtoffers een nieuw veilig leven op te bouwen. Bezoek onze website, liefst op een laptop of normale computer om uitgebreid al onze mogenlijkheden te zien.

Name: Doopsgezind Wereldwerk
Description: ‘Van de Heer is de aarde en alles wat daar leeft, de wereld en wie haar bewonen.’ Deze woorden van Psalm 24 roepen ons op samen gestalte te geven aan het grote experiment van Gods vrede en liefde in de wereld. De uitwerking is veelzijdig en omvat hulp en vredesbevordering in internationaal doopsgezind en oecumenisch verband. Onze grondhouding wordt bepaald door een drietal waarden die we herkennen in onze  doopsgezinde en anabaptistische traditie: geweldloosheid, wederkerigheid en duurzaamheid.

Welcome to ArixMed – Your Trusted Partner in Emergency Solutions

Name: 3R Strategic Solutions
Description:
Our mission is to empower communities and businesses to withstand crises, respond with precision, and recover stronger. By integrating the principles of Resilience, Response, and Recovery (3R), we deliver comprehensive, end-to-end solutions that enhance disaster readiness and create sustainable recovery outcomes.

Core Services
3R Strategic Solutions operates under a structured service framework, the “3R Services” model, which encompasses:
- Resilience – preparedness training, continuity planning, cybersecurity, infrastructure hardening, and personal/family readiness.
- Response – deployment of skilled emergency teams, drone operations, search & rescue, trauma care, logistics, and government/NGO support.
- Recovery – post-disaster cleanup, rebuilding partnerships, sanitation, economic recovery, and veteran-led workforce reintegration.

VISIT US HERE:
https://www.3rstrategicsolutions.com/

Name: CrisisCom - Emergency Management Consultants
Description:
CrisisCom is a Crises and Emergency consultancy firm based in Western Australia, founded by Dave Nieuwpoort. The company has experience in emergency management across sectors such as mining & resources, industrial & health facilities, government, maritime security, and business continuity services. 
CrisisCom aims to help clients meet industry standards by developing, implementing, and maintaining Security, Crisis, and Risk Management practices consistent with recognised guidelines. It provides audits for emergency response services to support organisational preparedness and risk reduction.
CrisisCom will develop and facilitate both practical and desktop exercises to evaluate organisational responses to crises. 
The company consultants design crisis management systems for client operations, relying on industry knowledge to advise before and during crisis events. 
In cases of crisis, CrisisCom can provide on-site consultation and strategic guidance during and after the event.

organisation der Welt.

Name: Sismograf
Description:
Türkiye’de kapsamlı bir deprem uygulaması bulunmamaktadır.

Sismograf projesinin ilk tohumları ekibimizdeki Berk Behçet Gerek tarafından 2022 yılında atılmış ve üstünde çalışılmaya başlanmıştır. Bu süreçte marka hakları (domain, sosyal medya profil isimleri v.b.) alınmış olup 2023 Kahramanmaraş depremleri sırasında ekibimizin üyelerinin çoğunluğunun depremzede olması sebebiyle önemi bir kez daha anlaşılmış ve üstünde yoğunlaşılmıştır.

Tüm ekip arkadaşlarımızın projemize katkısı çok büyüktür. Özellikle en basitinden projemize eklenen bir özellik birçok insanın hayatını kurtarabilme potansiyeli taşımaktadır.

Güncel durumumuzda mobil uygulamada bulunacak tüm özellikler belirlenmiş ve mantıksallığı araştırılmıştır. Projemiz patent alım süreci içerisindedir.

Ayrıca projemiz, Ostim Teknik Üniversitesi tarafından düzenlenen OSTİMTECH Pitching Day etkinliğinde 117 proje arasından birinci seçilmiştir.

Name: Southwest Regional Communication Center
Description:
In 1998 the city managers of DeSoto, Cedar Hill, and Duncanville came together to discuss the idea of pooling their public safety resources in an effort to reduce their operational costs. One idea that evolved was what we now know as the Southwest Regional Communications Center.

A year later the Southwest Regional Communications Center opened for business and the grand adventure began. There are many reasons why this partnership has been a good idea for its members. One is that these cities are approximately the same size and share similar socioeconomic demographics. They also share similar philosophies regarding public safety service delivery.

Another strong reason for this partnership is that each of these cities hold the distinction of being Home Rule cities. In 911 language a Home Rule city provides its citizens 911 services rather than passing this task to a political sub-division such as a 911 district.

Nos enfocamos en ofrecer soluciones de alta calidad, tecnología avanzada y máxima seguridad, diseñadas para enfrentar los desafíos más exigentes en el terreno.

Desde unidades móviles para atención médica y rescate hasta herramientas tácticas y equipamiento de protección, Brigata proporciona productos confiables que cumplen con los más altos estándares internacionales. Además, contamos con el respaldo de BService, nuestra red de servicio técnico con cobertura nacional, asegurando mantenimiento, refacciones y soporte continuo.

Más que una marca, Brigata es un aliado estratégico para profesionales de primera respuesta, ofreciendo soluciones personalizadas que optimizan su desempeño. Nuestra misión es potenciar la seguridad, eficiencia y operatividad de quienes protegen y salvan vidas, garantizando que siempre cuenten con el mejor equipamiento para cada misión.
