Name: Hibulance
Description:
At Hibulance, we're revolutionizing healthcare accessibility across the United Kingdom with technology and compassion. Our goal is clear: to eliminate long waits for medical help.

Our history stems from our founder's loss of a loved one due to lack of prompt medical response and a determination to spare others from similar pain.

Our services include:

Swift Ambulance: 
Need quick medical help? Our on-demand ambulance service is a click away. Skilled emergency responders powered by private ambualnce services  ensure your safety and comfort.

Hospital Rides: 
Heading to the hospital? Our on-demand rides ensure promptness. Our Healthcare-trained drivers offer rides that are comfy, and even people in wheelchairs can use them.

We also work with other ambulance groups to help people even more. Our goal is to make sure everyone can get help when they need it.

But that's not all. We're seeking partners who share our vision of compassionate and efficient healthcare. We're also inviting investors to fuel our growth and impact. Our aim is to reduce healthcare wait times and offer a quicker, kinder experience.

Hibulance isn't just words. We care about real people facing tough times. When you choose us, you're getting more than a ride; you're getting help from a caring team. Our technology-driven approach is making healthcare accessibility better and faster. We're here to help, and we want you to be part of the change.

Stay tuned – our ambulance and hospital ride services are on-demand. Wheelchair accessible, extra comfort, and spacious legroom come standard.

As we develop our services, we're getting ready for launch. Keep an eye on our social media channels for updates.

Join us at Hibulance. We're transforming healthcare, one ride at a time

To learn more about what we are doing, becoming a partner or investor, our team is happy to hear from you at corporate@hibulance.co.uk

The Hibulance
www.hibulance.com

Burnished in depths of the pandemic crisis and response efforts across every sector in the staffing and resource supply chain, our team of experts applies lessons-learned to implement systemic change models with tailored research-based approaches that solve seemingly intractable problems.

To help our clients and partners achieve their goals, we build coalitions, develop and implement innovative policy solutions, and find both technical and human efficiencies and pathways to rapidly cut through bureaucracy, stagnation, and barriers to ROI, efficiency, equity, and inclusion.

Our stakeholders are ordinary citizens, workers and their employers, marginalized communities, elected officials, creatives, corporations, foundations, NGOs, and government agencies at the local, state and federal levels who seek to amplify their ability to embrace change for good. We build big tents and respect all voices brought to the table.

Name: Right Now Restoration llc. Mold, Water, Fire & Smoke, biohazard trauma cleaning and Flood Damage
Description:
What is your typical process for working with a new customer?

We respond rapidly by phone offering suggestions for immediate aid, and thoroughly explain our processes. We then proceed to dispatch an emergency service tech to arrive within 2 hours.

What should the customer know about your pricing (e.g., discounts, fees)?

Our company uses xactimate pricing, which is the same structure we offer to the insurance companies. This means that even if your project is not covered by insurance, you will not be charged more than the insurance companies.

What education and/or training do you have that relates to your work?
 
NOVA FMS carries a current IICRC, HMR and MICRO certification. These are rigorous courses and ensure that our emergency crews are always equipped and ready to handle mold and wader damage, and other emergencies.

What types of customers have you worked with?

We as a company have and currently work in the hazardous material removal field with government, commercial, business and home-owners. Our projects range from small to very large with competitive pricing for all ranges of clientele.

What advice would you give a customer looking to hire a provider in your area of work?

Mold remediation, water damage, fire and smoke and hazmat cleanup are very difficult situations. We recommend to have a certified company complete the work and make sure to (get a warranty). This protects you in the instance of selling or if a family member gets sick post remediation. We guarantee our work for a period of 1 year with a 5 year guarantee available upon request.

What questions should customers think through before talking to professionals about their project?

In this circumstance, I recommend not thinking through anything, but to get ahold of a professional immediately.. These are health hazardous emergencies and should not be attempted alone.

Name: Gloucestershire & Worcestershire 4x4 Response (GW4x4R)
Description:
Welcome to Gloucestershire & Worcestershire 4X4 Response (GW4x4R), a member of the 4x4 Response UK network. 

GW4x4R was established in 2006 by a small group of members from a responsible four-wheel-drive association that recognised the need for a team of local volunteers that, using specialised vehicles with trained drivers, was able to respond to incidents in the region.

Many organisations simply can’t afford to maintain a sufficient fleet of four-wheel-drive vehicles for deployment during periods of severe weather or emergency. GW4x4R offers the services of its DBS-checked, BORDA-trained volunteer drivers – and the use of the volunteers’ own well-equipped vehicles – in these circumstances; and currently has agreements with numerous organisations including:

·       NHS Trusts
·       Regional Ambulance Services
·       County Councils
·       Town Councils
·       Care Homes & Hospices
·       Other Voluntary Services & Organisations

Please like and share this post to raise awareness of the organisation. We are currently looking to recruit volunteer controllers and responders across the two counties. 

Interested? Please email membership@gw4x4r.co.uk for further information.

Description:
The Washington County/Johnson City Emergency Management Agency is here to help you and your family prepare for emergency situations. In most instances, your first reaction to any emergency can make a big difference. A highway spill of hazardous materials could mean instant evacuation. A winter storm could confine your family at home. An earthquake or tornado could isolate you from basic services like gas, water, telephone, and electricity for several days. 

The more informed you are about the type of possible emergency situations that can occur, the better prepared you will be.

Name: Croce Bianca Milano - Sezione di Brugherio
Description:
Croce Bianca Milano è un’Associazione di volontariato che opera nel Primo Soccorso e nella Pubblica Assistenza. Nasce a Milano nel 1907, fondata da Don Bignami, per fornire gratuitamente assistenza sanitaria ai cittadini, secondo il principio "Ama il prossimo tuo come te stesso".



Iniziamo a prestare servizio a Brugherio nel 1995 come Delegazione di Carugate, con una sola ambulanza ed un ridotto numero di volontari, molto motivati. Nel tempo, con forza, carattere e costante impegno, l’associazione è cresciuta, tanto da diventare Sezione, dopo tre anni, nel settembre 1998.



Questa importante trasformazione ha consentito di ampliare notevolmente la gamma dei servizi offerti ai cittadini. Oggi ci occupiamo dei servizi di emergenza-urgenza 112, accompagnamento a visite specialistiche e sedute di dialisi, dimissioni ospedaliere protette, e presidio a manifestazioni sportive o di altro tipo.

myIasis is an emergency response app that connects users to emergency services with a single tap or gesture. It features real-time ambulance tracking, video call support, image recognition, user-added medical info, and it notifies emergency contacts and nearby responders instantly.

Our team advanced to the finals and won the Vodafone Campus Lab initiative! This achievement not only highlights our hard work but also validates the significant need for our app. We're thrilled to see our vision recognized and can't wait to continue innovating and making a positive impact.

We are a fully functional volunteer Wilderness/Ground Search & Rescue Unit, specializing in Wilderness Rescue.  We have specialized teams such as our Technical Rescue Unit, Marine Unit, "Ground Pounders" (Man-Tracking) Unit, Mounted Unit, K-9 Unit and ATV Unit.  We also have Medical Response capability, combined with our awareness programs, safety programs, and other resources.

We primarily serve a ten-county are which comprises Alachua, Citrus, Hernando, Lake, Levy, Marion, Pasco, Polk, Putnam and Sumter Counties.  We are also available to respond to other areas as requested by local Law Enforcement, Emergency Management, or Fire Rescue agencies, or other requesting entities.

We are the only Search and Rescue Team in Florida that is trained in Search and Rescue for Autism. As such, we are dedicated in finding lost or endangered individuals with mental health issues.

Name: Dedicated Helping Hands CPR
Description:
In 2021, our journey at Dedicated Helping Hands CPR began with a profound realization - the life-saving potential of CPR couldn't wait. As healthcare professionals with a passion for improving lives, we had experienced firsthand the critical importance of CPR in dialysis units, where every second counted. Our collective efforts had already saved numerous lives, and we knew that this invaluable skill needed to be accessible to everyone in our community.

Driven by this conviction, we embarked on a mission to make CPR training both affordable and convenient. We recognized that scheduling traditional classes could be challenging for many, so we decided to take the training to them. Our mobile services were born, allowing us to bring high-quality CPR instruction directly to our community's doorsteps. Our vision is clear - to ensure that everyone has the opportunity to become CPR certified because, in those crucial moments, a trained pair of hands can mean the difference between life and loss. At Dedicated Helping Hands CPR, we're not just teaching CPR; we're empowering heroes, one certification at a time. BLS renewal BLS Training, First Aid CPR AED training 100% Virtual CPR Classes

Name: U.S. Coast Guard Auxiliary Central Arkansas Flotilla 15-8
Description:
When you join the Coast Guard Auxiliary, you could find yourself on patrol saving lives and property, assisting in marine safety and environmental protection, radio watchstanding, educating the public in boating safety and much more. That’s what our members do. We don’t just train. We train and perform.

Since 1939 the U.S. Coast Guard Auxiliary has safeguarded our Nation’s maritime interests in the heartland, in the ports, at sea, and around the globe. Members from all walks of life bring their training and experience as a member of the uniformed volunteer component of the United States Coast Guard.

Our main goal is recreational boating safety and education, while acting as a force multiplier in support of Coast Guard authorized missions.

Today’s U.S. Coast Guard Auxiliary, with nearly 21,000 men and women, is a unique force that carries out an array of responsibilities touching almost every facet of the U.S. maritime environment.

The Coast Guard’s motto is Semper Paratus, meaning "Always Ready".

The overarching mission of the U.S. Coast Guard Auxiliary is to contribute to the safety and security of our citizens, ports, waterways and coastal regions. We will balance our missions of Recreational Boating Safety and Coast Guard Support with Maritime Homeland Security and other challenges that emerge as a result of our growing understanding of changes required in the post-9/11 era.

Name: DRK-Kreisverband Donaueschingen e.V.
Description: Das Deutsche Rote Kreuz rettet Menschen, hilft in Notlagen, bietet eine Gemeinschaft, steht den Armen und Bedürftigen bei und wacht über das humanitäre Völkerrecht – in Deutschland und in der ganzen Welt.

Name: Town of Guilderland EMS
Description:
GEMS is a municipal emergency response service staffed by a team of 45 EMTs and Paramedics.

Each Guilderland EMS ambulance is staffed minimally with a two-person team consisting of an Emergency Medical Technician and Paramedic. 

First response SUVs provide additional support facilitated by the Paramedic Supervisor, the Senior Paramedic Supervisor, the Director of EMS Operations, and the Director of EMS, and the Medical Director.

Coverage area is divided into four zones, allowing for quicker response times due to their strategic location.

Name: ZAKA Search and Rescue South Africa NPC
Description:
ZAKA International Rescue and Recovery, founded in 1995, is a world-renowned organization with a unique mission. They currently have 52 international volunteer units operating globally, of which South Africa is one.

 

ZAKA South Africa is staffed by a team of committed volunteers on call around the clock to deploy at any given second to local or global disasters. Our mission primarily is to save those who can be saved and honour those who cannot. The guiding philosophy of all of our work is to have the utmost respect for the living and the dead. Our mission is embodied through the everyday activities of our different teams: Light Urban Search and Rescue, Chessed Shel Emes, Relief and Rehabilitation, Fire Containment and Population Intelligence who work cohesively to deploy to disaster scenes and deliver assistance to affected victims as soon as possible.

Name: Erste Hilfe Schule HELPLUS
Description:
Erste-Hilfe-Kurse am Kind

Was musst du zuerst tun, wenn ein Kind nicht mehr atmet? Und wann setzt du den Notruf ab, wenn du alleine bist? Wenn es zu einem Notfall mit einem Kind kommt, sind es oft die eigenen Eltern oder Großeltern, die als Ersthelfer vor Ort sind. Es ist eine schreckliche Vorstellung, in einer solchen Situation hilflos zu sein. Leider kann man sich auf einen Notfall nicht vorbereiten. Aus diesem Grund haben wir einen speziellen Kurs für Erste-Hilfe am Kind und Säuglingen entwickelt. Dieser Kurs ist für alle (zukünftigen) Eltern, Großeltern, Onkel, Tanten, Babysitter und alle anderen Personen konzipiert, die regelmäßig mit Kindern zu tun haben. Wir vermitteln dir die entscheidenden Handgriffe und Maßnahmen, mit denen du im Notfall deinem Kind oder einem Kind in deiner Obhut helfen kannst.

Erste-Hilfe-Kurse für Fahrschüler

Erste-Hilfe-Kurs bei HELPLUS: Flexibel, praktisch und unabhängig von Bus und Bahn – der eigene Führerschein ermöglicht dir eine maximale Mobilität für den Alltag. Doch bevor du mit dem Führerschein starten kannst, ist es notwendig einen Erste Hilfe Kurs zu absolvieren. Die Erste Hilfe Schule HELPLUS veranstaltet in Lutherstadt Wittenberg eine Ausbildung im Bereich der Ersten Hilfe.

Name: M2S Systems Pty Ltd
Description:
M2S Systems specialises in the design and delivery of complete deployable shelter solutions that are truly capable. From bespoke one-off projects to complex multi-faceted operations, we bring extensive real-world experience and knowledge of emergency response, military, industry and NGO field applications.

Proven end-to-end capability - At M2S Systems, we provide over 20 years of design experience, deep industry knowledge and an unparalleled global network to provide the right shelter solutions that you actually need.

From clinical decontamination units, field hospitals to mobile military headquarters, our projects speak volumes to our commitment to quality, efficacy and a real understanding of what people in the field need.

Name: Arbeiter-Samariter-Bund BW Region Neckar-Alb
Description:
Der ASB in der Region Neckar-Alb ist ein Anbieter für Notfallrettung und qualifizierten Krankentransport in den Landkreisen Tübingen (TÜ), Reutlingen (RT) und Zollernalb (BL).
Der ASB betreibt in der Universitätsstadt Tübingen ab Juni 2024 einen 24/7 Rettungswagen und ein 24/7 Notarzteinsatzfahrzeug. Ein Wachenneubau für Tübingen beginnt 2024.
In Haigerloch-Owingen (BL) wird ein Tag/Nacht Rettungswagen vorgehalten. Die ländlich geprägte Region bietet eine anspruchsvolle Umgebung für eigenständige und zuverlässige Notfallsanitäter.
Der ASB in der Region ist eine anerkannte Ausbildungsstelle für Rettungs- und Notfallsanitäter.

NOTFALLSANITÄTER welche den Patient in den Mittelpunkt ihrer Arbeit stellen und auf der Suche nach eine neuen Herausforderung in einer Universitätsstadt sind- können jetzt die Chance nutzen! 
Denn „wir helfen hier und jetzt“ 
-im Team, professionell und mit Leidenschaft!

We strive to conduct our services with the highest degree of professionalism. We understand that those whose lives are dependent upon us may be in positions of extreme vulnerability. Description:
The primary aim of the Specialised Tactical Accident Response Team (S.T.A.R.T.) is to bring together various individuals who are able to respond to medical and rescue emergencies under one organisation. The organisation was established in 2020 and quickly gained momentum, attracting community members who combined their resources and expertise, responding to all types of emergencies.

The primary objective of S.T.A.R.T. was to ensure that the nearest available responders could promptly attend to each emergency, obtaining the correct information and relaying it back to the control centre, thereby allowing for the swift dispatch of appropriate resources, as required.

Name: Manchester Christmas Relief
Description:
Manchester Christmas Relief is a charity in Manchester, UK.

We are registered with the charity commission for England and Wales.

The aim of our Christmas appeal is to provide essential food and toys to people/families facing hardship, ensuring that everyone experiences the warmth, joy, and spirit of Christmas, regardless of their circumstances.

This Christmas, let’s come together to support families facing financial hardship and bring the joy of the season to those who need it most. Our Christmas appeal is dedicated to providing food hampers for people and gifts for children, ensuring that no person or family goes without a special Christmas meal or a present under the tree. For many families, the Christmas season can be a time of stress and worry rather than joy.

Rising living costs and financial difficulties mean that countless people struggle to provide even the basics, let alone gifts and festive meals. That’s where we step in. With your generosity, we deliver thoughtfully packed food hampers filled with all the essentials for a delicious Christmas dinner, as well as gifts for children, bringing hope and happiness into their homes. Your donations, whether financial or in-kind, make a real difference in the lives of those we support.

Together, we can lift the burden on those experiencing hardship and create cherished memories for children who might otherwise go without. This Christmas season, help us share the magic of Christmas with those who need it most. Let’s show that, with kindness and compassion, we can all make this season brighter for our community.

Description:
Our team will respond quickly, delivering a tank to your site, in a size that meets your needs.  We cover the southeast, from Louisiana to Virginia, and further when possible.  
Our premium black tanks keep your water clean because they do not allow light in and are NSF-61* certified.  
We earn the trust of our customers by doing what we promise, reliably, time and again.  Every aspect of our operation is designed to be better—from the tanks themselves, to how they are stored, to the team that gets them to your site.
(*NSF-61: This Standard establishes minimum health effects requirements for the chemical contaminants and impurities that are indirectly imparted to drinking water from products, components, and materials used in drinking water systems.  This Standard does not establish performance, taste and odor, or microbial growth support requirements for drinking water system products, components, or materials.)

Your lifeline in the sky—Williston Care Flight is here when every second counts.

Description:
Pioneered and managed an innovative emergency medical service assistance platform via Telegram amid the COVID-19 crisis, effectively bridging the gap between individuals in critical need and private ambulance services within our local community.

Strategically acquired and deployed three ambulances utilizing bootstrapped funding, ensuring prompt and reliable emergency response for individuals facing life-threatening situations.

Fostered strategic alliances with 26 additional private ambulance services, fostering collaborative partnerships that enabled seamless connectivity with clients and patients requiring urgent medical assistance.

Demonstrated astute financial stewardship, achieving a positive return on investment (ROI) that not only ensured the service's sustainability but also facilitated its expansion, providing vital lifesaving support to our local community.

We support programs that provide Medical Aid to individuals without access to adequate healthcare and that offer Educational Aid to students who lack the means to pursue their education. Name: KeThAl GmbH
Description:
Unser oberstes Ziel ist es, das Wissen um Erste Hilfe in der Bevölkerung zu festigen und die Notfallkompetenz unserer Mitmenschen nachhaltig zu stärken. Wir möchten jeden Menschen befähigen und bestärken, in unglücklichen Situationen professionell und adäquat Hilfe zu leisten, für sich selbst und für andere.

Dafür setzen wir auf eine frühzeitige und fundierte Aufklärung. Bereits in Kindertagesstätten führen wir altersgerechte Erste-Hilfe-Kurse für Kinder durch, bei denen wichtige Inhalte spielerisch und verständlich vermittelt werden.

Darüber hinaus vermitteln und führen wir anerkannte Erste Hilfe Schulungen für Betriebe, Vereine und Organisationen durch. Ergänzend dazu stellen wir für Interessierte einen kostenfreien Online-Erste-Hilfe-Kurs in einfacher Sprache bereit. So ermöglichen wir jedem den Zugang zu essenziellen Kenntnissen, professionell aufbereitet und leicht zugänglich.

Name: Coito
Description:
Située au cœur de l'Île-de-France, Coito Gravure est une entreprise spécialisée dans la gravure de tombes et monuments funéraires. Notre mission est de rendre hommage à vos proches avec des gravures d'une beauté intemporelle, réalisées avec une précision et un soin exceptionnels. Nous comprenons l'importance de chaque détail et mettons tout en œuvre pour vous offrir des créations qui perpétuent la mémoire de vos êtres chers avec dignité et respect.

Nos Services :
Gravure de Tombes : Nous réalisons des gravures personnalisées sur pierres tombales, stèles et monuments funéraires, avec des motifs, des textes et des symboles qui reflètent la vie et l'esprit de vos proches.
Rénovation et Restauration : Nous proposons des services de rénovation et de restauration de gravures anciennes, redonnant vie et lisibilité aux monuments funéraires avec un respect total pour leur histoire et leur intégrité.
Gravure de Plaques Commémoratives : Nos plaques commémoratives en granit, marbre ou autres matériaux durables sont conçues pour résister au temps et préserver le souvenir des êtres aimés.

Name: The Restoration Group
Description:
When damage affects your property, you need fast, reliable help from a team you can trust. That’s why we offer Trusted Damage Restoration Services Delaware, with skilled technicians available 24/7 to minimize further issues and get things back to normal quickly.

The Restoration Group brings years of experience and IICRC-certified expertise to every job, ensuring your space is restored with care and precision. You’ll always feel supported with clear communication, empathy, and honesty throughout the process, giving you the confidence that your property is in good hands.

Name: Premier Cleaning & Restoration Services
Description:
At Premier, we're your IICRC-certified service provider for keeping your home and business in pristine condition. Founded with a vision of exceeding expectations and providing superior service, we go beyond simply restoring – we beautify and revitalize your space with a combined focus on both restoration and cleaning services.

Experience and IICRC Certifications:
With well over 20 years of combined industry experience, our team tackles any challenge you might face. We're also proud to be an IICRC-certified firm, meaning our technicians are trained and tested to the highest industry standards. This ensures we possess the expertise, resources, and certifications to restore your property to its pre-disaster state, whether it's fire, water, or wind damage. But our expertise doesn't stop there. We also understand the power of a clean and polished environment, offering a comprehensive range of cleaning services for both residential and commercial spaces.

Your Comfort is Our Priority:
We know facing property damage or needing extensive cleaning can be stressful. That's why we prioritize clear communication, a personalized approach, and unwavering commitment to your satisfaction throughout the entire process. We're here to support you every step of the way, from the initial assessment to the final sparkling finish.

More Than Just Services:
We offer comprehensive solutions, from emergency response and damage mitigation to expert cleaning services tailored to your specific needs. Whether you require post-construction cleaning, deep furniture revitalization, pressure washing of your home, or meticulous tile and grout restoration, we're your trusted partner in complete property care.

Name: Strongside K9- Crisis Companions
Description: The purpose of Strongside K9 Crisis Companions is to provide trained therapy dogs and counseling services to support individuals and first responders affected by crises, fostering emotional resilience and well-being through compassionate, tailored interventions.

Name: FloodReady.dk
Description:
FloodReady.dk is designed to help property owners, renters and home buyers in Denmark navigate the challenges of flood risk through clear, actionable information.

- Access to official flood alerts enriched with detailed weather data, expected impact assessments, and real-time advice to protect your home
- User-friendly tools to evaluate your property's specific flood risk based on location and characteristics
- Concrete measures to safeguard your property against various flood types, from storm surges to heavy rainfall
- Easy-to-understand articles about flood types and consequeces, step-by-step preparation guides, and information on Danish regulations, insurance options, and public support

Name: ProtecTour SA
Description: At ProtecTour SA, we strive to provide tourists visiting South Africa with a safe and worry-free travel experience. Our innovative mobile emergency alert button offers you immediate access to our 24/7 incident management centre, ensuring that help is just a tap away, no matter the situation. Through our unwavering dedication to protection and service excellence, we aim to redefine the standards of tourist safety and support, ensuring memorable and secure journeys for all our clients. Travel in safety with ProtecTour SA.

Name: Safer Hometowns Project (SHPRD)
Description:
The Safer Hometowns Project for Resources and Development (SHPRD) is proud to offer multiple security options to the community at no cost. Our primary focus is to prevent and minimize damage typically caused by mass casualty incidents. Mass killings are on the rise in America, so we prioritize conducting active resistance training for schools, businesses, places of worship, and other disproportionately targeted areas.
Our efforts to address active killing incidents extend to helping our clients create standard operating procedures, response policies, and providing advice on how to structure these disproportionately targeted areas to make them more resilient. Examples of environment building include arranging furniture to benefit the defenders or reinforcing existing barriers at points of entry. This training and advice is not only applicable to mass killing prevention. Our procedures and training also address topics like evacuation, emergency medical response, environmental emergencies, and de-escalation techniques.

Name: Travis County Amatuer Radio Emergency Service
Description: This group is a county-level unit of the Amateur Radio Emergency Service (ARES), a part of the division and section structure of the ARRL‘s field organization. We consist of licensed amateurs who have voluntarily registered their qualifications and equipment for communications duty in the public service when disaster strikes.

Name: Property Damage Authority
Description: At Property Damage Authority, we pride ourselves on being a team of reliable and experienced contractors dedicated to excellence. Based in Southern California, we serve Los Angeles, San Bernardino, Ventura, Orange, and San Diego Counties with expertise in insurance restoration and remodeling services. Our values of professionalism, trust, and dedication drive us to deliver exceptional service and quality craftsmanship on every project we undertake

Name: BAS Restoration
Description:
We're BAS Restoration, your caring and responsive partner in disaster recovery, biohazard removal, and crime scene cleanup. Serving the Baltimore-Washington Metropolitan area, we've got over a decade of experience handling all kinds of property damage, from water and mold to sewage and more.

Name: National Services Day - Ireland
Description:
Seamus O’Neill, a retired school principal never forgot the support local Frontline Service workers gave to his school. “We’d had no money in the school and the army and the guards used to play football matches to fundraise for us. So in 2013 I was looking around and there was nothing in the State that recognised the work that the emergency and security services were doing.” He decided to do something about it. He pulled together volunteers from all the Frontline Services to form a non-profit organisation: FESSEF. Their mission would be to create events for the public to show their appreciation, while fostering greater collaboration between their services. In 2021 FESSEF was restructured and rebranded as National Services Day.

Every day, the frontline, emergency and security personnel of Ireland work tirelessly to keep the citizens of the State safe – often in challenging circumstances. Despite this, the average person rarely gets to meet the people doing this work outside the working environment and the frontline, emergency and security services rarely are provided with the opportunity to thank the public for their support and assistance.

National Services Day has been working hard to provide the public with opportunities to help foster better relationships to show the services appreciation for the support of the public and thank them for their continuing support.

At some point in their life every Irish person has been helped by frontline, emergency and security service staff. The National Services Day has created a much-needed focal point for the frontline, emergency and security services to acknowledge their appreciation to the public.

Аварійна служба "Сервіс Партнер ОСББ" - Ваш надійний партнер у вирішенні неочікуваних ситуацій. Ми працюємо на благо спільноти, надаючи швидку та професійну допомогу в аварійних випадках. 
   Наша команда досвідчених фахівців працює цілодобово, готова відгукнутися на будь-які екстрені виклики. Ми володіємо сучасним обладнанням та високим рівнем кваліфікації, що дозволяє нам ефективно та безпечно виконувати свої обов'язки. Від невеликих випадків до серйозного вирішення питань - ми завжди готові допомогти вам у будь-якій ситуації. 
   Робота з нами - це гарантія швидкого реагування та професійного підходу до вирішення проблем. Довірте свою безпеку нам і переконайтесь, що ви знаходитесь у надійних руках.

Name: Alpinmedic.ch - Lerne Leben Retten
Description:
Alpinmedic.ch ist ein führender Anbieter von Erste-Hilfe- und Notfallmanagement-Kursen in der Schweiz. Das Unternehmen hat sich darauf spezialisiert, Menschen mit den nötigen Fähigkeiten auszustatten, um in kritischen Situationen schnell und effektiv zu handeln, Leben zu retten und Verletzten zu helfen. Die Kurse decken ein breites Spektrum an Themen ab und sind sowohl für Einzelpersonen als auch für Organisationen geeignet, die ihre Mitarbeiter schulen möchten.

Ein wesentlicher Schwerpunkt von Alpinmedic.ch liegt auf dem Thema Leben retten. In den Kursen lernen die Teilnehmer die wichtigsten lebensrettenden Maßnahmen, wie beispielsweise die Durchführung der Herz-Lungen-Wiederbelebung (HLW) und den Umgang mit Notfällen. Das Wissen und die Fähigkeiten, um sofort richtig zu handeln, können in einer Notfallsituation den entscheidenden Unterschied machen.

Ein weiterer zentraler Kursbereich ist BLS-AED (Basic Life Support & Automatisierter Externer Defibrillator). Hier wird den Teilnehmern beigebracht, wie sie im Fall eines Herzstillstands mit einem Defibrillator (AED) umgehen und gleichzeitig lebensrettende Maßnahmen wie die HLW korrekt anwenden. Diese Fähigkeit ist besonders wichtig, da schnelle Reaktion in den ersten Minuten nach einem Herzstillstand lebensrettend sein kann.

Ersthelfer-Kurse sind ebenfalls ein wichtiger Bestandteil des Kursangebots. Diese Kurse richten sich an alle, die lernen möchten, wie sie in Notfällen schnell und richtig handeln können. Hier werden grundlegende Erste-Hilfe-Techniken vermittelt, etwa die Versorgung von Wunden, das richtige Verhalten bei Blutungen oder das Stabilisieren von Verletzten bis zum Eintreffen der Rettungskräfte.

Zusätzlich bietet Alpinmedic.ch spezialisierte Kurse für Notfallsituationen an. Diese richten sich an Apotheken, Arztpraxen, Drogerien sowie industrielle Betriebe mit Branchenspezifischen Themengebieten.

We train year-round in alpine, rope, water, and wilderness rescue techniques, serving the community with professionalism, courage, and commitment.

Name: CHAERT Charitable Society for Humanitarian Assistance & Emergency Response Training
Description: Founded in 2011, by a group of dedicated postgraduates specializing in disaster management (MSc Disaster management at that time) from School of Environmental Sciences , Mahatma Gandhi University, Kerala state of India. Registered under the society registration act, CHAERT was established with the aim of addressing the pressing need for disaster Mitigation, Preparedness, Response, and Recovery. As one of the first organizations of its kind in the country, we have been instrumental in promoting a sustainable, resilient future for vulnerable populations. Setting up a platform for a professional association of disaster management professionals from various academic background, we welcome all disaster management professionals - postgraduates from various academic streams to join our Linked-in page, where we foster a dynamic and collaborative community dedicated to advancing the field of disaster management. Our platform serves as a space for networking, professional development, and the exchange of innovative ideas in the unique academic and practice discipline of disaster risk reduction.

Name: SAVES (Somerset Accident Voluntary Emergency Service)

The doctors have specialised training in the emergency management of trauma and medical conditions outside hospital. They respond to incidents at the request of ambulance control in their own cars, which are equipped with blue lights and sirens for those with ambulance approved driver training (and green lights for those who have not). Name: A.U.M
Description:
Aquitaine Urgences Médicales est une société de transport de produits de santé spécialisée dans le transport d'organes. Nous sommes une entreprise dédiée aux services des gens et de la vie humaine. Notre mission principale est de fournir des services de transport de qualité supérieure pour les patients et les professionnels de la santé.
Notre équipe est composée de professionnels de la santé qualifiés et expérimentés, qui ont une connaissance approfondie des pratiques de transport de produits de santé. Nous sommes dévoués à fournir des services de transport d'organes rapides, avec une grande précision et dans des conditions optimales.
Notre société comprend l'importance de chaque minute dans le transport d'organes et c’est pourquoi nous sommes disponibles 24h/24 et 7j/7 pour répondre à vos besoins urgents. Nous travaillons en étroite collaboration avec de nombreux hôpitaux et compagnies de transport pour assurer le transport rapide et précis d'organes, tout en s'assurant que chaque étape soit effectuée de manière sûre et professionnelle.
Nous nous engageons à fournir un service de qualité supérieure à chaque client, en veillant à ce que tout notre personnel soit bien entraîné et expérimenté pour répondre à vos besoins précis en matière de transport d'organes. Nous sommes fiers de notre réputation et de notre engagement envers la vie humaine en général.
En tant que société de transport de produits de santé spécialisée dans le transport d'organes, nous sommes fiers de notre rôle crucial dans le traitement des urgences médicales. Grâce à notre expérience et à nos compétences en matière de transport, nous sommes la solution pour des services de transport d’organes fiables et de qualité.

Name: Chal-Brit regional EMS
Description:
Chal-Brit Regional EMS is a progressive, community-focused emergency medical services provider serving Chalfont Borough, New Britain Township, and the surrounding Bucks County region. Established to unify and strengthen emergency response capabilities, we are dedicated to delivering high-quality, compassionate pre-hospital care that protects lives and supports community well-being.

Operating 24/7, Chal-Brit EMS responds to thousands of emergency calls each year with a team of highly skilled paramedics, EMTs, and volunteer responders. Our fleet includes advanced life support (ALS) units, basic life support (BLS) ambulances, command vehicles, and specialized resources designed to ensure rapid, professional response to every type of incident—from medical emergencies and trauma to large-scale community events.

Beyond emergency response, we prioritize community engagement, education, and preparedness. Our team actively provides training such as CPR, Stop the Bleed, and Emergency Medical Responder programs, empowering residents and organizations with life-saving skills. We also partner with local municipalities, schools, and community groups to strengthen safety, resiliency, and collaboration.

Leadership is a cornerstone of Chal-Brit EMS. Our command staff, officers, and board of directors are committed to fostering professional development, innovation, and accountability. By emphasizing continuous training and the pursuit of professional certifications, we ensure our providers are equipped to deliver exceptional care in an evolving EMS landscape.

At Chal-Brit Regional EMS, excellence is more than a goal—it’s our standard. We are proud to serve as a trusted lifeline for our community, guided by integrity, readiness, and compassion. Whether responding to an emergency, supporting a public event, or investing in the next generation of EMS leaders, Chal-Brit EMS is always prepared to answer the call.

Name: Smile Shuttle Foundation
Description:
সকল সৃষ্টির মুখে হাসি ফোটানোর জন্য আমাদের এই "Smile Shuttle "
লক্ষ্য :
সুবিধাবঞ্চিত মানুষদের সামর্থ্য অনুযায়ী অর্থ ও শ্রম দিয়ে  সাহায্য  করা। 
উদ্দেশ্য :
খাদ্য, বস্ত্র ও শিক্ষা দিয়ে অসহায়দের পাশে দাঁড়ানো।
বি:দ্র: আমরা একই সাথে মানুষ ও প্রানীর জন্য কাজ করবো।
আমাদের কাজ সমূহের তালিকা:
১. প্রতি মাসে নির্দিষ্ট এলাকার রিক্সাওয়ালা মামাদের ক্যাপ বিতরণ করা,যাতে সারাদিনের কঠোর রোদ থেকে তাদের কষ্ট কিছুটা লাঘব হয়। 
২. প্রত্যেক মাসের এক দিন পথশিশুদের সাধ্যমত কিছু ভালো খাবার খাওয়ানো এবং তাদের পরিবারের জন্য কিছুটা খাবার দিয়ে দেওয়া।
 ২.১ তাদের নিজেদের নাম লিখতে শেখানো এবং বর্ণপরিচয় ও বাংলা লেখা পড়তে শেখানো। ইংরেজি অক্ষর ও আরবি হরফ চেনা। অংকের যোগ বিয়োগ গুন ভাগ শেখানো। 
৩.শীতের সময় উষ্ণ কাপড় যাদের প্রয়োজন তাদের কাছে পৌছে দেয়া।
৪. রাস্তায় কোন অসুস্থ প্রাণী ( কুকুর, বিড়াল, পাখি ইত্যাদি) পেলে তাকে সুস্থ করে তুলতে যথাযথ ব্যবস্থা নেয়া। 
৫. প্রতি মাসে নির্দিষ্ট পরিমাণ খাবার রাস্তায় কুকুর বিড়ালের মধ্যে বিতরণ করা।
আমাদের সকল  প্রজেক্ট Smile Shuttle Foundation  এর সদস্যদের দেয়া চাঁদা এবং আপনাদের ডোনেশন থেকে পরিচালনা করা হবে। ফান্ডের উপর নির্ভর করে প্রজেক্ট সংখ্যা বাড়ানো হবে। 
প্রজেক্ট: স্মাইল শাটলের যেকোন প্রজেক্টে ধারণকৃত পিকচার এবং ভিডিও এর সংরক্ষণ ও প্রচারের অধিকার[Copyright] স্মাইল শাটলের রয়েছে। আপনি প্রজেক্ট প্রাঙ্গণে উপস্থিত থাকলে এ বিষয়ে আপনার সম্পূর্ণ একমত তা ধরে নেয়া হবে। 
Mahfuz Rahman,
Co-founder,
General Secretary,
Smile Shuttle Foundation.

Name: PFEW Welsh Affairs Lead
Description:
The Police Federation of England and Wales (PFEW) established its Welsh Affairs to ensure that its members were given a strong and consistent voice in Wales.

Zac Mader and Leigh Godfrey are co-leads of the organisation.

The committee provides an effective link between PFEW, the Welsh Parliament (Senedd Cymru), Members of the Senedd (MS) and the chief officers and Police and Crime Commissioners in the four Welsh forces – Dyfed Powys, Gwent, North Wales and South Wales. It also liaises with a range of devolved and non-devolved public bodies, representing Federation members’ views.

Sefydlodd Ffederasiwn Heddlu Cymru a Lloegr (PFEW) ei Is-bwyllgor Materion Cymreig i sicrhau bod gan ei aelodau lais cryf a chyson yng Nghymru.

Mae’r pwyllgor yn ddolen effeithlon rhwng PFEW, Senedd Cymru, Aelodau o’r Senedd a ‘r prif swyddogion a Chomisiynwyr Heddlu a Throseddu yn y pedwar heddlu yng Nghymru – De Cymru, Dyfed Powys, Gogledd Cymru a Gwent. Mae hefyd yn cysylltu gydag amrywiaeth o gyrff cyhoeddus a gafodd eu datganoli a heb eu datganoli, gan gynrychioli barn aelodau’r Ffederasiwn.

Name: Croce Azzurra Trezzo sull'Adda
Description:
La Croce Azzurra, nata per il semplice trasporto sanitario, evolve nel miglioramento dei servizi fino a svolgere: l’emergenza urgenza in convenzione con il 118, l’accompagnamento degli invalidi, degli anziani e il supporto sanitario a manifestazioni sportive e ad eventi culturali.

Lo Statuto costitutivo del 1980 prevede che “l’Associazione sia apartitica e che abbia lo scopo di porgere il suo pronto ed efficace soccorso nei pubblici e privati infortuni mediante il trasporto di feriti e ammalati nonché di collaborare con altre associazioni, enti, e iniziative filantropiche prestando la propria opera; senza alcun scopo di lucro (Art. 2)”.

Animata da questi ideali, l’Associazione si adopera con ogni sforzo per la promozione e la diffusione della conoscenza sanitaria e della cultura volontaristica, incoraggiando i giovani ad intraprendere un cammino nel mondo della solidarietà e della sofferenza, accompagnati e guidati dal rinnovato e mai sottovalutato impegno dei militi più anziani che vivono anche l’età della pensione con un ruolo attivo nella società.

Name: Rescue Life Charity

Our mission is to enhance emergency response capabilities, promote health education, and provide vital resources to those in need. By offering comprehensive training and support, we strive to create safer environments and empower individuals to save lives and contribute to the well-being of society as a whole. Join us in our noble cause to make a difference and rescue lives every day.

Description:

Neden Acil Uygulamalar?

Yetersiz altyapılar, her an yaşanabilecek doğal afetler, yarım işçilikli teknik destekler ve zaman zaman çekmeyen internetler... Böyle durumlarda, en kritik anda ihtiyacınız olan telefon numaralarına ulaşmak zor olabilir. İşte bu yüzden Acil Numaralar tam da elinizin altında olması gereken bir uygulama.

Her Zaman Hazır: Acil durumlarda tek bir tuşla yardım çağırabilir, güvenlik güçlerine, sağlık hizmetlerine ya da teknik desteklere anında ulaşabilirsiniz.

Kapsamlı Erişim Listeleri: T.C. resmi destek hatları, bankalar, beyaz eşya firmaları, GSM operatörleri, internet sağlayıcıları gibi birçok önemli numaraya tek bir uygulamadan erişebilirsiniz.

Hızlı İhbar: Çalıntı banka kartlarınızı hızlıca ihbar edebilir, arızaları ve ihbarları ilgili birimlere uygulama içerisinden arama butonuna basarak anında iletebilirsiniz.

Kendi Listeni Oluştur: En çok kullandığınız numaraları favorilere ekleyip, hızlı arama listeleri oluşturabilirsiniz. Böylece ihtiyaç anında zaman kaybetmezsiniz.
İnternetsiz Kullanım: Acil durumlarda internet bağlantınız olmasa bile tüm önemli numaralar elinizin altında olacak.

Bizimle İletişime Geçin:

Tüm öneri ve sorularınız için bize ulaşmaktan çekinmeyin. Sizden gelecek geri bildirimler ile uygulamamızı sürekli geliştiriyoruz.

Gelin, Acil Numaralar ile hayatınızı biraz daha kolaylaştıralım!

Name: Auckland Response Team - South (NZ-RT23)
Description:
New Zealand Response Team 23 (NZ-RT23) is a nationally accredited volunteer emergency response team serving South Auckland and the wider region. Established to strengthen local and national resilience, NZ-RT23 is part of the New Zealand Response Team network and operates in close partnership with Auckland Emergency Management and emergency services.

Accreditation confirms that NZ-RT23 meets national standards for capability, safety, governance, and deployment readiness. The team has undergone a rigorous assessment process covering leadership, teamwork, technical skills, communications, logistics, welfare, and operational safety. This process has ensured the team is trained, equipped, and ready to support communities when they need it most.

NZ-RT23 is made up of dedicated volunteers from diverse backgrounds who train regularly to maintain operational readiness. The team’s capabilities include Civil Defence Centre support, welfare assistance, storm and flood response, light rescue, reconnaissance, and community support functions. Members are trained to integrate seamlessly with partner agencies including Fire and Emergency New Zealand, Hato Hone St John, New Zealand Police, and local councils.

As a deployable national response asset, NZ-RT23 can support local, regional, and national operations during emergencies and disasters. The team places a strong emphasis on professionalism, inclusivity, and continuous improvement, with a clear focus on serving communities safely and effectively.

Beyond emergency response, NZ-RT23 is committed to building community resilience across South Auckland through preparedness activities, training, exercises, and public engagement. The team’s work reflects a shared commitment to manaakitanga, teamwork, and service, ensuring communities are supported before, during, and after emergencies.

NZ-RT23 stands as a proud example of volunteer-led capability, ready to respond, support, and serve when it matters most.

Soustředíme se na obchodní případy s kapitálovou účastí od jednotek až po vyšší desítky milionů korun. Nadlimitní, ale perspektivní případy dovedeme syndykovaně financovat s partnery vyznávajícími podobnou obchodní filozofii. Name: EvacEnable
Description:
When disaster strikes, chaos shouldn’t be the standard. EvacEnable is the central platform that connects every part of the animal evacuation process. It unites horse owners, trailer drivers, barns, facilities, and emergency coordinators on one real-time network to ensure safe, organized, and traceable evacuations.
By combining rideshare, property share, and asset management technology, EvacEnable transforms confusion into coordination—giving everyone from individual owners to state agencies the visibility and tools they need to protect animals during emergencies.
For Horse Owners: When every minute counts, EvacEnable makes it simple to get your horses out safely. With a click of a button, you can request a trailer, secure space at a safe evacuation center, and track your horses in real time—providing peace of mind and ensuring their care information is always available to those helping them.
For Barn Owners and Managers: Register your facility to become part of the evacuation network. You can offer temporary space during emergencies, manage evacuees with ease, and specify how many horses you can accommodate. Each arriving horse includes the information you need to identify and care for them properly. When it’s time for them to move back, the platform safeguards their care, custody, and control transfer back to owners.
For Trailer Drivers: EvacEnable automatically matches evacuation requests with available trailers in your area. Drivers receive clear pickup and drop-off details, pre-approved routes, and facility ETAs—eliminating confusion and wasted time so you can focus on safe transport.
For Evacuation Centers and Agencies: EvacEnable provides a real-time command-center view of all evacuations in progress. Coordinators can see requests, trailer locations, facility capacity, and horse details—allowing them to reroute resources, identify safe routes, and reduce lost time at staging sites.
EvacEnable brings order, safety, and confidence to every evacuation.

Name: gcsmissions
Description:
The Great Commission Society (GCS) is a faith-based humanitarian organisation dedicated to delivering spiritual and physical aid to those in need around the globe. As a non-denominational evangelical Christian organisation, we strive to meet the needs of individuals affected by war, poverty, natural disasters, disease, and famine while communicating the transformative message of the Gospel.

With over 28 years of experience operating in 125 countries, GCS responds to urgent humanitarian challenges and promotes social justice through educational programs. We collaborate with governments, local councils, churches, charities, and various organisations to mobilise volunteers and resources, ensuring our efforts effectively reach those in need.

As a faith-based organisation committed to principled humanitarian action, GCS operates independently and without bias, adhering to the Charter for Faith-Based Humanitarian Action. We do not discriminate and actively seek to serve all communities in need, regardless of race, religion, gender, or socioeconomic status, embracing the diverse fabric of society.

Our initiatives encompass a wide range of efforts, including—but not limited to—the following impactful areas:

- Rehabilitation of Offenders: Promoting behavioural transformation.
- Combating Modern Slavery: Addressing bonded labour and trafficking.
- Educational Support: Tackling knife crime and bullying in schools.
- Social Enterprise: Supporting deprived communities.
- Food Security: Providing vital food assistance.
- Access to Clean Water: Ensuring safe water and sanitation.
- Medical Support: Distributing essential medicines.

GCS is often a first responder and a key provider of assistance during crises, remaining on the ground long after other organisations leave. Together with our global partners, we make a meaningful difference in the lives of vulnerable populations.

Join us in bringing hope, compassion, and spiritual renewal to those in need.

Name: EMERGENZ
Description:
EMERGENZ is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit dedicated to transforming how emergency medical services (EMS) and mobile healthcare are delivered, particularly in times of crisis. Founded in 2023 by experienced first responders, clinicians, and technologists, EMERGENZ grew out of lived experience: leaders who directed pandemic response, disaster deployments, and frontline EMS operations recognized that the existing system could not keep pace with modern demands.
At the heart of our model is Mobile Health, a framework uniting healthcare, public health, public safety, and disaster operations into a cohesive, interoperable system. We streamline communication, improve coordination, and deliver personnel, equipment, and supplies where they are needed most.
Our federation model empowers affiliate organizations to retain autonomy while benefiting from shared scale, pooled resources, and joint advocacy. This structure ensures that diverse EMS providers, whether urban, rural, or volunteer, can access the tools, training, and infrastructure needed to remain resilient.
Our federation’s operations extend through the New York City metropolitan area via the Mobile Health Alliance, whose partners include long-established EMS providers in Brooklyn, Queens, and neighboring regions of Northern New Jersey.
EMERGENZ’s leadership team brings a combined several decades of field experience across EMS, rescue, mobile health, emergency communications and disaster operations. Its founders and advisors include EMTs, nurses, dispatchers, firefighters and hazardous materials specialists who have all held multiple organizational leadership positions and led operations during the COVID-19 pandemic and other large-scale emergencies. Their backgrounds span clinical education, systems design, and coalition building, giving EMERGENZ the unique ability to translate field-level challenges into scalable, data-driven solutions. This lived expertise anchors our organization.

QUIENES SOMOS
Los bomberos son esenciales para la seguridad de nuestras comunidades locales.
Hace apenas una década, un incendio grave en Nosara significaba esperar a que el Departamento de Bomberos regional viajara más de una hora por caminos en mal estado. A pesar de sus mejores esfuerzos, a menudo llegaban demasiado tarde. En noviembre de 2009, un residente local decidió que este retraso de vida o muerte exigía una respuesta local. Armado con equipo básico de extinción de incendios donado, lanzó un grito de guerra para los bomberos voluntarios. El llamado fue respondido por un pequeño y comprometido grupo de servidores públicos desinteresados y listos para emprender la lucha.

Una década desde su formación, estos voluntarios han salvado innumerables hogares, vidas y medios de subsistencia, y se han convertido en un recurso comunitario indispensable y muy utilizado. Permanecen de guardia día y noche para estar donde sea necesario en cualquier momento. Y la única razón por la que siguen existiendo es a través de sus donaciones.

Aunque altamente capacitados, estos hombres y mujeres, muchos de los cuales tienen trabajos de tiempo completo y/o familias, no son profesionales. Al principio, los gastos como equipo de protección, herramientas, transporte, suministros y mucho más, salían de su propio bolsillo. A medida que el volumen de llamadas se disparó, este modelo de financiación se volvió insostenible. Hoy en día, la única razón por la que el equipo de bomberos voluntarios de Nosaras es más fuerte, más rápido, mejor capacitado y mejor equipado que nunca es por las donaciones que reciben.

Name: NorseAid Norway
Description:
NorseAid is a non-profit organization, founded to provide humanitarian assistance in war and disaster areas. The organization's focus today is the situation in Ukraine. The plan is to first provide emergency assistance and then assist with help to become self-reliant. This includes assisting during the reconstruction work when the hostilities are over. In our opinion, there will be a great need for assistance for a long time to come. 

Having 100% control over what we send to Ukraine is important to us, so we drive the donated equipment all the way to the user. This means following the clothes until they are on the person. We ourselves go to the places we have as focus areas, at and on the front in eastern Ukraine. We do this through our cooperation with local humanitarian associations operating in the areas.

We collect equipment at our central warehouse in Hønefoss. Here the equipment is sorted and the necessary maintenance and repairs are carried out. This is done with the help of volunteer work. These volunteer work is very popular and creates integration. There are often 20-30 people, Norwegians, Ukrainians and other nationalities present who work together for a common goal. The equipment is packed onto trucks and cars and we drive everything ourselves.

Name: SARtec Platform
Description:
SARtec Platform is a technical decision support platform intended to assist the organisation, coordination, and analysis of land based search operations. It is designed for use by search coordinators, planners, and teams operating in complex, time critical, and information constrained environments.

Land search operations are characterised by uncertainty, incomplete data, cognitive load, and coordination challenges across people, terrain, and time. SARtec Platform exists to support structured reasoning in these conditions. It does not direct operations, replace human judgement, or assert operational authority. All decisions remain the responsibility of the users and the organisations under whose governance they operate.

The platform focuses on representing, aggregating, and visualising information relevant to land search planning and execution. This includes spatial data, search intent, task allocation, team movement, temporal sequencing, and evolving assumptions. Where probabilistic or analytical methods are used, they are intended to inform judgement rather than prescribe actions. The system is designed to make uncertainty explicit, assumptions visible, and decisions auditable.

SARtec Platform is being developed with an evidence informed mindset, drawing on established land search doctrine, operational practice, and relevant research. It prioritises clarity, predictability, and explainability over automation or optimisation. The platform is intended to complement existing tools and practices rather than replace them, and is designed to interoperate with widely used mapping and field systems.

The project is explicitly non commercial and non authoritative in intent. It is not a command and control system, does not issue instructions, and does not claim to improve outcomes or guarantee results. Its purpose is to reduce avoidable coordination failure, cognitive overload, and loss of institutional knowledge during and after searches.

Integral to our platform is a dedicated 24/7 call centre that operates around the clock to provide continuous support and seamless coordination of emergency responses. This crucial service enhances our digital offering by ensuring that no call for help goes unanswered, effectively bridging users and service providers to facilitate quick, well-managed interventions. For our suppliers, our specially designed app streamlines the management of emergency requests nationwide, enabling them to operate efficiently, respond promptly, and maintain high standards of service.

Partnering with All-In-1 Emergency means joining a renowned and dependable brand committed to safety and well-being, promoting a community where emergency help is always within reach. Whether you face a personal safety threat, a medical emergency, or a roadside breakdown.

Description:
𝗗𝗲𝗿 𝗟𝗶𝗼𝗻𝘀-𝗖𝗹𝘂𝗯 𝗦𝗮𝗮𝗿𝗯𝗿ü𝗰𝗸𝗲𝗻 ist Teil der weltweiten Lions-Organisation – einer der größten Service-Organisationen der Welt. Unter dem Leitspruch We Serve engagieren wir uns für soziale, kulturelle und gesellschaftliche Projekte in 𝗦𝗮𝗮𝗿𝗯𝗿ü𝗰𝗸𝗲𝗻 𝘂𝗻𝗱 𝗱𝗲𝗿 𝗥𝗲𝗴𝗶𝗼𝗻.

𝗗𝗮𝗳ü𝗿 𝘀𝘁𝗲𝗵𝗲𝗻 𝘄𝗶𝗿:
• 𝗦𝗼𝘇𝗶𝗮𝗹𝗲𝘀 𝗘𝗻𝗴𝗮𝗴𝗲𝗺𝗲𝗻𝘁 𝘃𝗼𝗿 𝗢𝗿𝘁
• 𝗙ö𝗿𝗱𝗲𝗿𝘂𝗻𝗴 𝘃𝗼𝗻 𝗕𝗶𝗹𝗱𝘂𝗻𝗴, 𝗞𝘂𝗹𝘁𝘂𝗿 𝘂𝗻𝗱 𝗧𝗲𝗶𝗹𝗵𝗮𝗯𝗲
• 𝗨𝗻𝘁𝗲𝗿𝘀𝘁ü𝘁𝘇𝘂𝗻𝗴 𝘃𝗼𝗻 𝗯𝗲𝗻𝗮𝗰𝗵𝘁𝗲𝗶𝗹𝗶𝗴𝘁𝗲𝗻 𝗠𝗲𝗻𝘀𝗰𝗵𝗲𝗻 𝘂𝗻𝗱 𝗜𝗻𝗶𝘁𝗶𝗮𝘁𝗶𝘃𝗲𝗻
• 𝗚𝗲𝗺𝗲𝗶𝗻𝘀𝗰𝗵𝗮𝗳𝘁, 𝗔𝘂𝘀𝘁𝗮𝘂𝘀𝗰𝗵 𝘂𝗻𝗱 𝗲𝗵𝗿𝗲𝗻𝗮𝗺𝘁𝗹𝗶𝗰𝗵𝗲𝘀 𝗛𝗮𝗻𝗱𝗲𝗹𝗻

Der Lions-Club Saarbrücken bringt Menschen zusammen, die Verantwortung übernehmen und aktiv etwas bewegen wollen – 𝗴𝗲𝗺𝗲𝗶𝗻𝘀𝗮𝗺, 𝘃𝗲𝗿𝗹ä𝘀𝘀𝗹𝗶𝗰𝗵 𝘂𝗻𝗱 𝗺𝗶𝘁 𝗛𝗲𝗿𝘇.

 Folgen Sie uns und begleiten Sie unsere Projekte, Aktionen und Veranstaltungen.

Name: Emergency Communications Professionals of British Columbia (Local 8911)
Description:
CUPE 8911 represents over 700 emergency communications professionals employed by E-Comm Emergency Communications for BC Inc. The union covers 9-1-1 operators, call takers, dispatchers, IT, and support staff who:
 - Answer 99% of initial 9-1-1 calls in British Columbia
 - Dispatch for 34 police agencies and 40 fire departments
 - Handled 2.3 million 9-1-1 calls in 2023
 - Operate 24/7, 365 days a year

Founded in 2020 after splitting from CUPE 873-02, the union was originally established when E-Comm took over Vancouver Police Department's call and dispatch services in 1997. Their core values include solidarity, equality, democracy, integrity, and respect.

The organization is headquartered on the traditional territories of the xʷməθkʷəy̓əm (Musqueam), Sḵwx̱wú7mesh (Squamish), and səlilwətaɬ (Tsleil-Waututh) peoples, located in Vancouver and Burnaby, with additional worksites in Saanich on Vancouver Island.

Description:
Somos la agrupación de voluntarios de Protección Civil de Ronda (Málaga). Nuestra agrupación, con un total actual de 50 efectivos, lleva en activo al servicio de la ciudad desde 1985. Gracias a las formaciones recibidas y trabajo constantes, velamos por la seguridad de los ciudadanos en servicios preventivos y en emergencias, activadas directamente por el 112. Las distintas Unidades que conforman Protección Civil de Ronda permiten a nuestros voluntarios desarrollar sus habilidades únicas, convirtiendo a cada uno de ellos en un miembro valioso de esta agrupación.  Nuestra labor diaria se extiende más allá de la ciudad de Ronda, realizando servicios y actuaciones de emergencia en más de 30 pueblos, además de aquellas agrupaciones de cualquier procedencia que soliciten nuestra colaboración. 
Somos un grupo comprometido que busca mejorar día a día y al cual siempre, sea cual sea tu vocación, procedencia o el tiempo del que dispongas, serás bienvenido.
PROTEACCIÓNATE. Pues, en palabras del coronel James H. Doolittle, "no hay nada más fuerte en el mundo, que el corazón de un voluntario".

Name: Generation for African Relief and Development (GARAD) Organization
Description:
The Generation for African Relief and Development (GARAD) Organization, established on December 21, 2020, is a non-profit, non-governmental organization dedicated to supporting marginalized communities in Ethiopia, particularly in the Somali Regional State. GARAD's mission is to bridge the gap between relief and development efforts, focusing on vulnerable groups such as women, children, the elderly, and disabled individuals.

GARAD's vision is to create an empowered African society where vulnerable groups can live with dignity and access essential services. The organization aims to address the root causes of poverty and marginalization through multi-sector interventions, including GBV, agricultural production and food security, education and vocational training, and water, sanitation, and hygiene (WASH) initiatives. The organization’s primary target communities are IDPs, Marginalized, Vulnerable and refugee with focus of women rights and empowerment.

Name: Stichting Inzetreddingshond Nederland (SIN)
Description:
Inzet Reddingshond Nederland is de landelijke schakel tussen gecertificeerde burger-reddingshondenteams en de overheid. Sinds 1992 levert de stichting, opgericht op verzoek van het Ministerie van Binnenlandse Zaken, een waardevolle en actieve bijdrage aan urgente zoekacties naar vermiste personen onder leiding van de Politie.

Wij coördineren de inzet van inzetbare burger-reddingshondenteams en werken daarbij nauw samen met de afdeling Speur- en Specialistische Dieren (SSD/LX) van de politie. Afspraken over kwaliteitseisen, kwaliteitsborging, uitvoering van inzetten en toelating tot door de politie gecoördineerde zoekacties zijn vastgelegd in een samenwerkingsovereenkomst met bijbehorende uitvoeringsregels.

Tijdens inzetten bundelen wij specialistische kennis met partners als het Veteranen Search Team, het Coördinatie Platform Vermissing en de Stichting Opsporings Apparatuur Drenkelingen. Samen met politie-eenheden, speurhonden, helikopters, drones en bereden politie ontstaat zo een krachtige, flexibele en snelle operatie.

Naast inzetcoördinatie verzorgen wij de certificering van reddingshondenteams en borgen wij dat hondengeleiders, buddy’s en inzetleiders blijven voldoen aan de kwaliteitseisen van de politie. Opleiding van honden gebeurt door de aangesloten organisaties zelf; wij brengen mensen en expertise samen. Uniek in Europa is onze werkwijze met gemixte teams, waardoor bij aankomst direct gestart kan worden met zoeken, met minimaal tijdverlies en maximale effectiviteit.

Missie
Betrouwbaar, professioneel en snel bijdragen aan het terugvinden van vermiste personen samen, vrijwillig en gecertificeerd.

Name: ICE-ID ME
Description:
Every second matters—whether it’s an emergency, equipment handover, or routine safety check. ICE-ID Me transforms Occupational Health & Safety Management Systems (OH&SMS) into proactive, lifesaving tools aligned with ISO 45001 standards. Leaders gain the power to act faster, manage risks, and protect lives, all while streamlining operations.

Our RTRV stickers take asset management to the next level with seamless, contactless tracking. From fire extinguishers to vehicle tires, every asset is logged and accounted for. Drivers use digital fuel logbooks and vehicle handover inspections, ensuring full traceability of who operated which vehicle, when, and under what conditions. This boosts safety, minimizes downtime, ensures compliance, and builds accountability throughout operations.

We know that peace of mind comes from being prepared. Our AI-powered emergency identification delivers instant access to critical information, cutting the response time that can mean the difference between life and loss. Whether overseeing high-risk environments or corporate offices, leaders make faster, smarter decisions, ensuring better outcomes when it matters most. Name: Ayla Project International (API)
Description:
The Ayla Project International (API) is a nonpolitical humanitarian organization founded in the fall of 2023 in response to the Middle East crisis. Rooted in compassion and driven by action, API empowers critically ill and war-affected children, their mothers, and families to heal, rebuild, and thrive.
Our work began with one child’s story — and grew into a global movement of care. Today, we stand alongside families displaced by conflict, offering medical, psychological, educational, and livelihood support through trusted partnerships and community networks.
API believes that healing extends beyond treatment — it’s about restoring dignity, safety, and opportunity. Our approach is flexible and adaptive, meeting each family where they are, responding to their unique needs, and helping them reclaim their futures.
Through collaboration with local and international partners, volunteers, and host communities, API builds bridges of care and hope — from emergency support to long-term empowerment. We envision a world where every woman and child affected by war can access the resources, compassion, and opportunities they need to flourish.

Name: Valknut Rescue Solutions
Description:
Welcome to Valknut Rescue Solutions

At Valknut Rescue Solutions, we are dedicated to providing unparalleled emergency response services with a focus on specialized expertise and operational excellence. With 13 years of experience in special operations medical care, technical rescue, and wildland fire rescue, our team stands at the forefront of safety and rescue solutions.
Our comprehensive range of services includes:

• Special Operations Medical Expertise: We offer advanced medical support and trauma care in high-pressure environments, ensuring the highest level of patient care under the most challenging conditions.

o Advanced Trauma Care
-Critical Care Management: Advanced techniques and equipment for managing severe trauma, including advanced airway management, fluid resuscitation, and monitoring.
- Surgical Support: Provision of emergency surgical care in austere settings, including field surgery and stabilization prior to evacuation.
- Pain Management: Administration of pain relief and sedation in complex and high-stress situations.
o Medical Evacuation and Transportation
- Aerial Evacuation: Coordination and execution of airlift operations for rapid patient transport from remote locations to medical facilities.
- Ground Evacuation: Safe and efficient ground transport solutions for patients, including the use of specialized vehicles and equipment.
- Patient Stabilization for Transport: Ensuring patients are adequately stabilized and prepared for evacuation, minimizing risk during transport.
• Technical Rescue Operations: Our skilled operators are equipped to handle complex rescue scenarios, including confined space, high-angle, and structural collapse rescues, using state-of-the-art equipment and techniques.
• Wildland Fire Rescue: We provide expert response and management for wildland fire situations, employing tactical approaches to contain and mitigate the impact of fires while ensuring the safety of both personnel and property.

Name: M3een
Description:
M3een معين is a mobile app that addresses the persistent problem of delayed response times in emergency medical services. Our mission is to bridge the gap between emergencies and the arrival of professional medical assistance, potentially saving lives in the process.

Our innovative mobile application, M3een معين connects trained individuals in basic life support or first aid with emergency situations in their vicinity. By registering their information and location, these individuals become part of a lifesaving network.

When an emergency occurs, M3een sends automatic notifications to nearby registered users, enabling swift responses. Utilizing GPS/location technology, the app identifies the closest potential responders. Once a user accepts the emergency request, they are connected to the assigned ambulance team, providing guidance and support until professional medical personnel arrive.

M3een goes beyond immediate assistance by offering comprehensive training resources for individuals interested in acquiring basic life support or first aid skills. Through collaborations with healthcare providers, we develop training programs leading to certification upon completion. This ensures that M3een responders possess the necessary knowledge and skills to provide effective assistance.

Our decision to pursue this problem stems from recognizing the crucial role that immediate medical attention plays in saving lives. In critical situations such as cardiac arrests, strokes, or anaphylactic shocks, time is of the essence. M3een addresses the issue of excessively long ambulance response times by empowering trained individuals to provide effective aid during emergencies.

We understand that many people are willing to help but may lack the necessary training or confidence. M3een equips users with the knowledge and resources to take action when needed, making immediate medical assistance more accessible and efficient.

Name: Kilimanjaro SAR Limited
Description:
Kilimanjaro SAR Limited was a trusted and reliable helicopter rescue service, specializing in high altitude, high risk, and complex rescue missions. Located in Moshi, Tanzania on the slopes of Mount Kilimanjaro, our team successfully rescued over 100 patients, operating with a mission success rate of over 92%.

In addition to our helicopter rescue service, we operated the only high-altitude medicine clinic in Africa, providing specialized treatment for patients suffering from mountain sickness such as AMS, HAPE, and HACE. We had the strongest domestic network of partners in Tanzania for fixed-wing medevac, ground ambulances, and bedside consultations.

Our vision was to make Kilimanjaro the safest tourist destination in Africa while also serving other national parks across Tanzania. However, like many businesses around the world, the COVID-19 pandemic had a significant impact on our operations, and we were unable to continue providing our services.

While the closure of Kilimanjaro SAR Limited is unfortunate, I am proud of the work that we accomplished in our time in operation. Our commitment to unparalleled service and safety for all those who visited Tanzania's beautiful landscapes will continue to inspire us in future endeavors.

Ivan Braun
CEO

Name: Pubblica Assistenza Crevalcore
Description:
Pubblica Assistenza Crevalcore – Al servizio della comunità dal 1985

Fondata il 13 marzo 1985, la Pubblica Assistenza Crevalcore è un’associazione di volontariato che nasce dal desiderio di cittadini comuni di contribuire attivamente al benessere della propria comunità. Da allora, l’associazione è cresciuta fino a diventare un punto di riferimento nel territorio per il soccorso sanitario, il trasporto sociale, la protezione civile e il supporto durante eventi pubblici.

 Con sede in Via Candia 385/C, Crevalcore (BO), l’associazione è affiliata all’ ANPAS Emilia-Romagna e opera nel rispetto delle normative regionali e dei protocolli del 118. I volontari, formati e motivati, offrono assistenza in situazioni di emergenza, accompagnano persone fragili a visite mediche e terapie, e garantiscono la sicurezza durante manifestazioni con grande afflusso di pubblico.

 Tra i servizi innovativi spicca l’ Emergency Bike, un mezzo agile e attrezzato per il primo soccorso, utilizzato in collaborazione con il 118 Emilia Est.

 La Pubblica Assistenza Crevalcore è anche attiva nella Protezione Civile, impegnandosi nella prevenzione dei rischi ambientali e nella gestione delle emergenze locali.

 Dal 2018 è Centro di Formazione ANPAS, offrendo corsi per volontari e cittadini, promuovendo la cultura del primo soccorso e della cittadinanza attiva.

 Con oltre trent’anni di storia, la forza dell’associazione risiede nella dedizione dei suoi volontari, che ogni giorno scelgono di mettersi al servizio degli altri, incarnando i valori di solidarietà, uguaglianza e libertà

Description:
Redwood Response, Resilience & Recovery (Redwood R3) is a next-generation emergency management firm that blends proprietary artificial intelligence, deep relationships with local and regional subject-matter experts, and a scientific, evidence-based approach to solving the complex challenges across all phases of disaster—mitigation, preparedness, response, and recovery.
Rooted in field-tested operational experience and supported by a national network of practitioners, researchers, and technical specialists, Redwood R3 delivers planning frameworks that are dynamic, data-driven, and built around real-world conditions. Our AI-enabled planning and analysis tools enhance situational awareness, accelerate decision-making, and model cascading impacts with precision, empowering communities and organizations to strengthen readiness and reduce risk before disaster strikes.
Through collaborative engagement with key contributors, including emergency responders, local government agencies, utilities, healthcare systems, and community stakeholders, Redwood R3 develops solutions that reflect operational realities—not boilerplate assumptions. Our philosophy prioritizes co-development, adaptive learning, and continuous improvement, ensuring that every plan, workflow, and operational framework is both scientifically grounded and operationally executable in the field.
From EOP development to wildfire-resilience strategy, hazard mitigation, crisis communications, continuity planning, and recovery operations, Redwood R3 provides a full-spectrum, AI-accelerated suite of services that equips clients to confront today’s risks and prepare for tomorrow’s challenges with confidence and clarity.

Name: ReadySmartGo's Business Resilience Society
Description: Our Mission is to empower business owners and operators with the tools, knowledge, and community support needed to prevent business failure due to unforeseen disruptions.
